Judges3:4 Jawmiraawo yi…ói huuwtinirgo …ďe ngam foondugo Isra'iila'en, ngam anndugo to Isra'iila'en …óowtanto umrooje …óe o umri baabiraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe bee hunnduko Muusa."
Judges3:5 Bana nii Isra'iila'en njoo…ói caka Kanaani'en e Heti'en e Amoori'en e Perezzi'en e Hewi'en e Yebusi'en.
Judges3:6 ∆Āe te'i …ďi…ď…ďe ma…ď…ďe rew…ďe, kam…ďe boo …ďe te'ni …ďe …ďi…ď…ďe ma…ď…ďe rew…ďe, …ďe ndewi …óowantee…ďe ma…ď…ďe boo."
Judges3:7 Isra'iila'en mba…ói ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo Allah muu…óum'en, …ďe ngejjiti mo, …ďe ndewi Ba'alji e Asteraaji."
Judges3:8 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo tikkani …ďe, hokki …ďe haa juŇčngo Kusan-Risatayim, laamii…óo Mesopotamiya. ∆Āe njaggani mo duu…ďi joweetati."
Judges3:9 Nden Isra'iila'en tori Jawmiraawo ballal. Jawmiraawo su…ďani …ďe go…ó…óo kisnoowo …ďe: Otniyel …ďii Kenas, minyiraawo Kaaleb hisni …ďe."
Judges3:10 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo …óon dow Otniyel, o laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila. O wurti ngam ha…ďugo, Jawmiraawo hokki mo jaalorgal dow Kusan-Risatayim, laamii…óo lesdi Siriya."
Judges3:11 ∆Āaawo…óon konu wa…óaay nder lesdi duu…ďi cappan…óe nayi. Nden Otniyel …ďii Kenas maayi.
Judges3:12 Fahin Isra'iila'en mba…ói ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. Ngam maajum o semmbi…óini Egilon, laamii…óo Mo'ab, dow ma…ď…ďe."
Judges3:13 Egilon moo…ďti Ammooni'en e Amaleki'en, …ďe njehi, …ďe njaali Isra'iila'en, …ďe nyaami Yeriko Berniwol-Dibinooje."
Judges3:14 Isra'iila'en njaggani Egilon laamii…óo Mo'ab duu…ďi sappo e joweetati.
Judges3:15 Nden …ďe tori Jawmiraawo ballal. Jawmiraawo su…ďani …ďe go…ó…óo kisnoowo …ďe: Ehuudi, go…ó…óo agulaajo, …ďii Gera, nder lenyol Benyamin. Isra'iila'en neldani laamii…óo Mo'ab dokkal bee juŇčngo maako."
Judges3:16 Ehuudi wa…óani hoore mum kaafahi ki mbeldiiji …ói…ói, njuutirka maaki baakin reeta meetir. O ha…ď…ďi ki nder limce maako haa daŇčngo maako nyaamo."
Judges3:17 Nden o yahrani Egilon dokkal man. Egilon o pay…óo masin.
Judges3:18 Nde o timmini hokkugo Egilon dokkal go, o …óofti yim…ďe …ďe ndoondino dokkal man."
Judges3:19 ∆Āe njotti haa labbi kaa'e cehaa…óe kommbi Gilgal, Ehuudi kam lori …ďaawo, o wari o wi'i laamii…óo: ‚ÄúBarkaama, mi waddani ma kubaruwol sirriiwol.‚ÄĚ Laamii…óo wi'i huuwanoo…ďe mo: ‚ÄúNgurte!‚ÄĚ Darinoo…ďe kommbi maako fuu ngurti, …ďe accidi …ďe."
Judges3:20 Yaake man o …óonno joo…ói nder suudu dowru, feewndu ndu …ďe taaskani mo feere maako. Ehuudi …ďaditi mo, wi'i: ‚ÄúMi woodi wolde iwnde diga Allah. Haa mi wi'e.‚ÄĚ Laamii…óo Egilon ummi dow koromwal laamu mum."
Judges3:21 Ehuudi forti juŇčngo mum nano, losi kaafahi haa wuttudu mum nyaamru, yuwi reedu laamii…óo."
Judges3:22 Ki muti bee jogorde maaki fuu, …ďellere suddi ki ngam Ehuudi …óoofaay ki diga reedu maako, nden o wurtori …ďaawo …ďaawo."
Judges3:23 Ehuudi wurti gal zawleeru, nden o ma…ď…ďi dammu…óe suudu dowru e o hu…ďli bee ku…ďlir…óum man."
Judges3:24 Nden o dilli, jaggii…ďe laamii…óo ngarti, …ďe tawi ndaa, dammu…óe ku…ďlaama. ∆Āe numi laamii…óo dilli wa…óoygo haaje haa suudu cakaaru, feewndu."
Judges3:25 ∆Āe ndeeni haa …ďe comi, ammaa o ma…ď…ďitaay dammugal suudu. Nden …ďe koo'i ma…ď…ďitirgel, …ďe ma…ď…ďiti. Ndaa, jaagor…óo ma…ď…ďe …óon waali haa lesdi o maay…óo."
Judges3:26 Wakkati …ďe …óon ndeeni, Ehuudi da…ói, saali labbi kaa'e cehaa…óe, yotti Se'iira."
Judges3:27 Nde o nasti ton, o fuufi luwal konu nder kooseeje Efrayim ngam haa o ewno Isra'iila'en. ∆Āe ndiirti kooseeje, kaŇčko o ardi …ďe."
Judges3:28 O wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúNjokkee…óam, ngam Jawmiraawo hokki on konne'en moo…óon Mo'abi'en.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe ndiirti, …ďe tokki mo, …ďe kooci eeror…óe maayo Urdun gal lesdi Mo'ab, …ďe accaay koo gooto eero."
Judges3:29 Nyannde maajum …ďe mbari Mo'abi'en baakin ujine sappo, …ďe fuu …ďe wor…ďe semmbi…ó…ďe, waaw…ďe konu. Walaa koo gooto da…ói."
Judges3:30 Bana nii Mo'abi'en leesniri ko'e muu…óum'en les Isra'iila'en. ∆Āaawo…óon konu wa…óaay nder lesdi, baakin duu…ďi cappan…óe joweetati."
Judges3:31 ∆Āaawo Ehuudi, Samgar …ďii Anat laati alkaaliijo. O mbari Filisti'en teeme…ó…óe njoweego (600) bee sawru gaynaako na'i. KaŇčko boo o hisni Isra'iila."
Judges4:1 ∆Āaawo maayde Ehuudi, Isra'iila'en tokki wa…óugo ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo."
Judges4:2 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo hokki …ďe haa juŇčngo Yabin, laamii…óo Kanaani'en haa Hacoor. Maw…óo honoo…ďe Yabin, …óum Sisera, joo…óii…óo haa Haroseet-Goyim."
Judges4:3 Yabin woodi mootaaji pucci teeme…ó…óe joweenayi (900). O …ďilli Isra'iila'en bee caatal haa wa…ói duu…ďi noogas. Nden kam…ďe boo …ďe tori Jawmiraawo ballal.
Judges4:4 Saa'i man, Deboora, debbo Lappidot wonno annabiijo, alkaaliijo nder Isra'iila."
Judges4:5 O …óonno joo…óo les dibinoohi, …ďe inndi ki dibinoohi Deboora, hakkunde Rama e Baytila, nder lesdi kooseeje Efrayim. Haa ton Isra'iila'en …óonno njaha ngam o ta'ana …ďe kiita."
Judges4:6 Nyannde feere Deboora neli, ewni Barak, …ďii Abino'am mo Keedes nder lesdi Neftali. O wi'i mo: ‚ÄúNdaa ko Allah Jawmiraawo Isra'iila umri ma: Yah dow hooseere Taboora, ewna wor…ďe ujine sappo (10.000) nder le'i Neftali e Zabulon."
Judges4:7 Min mi waddan Sisera, maw…óo honoo…ďe Yabin, kaŇčko e mootaaji pucci maako e moo…ďe maako fuu, ngam ha…ďre bee maa…óa haa maayo Kison. Mi hokkan mo haa juŇčngo ma.‚ÄĚ"
Judges4:8 Barak wi'i Deboora: ‚ÄúTo a yahdan bee am, mi yahan. Ammaa to a yahdataa bee am, min boo mi yahataa.‚ÄĚ"
Judges4:9 Deboora jaabi mo: ‚ÄúFakat, mi yahdan bee ma. Ammaa haa laawol ngol njahrata, a he…ďataa tedduŇčgal, ngam haa juŇčngo debbo, Jawmiraawo hokkata Sisera.‚ÄĚ Nden Deboora ummi, yahdi bee Barak haa Keedes."
Judges4:10 Barak ewni yim…ďe Zabulon e yim…ďe Neftali haa Keedes. Wor…ďe ujine sappo (10.000) ngari, tokki mo, Deboora boo yahdi bee maako."
Judges4:11 Heber, Keniijo …óonno haa kommbi Keedes. O senndirino bee Keni'en danygol Hobab esiraawo Muusa, o darnino suudu laymaaru maako kommbi lekki makki haa Sa'ananim."
Judges4:12 Sisera nani Barak, …ďii Abino'am wa'ake dow hooseere Taboora."
Judges4:13 O moo…ďti mootaaji njamndi pucci …ói o mari fuu teeme…ó…óe joweenayi (900), non boo yim…ďe maako won…ďe diga Haroseet-Goyim haa yotti maayo Kison fuu."
Judges4:14 Deboora wi'i Barak: ‚ÄúUmma, Jawmiraawo …óon arde. Hannde o hokkete Sisera.‚ÄĚ Barak diirti hooseere Taboora, kaŇčko e wor…ďe honoo…ďe maako ujine sappo …ďaawo maako."
Judges4:15 Jawmiraawo jii…ďi hakkiilooji Sisera e jama'aare konu mum fuu e mootaaji pucci mum fuu, kulol maŇčngol naŇčngi …ďe, o mbardi …ďe fuu bee kaafaaje haa yeeso Ba'al. Sisera jippi moota pucci mum, doggi bee kos…óe."
Judges4:16 Barak taasni mootaaji pucci e jama'aare konu haa yotti Haroseet-Goyim. ∆Āe mbari jama'aare Sisera fuu bee kaafaaje, walaa koo gooto lutti."
Judges4:17 Sisera doggi haa suudu laymaaru Ya'el, debbo Heber Keniijo, ngam salaaman …óonno hakkunde Yabin, laamii…óo Hacoor e saare Heber."
Judges4:18 Ya'el wurti, ja…ď…ďi Sisera, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúBarkaama, nastu, nastu suudu am, taa hul.‚ÄĚ Sisera nasti suudu laymaaru maako, Ya'el suddi mo."
Judges4:19 Sisera wi'i mo: ‚ÄúHokkam ndiyam se…ó…óa, mi …óom…ói.‚ÄĚ Debbo ma…ď…ďiti kanyakanyaawu kosam, yarni mo, suddi mo fahin."
Judges4:20 Sisera wi'i mo: ‚ÄúDara haa dammugal suudu. To go…ó…óo wari ∆īami ma: Go…ó…óo …óon haa …óo na? Jaaba mo: Walaa.‚ÄĚ
Judges4:21 Sisera somi masin, o …óaani …óoyŇčgol tedduŇčgol. Ya'el hoo'i tappir…óum e tiggirgal laymaaru, o …ďaditi Sisera bee sirri, o sumpiti mo hoore bee tiggirgal man haa ngal nasti lesdi. ∆äon nii Sisera maayi."
Judges4:22 Ndaa Barak …óonno taasna Sisera. Nde o yotti ton, Ya'el wurti ngam ja…ď…ďaago mo, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúWar, mi holle go…ó…óo mo a tefata.‚ÄĚ Barak nasti suudu, ndaa, Sisera …óon waali haa lesdi o maay…óo, tiggirgal boo …óon nder hoore maako."
Judges4:23 Bana nii Jawmiraawo leesniri Yabin, laamii…óo Kanaani'en yeeso Isra'iila'en."
Judges4:24 ∆Āaawo…óon …ďe …óon …ďesda teddango mo haa …ďe nattini mo.
Judges5:1 Nyalaade maajum Deboora e Barak …ďii Abino'am ngimi yimre nde'e:
Judges5:2 MaŇčgte Jawmiraawo, ngam Isra'iila'en taaskani konu, ummaatoore nasti ha…ďre bee ngi…óa maare."
Judges5:3 Ke…óite, onon laamii…ďe e maw…ďe! Min, mi yimanan Jawmiraawo. Mi maŇčgtan Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila."
Judges5:4 Yaa Jawmiraawo, nde ngurtii…óaa Se'ir, nde ngar…óa diga gese Edoom, lesdi dimmbi, duule to…ďni ndiyam maaje, diga asama iyeende …óuu…ónde to…ďi."
Judges5:5 Kooseeje …ďolwi yeeso ma, Jawmiraawo Allah mo Sina, Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila."
Judges5:6 Nder zamanu Samgar …ďii Anat, nder zamanu Ya'el, laabi perwi, wa…óoo…ďe jahaale tokki laabi lelii…ói."
Judges5:7 Ardii…ďe nder lesdi Isra'iila majjiti, haa ummiimi, min Deboora e mi laati bana daada ngam Isra'iila."
Judges5:8 Ummaatoore su…ďi …óowantee…ďe feere, nden law konne'en ndari haa dammugal. Ammaa walaa koo gooto jogi wawarde malla labbo nder wor…ďe ujine cappan…óe nayo nder Isra'iila'en"
Judges5:9 ∆Āernde am …óon numa dow ardii…ďe, honoo…ďe Isra'iila e nastu…ďe ha…ďre bee ngi…óa muu…óum'en. MaŇčgte Jawmiraawo!"
Judges5:10 Onon wa'ii…ďe mbamkon ndaneehon, onon joo…óii…ďe dow da…ó…óaaje …óelem…óe, onon tokkotoo…ďe laabi boo, nume boo…ó…óum!"
Judges5:11 Haa kommbi keeleeje, senndoo…ďe ndiyam …óonno maŇčgta kuu…óe Jawmiraawo adiliije, …óum kuu…óe dim…óinooje nder Isra'iila, nden ummaatoore diirti haa dammu…óe berniwol."
Judges5:12 Deboora, taa …óaana, umma! Umma! Dara, yimu gimol konu. Barak …ďii Abino'am, umma! Hooru naŇčngaa…ďe ma!"
Judges5:13 Luttu…ďe bee yoŇčki ndiirti kawtoy bee teddu…ďe, ummaatoore Jawmiraawo hawti haa kommbi am, caka semmbi…ó…ďe."
Judges5:14 Diga kooseeje Efrayim jaalotoo…ďe Amalek njippi, …ďaawo ma…ď…ďe lenyol Benyamin caka yim…ďe mum. Umroo…ďe iwi haa Makir, ardii…ďe honoo…ďe boo iwi haa Zabulon."
Judges5:15 Maw…ďe Issakar ngardi bee Deboora, bana Issakar, non Barak boo wari. ∆Āe nasti waadiwol, …ďe tokki mo. Ammaa jokkirgol wa…ói caka yim…ďe Ruben, …ďe …óon ngaabotira haa foroy."
Judges5:16 Koni on njoo…ói caka kowaaje? Haa on nana luu'aaŇčgo waynaa…ďe baali na? Nonnon, jokkirgol wa…ói caka yim…ďe Ruben, onon on …óon ngaabotira haa foroy."
Judges5:17 Haa Gile'at, fuunaaŇčge Urdun, le'i …ói ndimmbaaki ngoni: Yim…ďe lenyol Dan njoo…ói dow koommbooje muu…óum'en. Yim…ďe Aser boo njoo…ói non haa fomoonde mbeela, dow jipporde koommbooje."
Judges5:18 Yim…ďe Zabulon kulaay maayugo nder konu. Yim…ďe Neftali njoo…ói dow towndiije lesdi.
Judges5:19 Laamii…ďe ngari mba…ói ha…ďre, …ďe ka…ďi bee laamii…ďe Kanaana haa Ta'anak kommbi maaje Megiddo, ammaa walaa ko …ďe ke…ďi, koo cardi."
Judges5:20 Koode asama boo nasti ha…ďre man, dow laabi maaje …óe ka…ďi bee Sisera."
Judges5:21 Maayo …óon ila diga …ďooyma, maayo Kison ilni konne'en. Sey mi nasta ha…ďre bee semmbe!"
Judges5:22 Pucci …óon caamna bee semmbe, …ói piyi lesdi bee kororamje maaji bana pucci caamgal."
Judges5:23 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúNaale Meeros! Naale yim…ďe joo…óii…ďe ton! Ngam …ďe ngaraay wallugo Jawmiraawo, …ďe ngaraay wallugo mo caka semmbi…ó…ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Judges5:24 Ammaa barka laatanto Ya'el, debbo Heber Keniijo. Barka laatanto mo ko …ďuri rew…ďe joo…óii…ďe nder cuu…ói laymaaji fuu."
Judges5:25 Sisera tori mo ndiyam, o hokki mo kosam, o waddani mo kettuŇčgol nder taasawo marŇčgo saman."
Judges5:26 Nden o forti juu…óe maako, o hoo'i tiggirgal, o naŇčngi tappir…óum bee nyaamo maako. O fiyi Sisera, o fusi mo hoore, o sumpiti galaŇčgal maako."
Judges5:27 O turi yeeso maako, o do'i, o lutti o …óon waali les kos…óe Ya'el dow lesdi, o yoofti, o maayi."
Judges5:28 Daada Sisera …óon laara gal wurdere suudu, gal kasaryel, o …óon ∆īoo∆īna: ‚ÄúNgam …óume moota pucci maako nee…ďi? Ngam …óume …ďe njaawaay wargo law?‚ÄĚ"
Judges5:29 O …óon tokko lornango hoore maako jaawaabu ngu rew…ďe mar…ďe hikma njaaboto.
Judges5:30 ‚ÄúHaa sooje'en …óon moo…ďta ke…ďal na? Fakat, …ďe …óon cennda ngal, paanyo debbo gooto malla …ói…óo ngam konoowo fuu, limce jaage e tuppitaa…óe boo ngam Sisera e mojaaje tuppitaa…óe ngam mojugo mar…óo jaalorgal. Naa non na?‚ÄĚ"
Judges5:31 Jawmiraawo, sey konne'en ma fuu kalka, ammaa yi…ó…ďe ma njayna bana naaŇčge fu…óirta. Nden konu timmi nder lesdi baakin duu…ďi cappan…óe nayi."
Judges6:1 Fahin Isra'iila'en mba…ói ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. Ngam maajum o hokki …ďe haa juu…óe yim…ďe Madiyan duu…ďi jowee…ói…ói.
Judges6:2 Madiyan'en torri Isra'iila'en masin. Ngam maajum, Isra'iila'en nyukki nder lowi e gaaruuji kooseeje ngam hisugo."
Judges6:3 Koo ndey Isra'iila'en aawi fuu, yim…ďe Madiyan e Amalek e yim…ďe iw…ďe haa la…ó…óe fuunaaŇčge …óon ngara, ukkano …ďe."
Judges6:4 ∆Āe …óonno caŇčngina …óakki lesdi ma…ď…ďe e …ďe …óonno mbonna ∆īaamle lesdi haa yotti lesdi Gaaza. ∆Āe accanaay Isra'iila'en ko …ďe nyaamata sam, …ďe accanaay …ďe koo baali e na'i e bam…óe."
Judges6:5 ∆Āe mba'i bee tokke ma…ď…ďe e …ďe ngari bee laymaaji ma…ď…ďe, …ďe …óuu…ó…ďe masin bana ba…ď…ďatti. Kam…ďe e geeloo…ói ma…ď…ďe limataake. ∆Āe ngari ngam wonnugo lesdi."
Judges6:6 Ngam daliila yim…ďe Madiyan, Isra'iila'en nasti nder …ďillaare masin. Ngam maajum …ďe tori Jawmiraawo ballal."
Judges6:7 Nde Isra'iila'en tori Jawmiraawo daliila Madiyan'en,"
Judges6:8 o neldi …ďe annabiijo mo wi'i …ďe: Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúMi wurtini on lesdi Misra, haa on ngonno maccu…ďe."
Judges6:9 Mi hisni on juu…óe Misra'en e juu…óe toonyoo…ďe on. Mi riiwi konne'en yeeso moo…óon nde on …óon njaha e mi hokki on lesdi ma…ď…ďe.
Judges6:10 Mi wi'i on: Min woni Allah Jawmiraawo mon, taa kule …óowantee…ďe Amoori'en …ďe njoo…óii…óon nder lesdi muu…óum'en. Ammaa on nananaay yam.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:11 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo wari, joo…ói les lekki makki gonki haa Ofra, nder maral Yo'as, go…ó…óo danygol Abi'ezer. Gedeyon, …ďiyiiko …óon fiya alkamaari bee sirri nder …ďi…ó…óirde inaboojam, ngam taa yim…ďe Madiyan ngi'a mo."
Judges6:12 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo waŇčgani mo, wi'i: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo …óon wondi bee ma, an konoowo cemmbi…ó…óo!‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:13 Gedeyon jaabi: ‚ÄúBarkaama, yaafam! To Jawmiraawo …óon wondi bee amin, ngam …óume boneeji …ói fuu ukkani min? Toy kaayeefiiji …ói baabiraa…ďe amin anndini min nde …ďe …óonno mbi'a min: Naa diga lesdi Misra on Jawmiraawo wurtini en? Hannde kam, Jawmiraawo wudini min, o hokki min haa juu…óe Madiyan'en.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:14 Nden Jawmiraawo wayliti gal Gedeyon, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúBee semmbe nde mar…óa, yah hisnu Isra'iila'en juu…óe Madiyan'en. Non mi neli ma!‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:15 Gedeyon jaabi: ‚ÄúYaa Jawmiraawo, noy mbaawranmi hisnugo Isra'iila'en? Danygol am …ďuri tampugo nder lenyol Manassa e min mi derkeejo …ďur…óo fam…óugo nder saare baaba am.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:16 Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: ‚ÄúMi wondan bee ma. A jaaloto yim…ďe Madiyan bana to …óum go…ó…óo gooto tan.‚ÄĚ
Judges6:17 Gedeyon wi'i: ‚ÄúTo …óum fottani ma, wa…óanam alaama ngam gooŇč…óingo an woni Jawmiraawo fakat."
Judges6:18 Taa dillu …óo, haa to mi waddani ma dokkal nyaamdu mi jo'ini yeeso ma.‚ÄĚ O jaabi: ‚ÄúMi joo…óoto haa to a lortake.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:19 Nden Gedeyon hirsi jawgel, o defi ngel, o hoo'i kuroori agoda cappan…óe tati, o tamsi tamseeje …óe ufnaaka. O resi kusel nder silaawo, takay boo nder feho. Nden o wurtini …óum, o waddi …óum o jo'ini …óum yeeso malaa'ikaajo Allah haa les lekki makki go."
Judges6:20 Malaa'ikaajo wi'i mo: ‚ÄúJo'in kusel e tamseeje dow tapaare ton, ruf takay dow man.‚ÄĚ Gedeyon wa…ói non."
Judges6:21 Nden malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo forti juŇčngo mum bee sawru, meemi kusel e tamseeje bee se…ďatto sawru. Yiite wurti haa tapaare, nyaami kusel e tamseeje. Nden malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo majjiri gite Gedeyon."
Judges6:22 Gedeyon faami o yi'i malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo. O huli, o wi'i: ‚ÄúBone am, yaa Allah Jawmiraawo, ngam mi yi'i malaa'ikaajo Allah gite bee gite.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:23 Ammaa Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: ‚ÄúJam salaaman! Taa hul! A maayataa.‚ÄĚ
Judges6:24 Gedeyon mahani Jawmiraawo hirsirde ton, o inndi nde Jawmiraawo-dokkoowo-jam. Haa wargo hannde boo hirsirde nde …óon haa Ofra, wuro danygol Abi'ezer."
Judges6:25 Jemmaare man Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúHoo'u ngaari baaba ma, ngaari kalhaldi ndi duu…ďi jowee…ói…ói. Yibbin hirsirde nde o mahani Ba'al. Fe'u boo Asera kommbi maare."
Judges6:26 Nden mahan Allah Jawmiraawo ma hirsirde kaa'e mo'inaande woonde dow towndiire nde'e. ∆Āaawo man hoo'u ngaari kalhaldi, wulanam ndi nguleteendi dow le…ó…óe suura Asera …óe pe'ata.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:27 Gedeyon hoo'i wor…ďe sappo nder huuwoo…ďe muu…óum, o wa…ói ko Jawmiraawo umrino mo. Ammaa o huli yim…ďe saare baaba maako e yim…ďe wuro. Ngam maajum o wa…óaay …óum nyalawma, sey jemma."
Judges6:28 JaŇčngo man, nde yim…ďe wuro ndawi cub, …ďe tawi hirsirde Ba'al yibbinaama, suura Asera kommbi maare fe'aama, ngaari kalhaldi boo wulaama dow hirsirde mahaande hesre."
Judges6:29 ∆Āe ∆īam∆īamtiri: ‚ÄúMoy wa…ói …óum?‚ÄĚ ∆Āe ∆īami yim…ďe, …ďe linyi haala man, …ďe tawi Gedeyon …ďii Yo'as wa…ói …óum."
Judges6:30 Nden …ďe mbi'i Yo'as: ‚ÄúWurtin …ďiya haa …óo min mbara mo, ngam o yibbini hirsirde Ba'al, o fe'i suura Asera kommbi maare boo.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:31 Yo'as jaabi darii…ďe yeeso muu…óum fuu: ‚Äú∆äum onon faddanta Ba'al haa kisnon mo na? Koo moy ha…ďani mo, o mbaretee…óo hiddeko weeta. To Ba'al o Allah, sey o ha…ďana hoore maako, ngam …óum hirsirde maako Gedeyon yibbini.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:32 Diga saa'i maajum, …ďe …óon ewno Gedeyon Yerub-Ba'al, yi…ói wi'ugo: ‚ÄúBa'al ha…ďana hoore muu…óum, ngam …óum hirsirde mum o yibbini.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:33 Yim…ďe Madiyan e Amalek fuu e yim…ďe iw…ďe haa la…ó…óe fuunaaŇčge fuu moo…ďti. ∆Āe eeri maayo Urdun, …ďe caŇčngini nder waadiwol Yisre'el."
Judges6:34 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo jippi dow Gedeyon, o fuufi luwal konu, o ewni yim…ďe danygol Abi'ezer, …ďe tokki mo."
Judges6:35 O neli nelaa…ďe haa lenyol Manassa fuu, o ewni …ďe …ďe tokki mo. O neli nelaa…ďe haa le'i Aser e Zabulon e Neftali boo. ∆Āe fuu …ďe mba'i ngam tawoygo mo."
Judges6:36 Gedeyon wi'i Allah: ‚ÄúA wi'i a hisnan Isra'iila bee juŇčngo am. To …óum gooŇčga,"
Judges6:37 ndaa, mi wallinan laral mbaalu haa laarre. To saawawre wa…ói dow maagal tan, ammaa lesdi fuu …óon yoori, nden kam mi anndan a tammi hisnugo Isra'iila bee juŇčngo am bana mbi'…óa.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:38 ∆äum wa…ói non. JaŇčngo maajum o dawi cub, o …ďi…ó…ói laral mbaalu, o wurtini ndiyam saawawre haa maagal deydey hebbingo taasawo."
Judges6:39 Nden o wi'i Allah: ‚ÄúUseni! Taa tikkanam! Accu mi …ďesda wolwango ma nde woore tan. Haa mi foonda fahin bee laral mbaalu. Accu saawawre wa…óa dow lesdi fuu, ammaa taa nde soofna laral mbaalu.‚ÄĚ"
Judges6:40 Jemmaare man Allah wa…ói non. Laral mbaalu tan yoori, ammaa saawawre wa…ói haa lesdi fuu."
Judges7:1 Nden Gedeyon bi'etee…óo Yerub-Ba'al boo dawi cub, kaŇčko e yim…ďe wondu…ďe bee maako fuu. ∆Āe caŇčngini kommbi see…ďoore Harodi. Ammaa saŇčngeere yim…ďe Madiyan …óon haa woyla ma…ď…ďe, nder waadiwol gal towndiire Moore."
Judges7:2 Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúWor…ďe wondu…ďe bee maa…óa …óuu…ói. Mi hokkataa …ďe yim…ďe Madiyan, ngam taa Isra'iila'en njuro dow am, taa …ďe mbi'a: Semmbe amin hisni min."
Judges7:3 Kadi, wooynu haa jama'aare fuu nana: Koo moy hultori, diwni, sey o hoota, o diirto hooseere Gile'at fajiri.‚ÄĚ Wor…ďe ujine noogas e …ói…óo (22.000) lori, ujine sappo lutti."
Judges7:4 Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúKoo jonta boo yim…ďe …óuu…ói. Yahru …ďe haa ndiyam, haa mi su…ďtane …ďe ton. Mo mbi'anmaami: Oo yahdata bee ma, kaŇčko o yahdan bee maa…óa. Ammaa mo mbi'anmaami: Oo yahdataa bee ma, kaŇčko o yahataa bee maa…óa.‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:5 Gedeyon yahri …ďe haa ndiyam. Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: ‚ÄúKoo moy tahi ndiyam bee …óemŇčgal bana rawaandu tahrata, darnu mo wakeere nde'e. Koo moy tuggi koppi mum ngam yarugo ndiyam, darnu mo wakeere ndeya.‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:6 Wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe tato nye…ói ndiyam bee juŇčngo, tahi …óam bee …óemŇčgal. Ammaa luttu…ďe fuu tuggi koppi ngam yarugo ndiyam."
Judges7:7 Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúBee wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe tato tahu…ďe ndiyam mi hisnirta on, mi hokkete jaalorgal dow yim…ďe Madiyan. Ammaa luttu…ďe fuu koota!‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:8 Gedeyon lorni Isra'iila'en wo…ó…ďe …ďe koota. O jogiti wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe tato go tan. Kam…ďe …ďe koo'i njoo…ďaari e luwe konu haa hootan…ďe. SaŇčngeere yim…ďe Madiyan …óon haa les Gedeyon nder waadiwol.
Judges7:9 Jemmaare man Jawmiraawo wi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúUmma, jippa haa saŇčngeere Madiyan'en, mi hokki ma nde."
Judges7:10 Ammaa to a …óon hula jippaago ton, njippide ton bee Pura jaggii…óo ma."
Judges7:11 A nanan ko …ďe mbolwata ton, nden, a he…ďan cuusal yahugo ukkano nde. Gedeyon jippodi bee jaggii…óo mum haa sera saŇčngeere."
Judges7:12 Yim…ďe Madiyan e Amalek e yim…ďe iw…ďe haa la…ó…óe fuunaaŇčge kebbini waadiwol, …ďe …óuu…ó…ďe bana ba…ď…ďatti. Geeloo…ói ma…ď…ďe boo limataake, bana njaareendi maayo."
Judges7:13 Nde Gedeyon yotti ton, go…ó…óo feere …óonno limtana soobaajo muu…óum koy…óol. O wi'i mo: Ndaa ko koy…óumi, mi yi'i tamseere sa'iiruuri …óon tallo nder saŇčngeere mee…óen, wari lukki suudu laymaaru, yibbini ndu, jimmiti ndu.‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:14 Soobaajo maako wi'i mo: ‚ÄúKo saawi nder koy…óol man, fakat …óum kaafahi Gedeyon …ďii Yo'as, Isra'iilaajo. Allah hokki mo yim…ďe Madiyan e saŇčngeere konu mee…óen fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:15 Nde Gedeyon nani haala koy…óol man e ko saawi nder maagol, o sujidani Jawmiraawo. Nden o lori haa saŇčngeere Isra'iila, o wi'i: ‚ÄúUmme, Jawmiraawo hokki on saŇčngeere Madiyan.‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:16 O senndi honoo…ďe maako teeme…ó…óe tato ge…ďe tati. O hokki koo moy luwal konu e mbulku sookru bee jamre yiite nder maagu.
Judges7:17 O wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúTo mi yottake sera saŇčngeere, ndaaree…óam, mba…óe ko mba…óanmi."
Judges7:18 To mi fuufi luwal konu, min e wondu…ďe bee am fuu, onon boo puufe luwe mon nder taarde saŇčngeere fuu. Nden koole, mbi'e: En ka…ďana Jawmiraawo e Gedeyon!‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:19 Gedeyon e wor…ďe teemerre wondu…ďe bee muu…óum njotti sera saŇčngeere diga jeŇčngaay. ∆Āe cannjino aynoo…ďe wakkati man. ∆Āe puufi luwe konu, …ďe pusi bulki gon…ói haa juu…óe ma…ď…ďe."
Judges7:20 Nden ge…ďe tati go fuu puufi luwe, …ďe pusi bulki. JuŇčngo nano …ďe njogori jamre yiite, juŇčngo nyaamo boo luwal konu ngam fuufugo. ∆Āe kooli, …ďe …óon mbi'a: ‚ÄúEn ka…ďana Jawmiraawo e Gedeyon bee kaafaaje mee…óen!‚ÄĚ"
Judges7:21 ∆Āe …óon taari saŇčngeere, koo moy ma…ď…ďe …óon dari haa nokkuure mum. Jama'aare konne'en fuu wooki, doggi."
Judges7:22 Saa'i wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe tato …óon puufa luwe, Jawmiraawo ummini kaafaaje nder saŇčngeere fuu, ngam haa Madiyan'en mbar-mbartira bee kaafaaje. ∆Āe fuu …ďe ndoggi gal Serera haa yotti Bayti-Sitta e Abel-Mehola baŇčnge Tabbat."
Judges7:23 ∆Āe ewni Isra'iila'en nder le'i Neftali e Aser e lenyol Manassa fuu. ∆Āe ngari, …ďe taasni yim…ďe Madiyan."
Judges7:24 Gedeyon neli nelaa…ďe koo toy dow kooseeje Efrayim, …ďe mbi'a …ďe: ‚ÄúNjippe, potte bee Madiyan'en, ma…ď…ďe eeror…óe Urdun e eeror…óe haa kommbi Bayti-Bara.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe njippi, …ďe ma…ď…ďi eeror…óe Urdun e eeror…óe haa kommbi Bayti-Bara."
Judges7:25 ∆Āe naŇčngi laamii…ďe Madiyan …ói…óo, Oreb e Ze'eb e yerima'en. ∆Āe mbari Oreb haa Tapaare-Oreb, Ze'eb boo haa ∆Āi…ó…óirde-Je'eb. ∆Āe tokki taasnugo yim…ďe Madiyan, …ďe ngaddi hoore Oreb bee nde Ze'eb haa Gedeyon gon…óo haa ga…óa Urdun."
Judges8:1 Yim…ďe Efrayim mbi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúKoni a ewnaaki min, wakkati njah…óa ha…ďoygo bee Madiyan'en? Koni kuuw…óa min bana nii?‚ÄĚ ∆Āe njokkiri bee maako masin."
Judges8:2 Ammaa Gedeyon jaabi …ďe: ‚Äú∆äume mi wa…ói haa …ďuri ko on nga…ói? Walliinde moo…óon onon yim…ďe Efrayim, koo no nde fam…óiri fuu, nde …ďuraay ko ke…ďmi bee danygol am e ngol Abi'ezer saman na? Fakat …óum …ďuri."
Judges8:3 Ndaa, haa moo…óon Jawmiraawo hokki Oreb e Ze'eb, laamii…ďe Madiyan. Ko kuuwmi fuu, fotaay nanndineego bee kuugal mon.‚ÄĚ Nde o wolwani …ďe bana nii, tikkere yim…ďe Efrayim dow Gedeyon feewti."
Judges8:4 Gedeyon e honoo…ďe muu…óum teeme…ó…óe tato njotti maayo Urdun, …ďe eeri ngo. ∆Āe comi, ammaa bee maajum fuu …ďe tokkitini taasnugo konne'en ma…ď…ďe."
Judges8:5 ∆Āe ngari haa Sukkot, Gedeyon wi'i yim…ďe ton: ‚ÄúUseni, ndokke yim…ďe tokkii…ďe yam tamseeje, ngam …ďe comi. Mi …óon taasna Zebaha e Calmunna, laamii…ďe Madiyan.‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:6 Ammaa maw…ďe Sukkot mbi'i: ‚ÄúKadi a naŇčngaay Zebaha e Calmunna tawon non min ndokka jama'aare ma tamseeje na?‚ÄĚ
Judges8:7 Nden Gedeyon jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúBoo…ó…óum! To Jawmiraawo hokki yam Zebaha e Calmunna, nden kam mi …ďoccan on bee gi'e ladde hamaadaare e giŇčngille.‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:8 Nden o dilli, o wa'i dow Peniyel. O tori yim…ďe ton tornde ndeya go. Kam…ďe boo …ďe njaabi mo bana yim…ďe Sukkot njaabori."
Judges8:9 Gedeyon wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúTo mi jaalake, mi warti jam, mi yibbinan suudu towndu haa berniwol moo…óon.‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:10 Zebaha e Calmunna …óonno haa Karkor, bee jama'aaje konu muu…óum'en, wor…ďe baakin ujine sappo e njowo (15.000). ∆äum luttu…ďe nder honoo…ďe iw…ďe haa fuunaaŇčge, ngam honoo…ďe ma…ď…ďe ujine teemerre e noogas (120.000) mbaraama."
Judges8:11 Gedeyon tokki laawol ngol joo…óii…ďe haa ladde nder cuu…ói laymaaji tokkoto, haa fuunaaŇčge Nobah e Yogbeha, o ukkani saŇčngeere laamii…ďe Madiyan'en nde …ďe …óonno njoo…ói jam."
Judges8:12 Zebaha e Calmunna, laamii…ďe Madiyan …ói…óo ndoggi, ammaa Gedeyon taasni …ďe, naŇčngi …ďe, saŇčngeere fuu diwni daliila kultoreeŇčgol maŇčngol."
Judges8:13 Nde Gedeyon …óon warta konu gal wa'orde Heeres,"
Judges8:14 o naŇčngi derkeejo mo Sukkot, o ∆īami mo. Derkeejo winndani mo in…óe maw…ďe Sukkot e ndotti'en berniwol man, …ďe …óon cappan…óe njowee…ói…óo e njowee…ói…óo."
Judges8:15 Nden Gedeyon yehi haa yim…ďe Sukkot, wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúOn …óon ciftora kuudi ndi on ku…óino yam na? On cali hokkugo yim…ďe am som…ďe tamseeje, ngam mi naŇčngaayno Zebaha e Calmunna tawon. Ndaa …ďe!‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:16 Nden o hoo'i gi'e ladde hamaadaare e giŇčngille, o …ďocci ndotti'en Sukkot e yim…ďe berniwol man bee maaje."
Judges8:17 O yibbini suudu towndu haa Peniyel boo, o mbari yim…ďe berniwol man."
Judges8:18 Nden Gedeyon ∆īami Zebaha e Calmunna: ‚ÄúWor…ďe …ďe mbar…óon haa Taboora, noy …ďe mba'i?‚ÄĚ ∆Āe njaabi: ‚ÄúBana maa…óa, koo moy ma…ď…ďe nanndi …ďii laamii…óo.‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:19 O wi'i …ďe: ‚Äú∆äum deer…óiraa…ďe am, …ďi…ď…ďe daada am. Fakat mi …óon hunoro Jawmiraawo geeto, to on accino …ďe bee yoŇčki, mi mbarataano on!‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:20 O umri Yeter, afo maako: ‚ÄúUmma, mbar …ďe!‚ÄĚ Ammaa derkeejo losaay kaafahi mum. O huli ngam o derkeejo tawon."
Judges8:21 Zebaha e Calmunna mbi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúSey an a mbara min! Sey semmbe gorko fotata huuwugo kuugal gorko.‚ÄĚ ∆äon nii Gedeyon ummi, mbari …ďe. O hooci suuraahoy lewru haa daa…óe geeloo…ói ma…ď…ďe boo."
Judges8:22 ∆Āaawo man Isra'iila'en mbi'i Gedeyon: ‚ÄúLaamana min, an e …ďi…ó…óo ma e taaniraawo ma, ngam a hisni min juu…óe yim…ďe Madiyan.‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:23 Gedeyon jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúMin mi laamantaako on, koo …ďiyam boo, Jawmiraawo feere muu…óum laamanto on.‚ÄĚ"
Judges8:24 E o wi'i …ďe fahin: ‚ÄúAmmaa woodi huunde wo…ónde mi yi…ói toraago on: Koo moy moo…óon hokkammi halagaare wonnde nder ke…ďal konu mum.‚ÄĚ Yim…ďe Madiyan ngoodino kalagaaje kaŇčŇčeeri, ngam …ďe danygol Isma'iilu."
Judges8:25 Isra'iila'en njaabi mo: ‚ÄúFakat min ndokkete …óe.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe mbe'iti limce, koo moy ma…ď…ďe sakkini halagaare ke…ďal mum dow maaje."
Judges8:26 TeddeeŇčga kalagaaje kaŇčŇčeeri …óe …ďe ndokki Gedeyon, wa…ói baakin kaŇčŇčeeri kilo noogas. ∆Āe ndokki mo boo kuuje pawne go…ó…óe bana: Yeriiji e limce bo…óeeje e suuraahoy jagnaakoy daa…óe geeloo…ói ma…ď…ďe."
Judges8:27 Gedeyon wa…ói …óanciki limanjo bee kaŇčŇčeeri man, …ďili ki haa Ofra, wuro maako. Ton Isra'iila'en fuu laatini …óanciki ki'i lawru, …ďe ndewi ndu, bana non ndu laatori tuuforgol ngam Gedeyon e yim…ďe saare muu…óum."
Judges8:28 Diga saa'i maajum Madiyan'en leestani Isra'iila'en, baaw…óe ma…ď…ďe timmi. Konu meetaay nder lesdi Isra'iila baakin duu…ďi cappan…óe nayi yaake ngeendam Gedeyon."
Judges8:29 Gedeyon …ďii Yo'as, coometee…óo Yerub-Ba'al hooti saare mum, joo…ói ton."
Judges8:30 O danyi …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe cappan…óe njowee…ói…óo, ngam o woodi rew…ďe …óuu…ó…ďe."
Judges8:31 O woodi boo culaa…óo haa Sikem, kaŇčko boo o danyani mo …ďi…ó…óo gorko mo Gedeyon inndi …óum Abimelek."
Judges8:32 Gedeyon maayi bee seyo nder ndottaaku. ∆Āe uwi mo nder yenaande baaba maako Yo'as haa Ofra, wuro yim…ďe danygol Abi'ezer."
Judges8:33 ∆Āaawo maayde Gedeyon, Isra'iila'en pu…ó…óiti rewugo Ba'alji. ∆Āe laatini Ba'al-Berit …óowantee…óo ma…ď…ďe."
Judges8:34 ∆Āe ngejjiti Allah Jawmiraawo ma…ď…ďe, kisnu…óo …ďe juu…óe konne'en ma…ď…ďe taarii…ďe …ďe fuu."
Judges8:35 ∆Āe mbarjaaki saare Gedeyon bi'etee…óo boo Yerub-Ba'al fodde kuu…óe boo…ó…óe …óe o huuwani Isra'iila.
Judges9:1 Abimelek …ďii Yerub-Ba'al yehi haa Sikem ngam o yeewtida bee kaawu'en maako e yim…ďe saare maama maako fuu. O wi'i …ďe:
Judges9:2 ‚ÄúMbolwane ardii…ďe Sikem fuu, ∆īame …ďe: ∆äume …ďuranta on? Wor…ďe cappan…óe njowee…ói…óo, …ďi…ď…ďe Yerub-Ba'al fuu laamano on na malla go…ó…óo gooto tan? Ciftore min woni go…ó…óo danygol mon.‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:3 Kaawu'en maako mbolwani ardii…ďe Sikem bolle …óe'e fuu. ∆Āer…óe ma…ď…ďe ngayliti haa Abimelek, ngam …ďe numi: ‚ÄúO deer…óiraawo mee…óen.‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:4 ∆Āe ndokki mo ceede cardi cappan…óe jowee…ói…ói iw…óe haa suudu Ba'al-Berit. Bee ceede man Abimelek yo…ďi wor…ďe meere'en, elew…ďe …ďe tokki mo."
Judges9:5 O yehi haa saare baaba maako haa Ofra. Haa ton o mbari deer…óiraa…ďe maako, …ďi…ď…ďe Yerub-Ba'al cappan…óe njowee…ói…óo fuu, dow hayre woore. Walaa mo lutti, sey Yotam, gaajiijo Yerub-Ba'al, ngam o nyukki."
Judges9:6 Ardii…ďe Sikem e Bayti-Millo fuu moo…ďi haa lekki makki kommbi hayre darnaande nder Sikem, …ďe mba…ói Abimelek laamii…óo ma…ď…ďe."
Judges9:7 Yotam nani haala ka'a. O wa'i dow yeereere hooseere Gerisiima, o wooki bee semmbe, o wi'i: ‚ÄúOnon ardii…ďe Sikem, to on ngi…ói Allah nanana on, nane ko mi wi'ata on!"
Judges9:8 Nyannde feere le…ó…óe ndilli ngam …óe cu…ďa laamii…óo maaje. ∆äe mbi'i jaytunhi: Laata laamii…óo amin.
Judges9:9 Ammaa jaytunhi jaabi: On ngi…ói mi acca wa…óugo nebbam …óam Allah e yim…ďe ngerdi ngam haa mi somna hoore am bee laamanaago le…ó…óe go…ó…óe na?
Judges9:10 Nden le…ó…óe mbi'i ibbi: An war, laamana min."
Judges9:11 Ammaa ibbi jaabi: On ngi…ói mi acca rimugo …ďi…ď…ďe boo…ó…óe dakamje ngam haa mi somna hoore am bee laamanaago le…ó…óe go…ó…óe na?
Judges9:12 Nden le…ó…óe mbi'i inabohi: An war, laamana min."
Judges9:13 Ammaa inabohi jaabi: On ngi…ói mi acca wa…óugo inaboojam kesam ceynan…óam Allah e yim…ďe ngam haa mi somna hoore am bee laamanaago le…ó…óe go…ó…óe na?
Judges9:14 ∆Āaawo man le…ó…óe fuu mbi'i wumre gi'e: An war, laamana min."
Judges9:15 Wumre gi'e jaabi …óe: Fakat to on moytatam haa mi laato laamii…óo moo…óon, ngare njoo…óe les …óowdi am! Ammaa to on cali, yiite wurtoto diga wumre gi'e, nyaaman le…ó…óe hooseere Libanon cemmbi…ó…óe.‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:16 ‚ÄúJonta, nume boo…ó…óum! Nde on nga…ói Abimelek laamii…óo mon, on nga…ói bee gooŇčgaaku bilaa aybe na? On tokkake ko Yerub-Ba'al e saare muu…óum bee laa…ď…óum e on mbarjake saare maako deydey kuu…óe man na?"
Judges9:17 Baaba am ha…ďani on, o acci yoŇčki maako halka ngam hisnugo on juu…óe yim…ďe Madiyan."
Judges9:18 Ammaa onon on tuurtani saare maako hannde, on mbari …ďi…ď…ďe maako cappan…óe njowee…ói…óo dow hayre woore. On mba…ói Abimelek, …ďii kor…óo maako laamii…óo dow ardii…ďe Sikem, ngam o deer…óiraawo mon."
Judges9:19 To on kuuwani Yerub-Ba'al e saare mum hannde bee gooŇčgaaku e laa…ďeeŇčga …ďer…óe, nden kam ceyore Abimelek, kaŇčko boo o seyoro on."
Judges9:20 Ammaa to naa non, sey yiite wurto haa Abimelek, nge nyaama ardii…ďe Sikem e Bayti-Millo. Sey yiite wurto haa ardii…ďe Sikem e Bayti-Millo boo, nge nyaama Abimelek.‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:21 Nden Yotam doggi haa Biir, joo…ói ton, ngam haa o daayotira bee Abimelek, deer…óiiko."
Judges9:22 Abimelek …óowi Isra'iila duu…ďi tati.
Judges9:23 Allah neli ruuhu kalluŇčgu, ngu ummini jokkirgol hakkunde Abimelek e ardii…ďe Sikem. ∆Āe tuurtani mo."
Judges9:24 ∆äum wa…ói non ngam haa Abimelek …ďii Yerub-Ba'al, mbar…óo deer…óiraa…ďe muu…óum cappan…óe njowee…ói…óo e ardii…ďe Sikem, wallu…ďe mo nder mbar-hoore man, ke…ďa kiita zunuuba ∆īii∆īam muu…óum'en."
Judges9:25 Ardii…ďe Sikem kooci yim…ďe, mbaaltani Abimelek dow kooseeje. ∆Āe pasi koo moy caalotoo…óo kommbi ma…ď…ďe. Ammaa wo…ó…ďe anndini …óum Abimelek."
Judges9:26 Ga'al …ďii Obet wari haa Sikem, kaŇčko bee deer…óiraa…ďe maako. Ardii…ďe Sikem kooli mo."
Judges9:27 ∆Āe njehi haa gese inabooje ma…ď…ďe, …ďe te…ďi inabooje, …ďe …ďi…ó…ói …óe. Nden …ďe mba…ói juulde seyo. ∆Āe nasti suudu …óowantee…ďe ma…ď…ďe, …ďe nyaami, …ďe njari, …ďe naali Abimelek."
Judges9:28 Ga'al wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúAbimelek o moyjo? En …ďeye haa Sikem ngam haa en kuuwana mo? Naa o …ďii Yerub-Ba'al e naa o jo'ini Zebul hooreejo dow berniwol? Ammaa onon, kuuwane Hamor baaba Sikem! Walaa daliila haa en kuuwana Abimelek!"
Judges9:29 Moy wa…óata mi laato ardii…óo yim…ďe …ďe'e haa mi riiwa Abimelek? Nden o wi'i: Abimelek! ∆äu…ó…óin jama'aare konu ma, wurta, ha…ďu bee am!‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:30 Zebul, hooreejo berniwol nani bolle Ga'al …ďii Obet. O tikki masin."
Judges9:31 O neli nelaa…ďe haa Abimelek bee sirri haa …ďe mbi'a mo: ‚ÄúNdaa! Ga'al …ďii Obet e deer…óiraa…ďe muu…óum ngari jonta haa Sikem, …ďe …óon ummina …ďer…óe yim…ďe berniwol fuu haa …ďe tuurtane."
Judges9:32 Umma bee jemma kadi, an e yim…ďe ma, on mbaalto haa ladde."
Judges9:33 Fajiri to naaŇčge fu…ói, ukkane berniwol. To Ga'al e yim…ďe muu…óum ngurtake ngam ha…ďugo bee ma, wa…ó ko a yi…ói fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:34 Jemma maajum, Abimelek e yim…ďe muu…óum fuu cennditi ge…ďe nayi, …ďe njehi …ďe nyukki …ďadii…óum bee Sikem."
Judges9:35 Nde Ga'al wurti berniwol, dari haa nastirde dammugal berniwol, Abimelek e yim…ďe muu…óum ngurti diga nyukkor…óe muu…óum'en."
Judges9:36 Ga'al yi'i …ďe, wi'i Zebul: ‚ÄúNdaa, jama'aare …óon diirto geereeje kooseeje.‚ÄĚ Zebul jaabi mo: ‚ÄúA …óon yi'a …óowdi kooseeje bana yim…ďe non.‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:37 Ga'al wi'i fahin: ‚ÄúLaar, jama'aare …óon diirto hooseere Gerisiima, moo…ďre woore …óon wara dow laawol lekki makki ki wa…óoo…ďe hatti.‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:38 Zebul jaabi: ‚ÄúToy harakaaji ma go kadi? A wi'no: Abimelek o moyjo haa en kuuwana mo? Jonta ndaa jama'aare nde a yawino. Yah ha…ďu bee maare kadi!‚ÄĚ
Judges9:39 Ga'al ardi ardii…ďe Sikem, …ďe ngurti, …ďe ka…ďi bee Abimelek."
Judges9:40 Abimelek taasni mo e o doggi yeeso maako. ∆äuu…ó…ďe mbaraama haa yotti dammugal berniwol yim…ďe …óon mbaali.
Judges9:41 Abimelek dilli joo…ói haa Aruma, Zebul riiwi Ga'al e deer…óiraa…ďe muu…óum diga Sikem e o ha…ói …ďe lortaago ngam taa o joo…óo ton."
Judges9:42 JaŇčngo man ummaatoore Sikem wurti, yehi haa ladde, Abimelek nani …óum."
Judges9:43 O sennditi yim…ďe maako ge…ďe tati e …ďe mbaaltani …ďe haa ladde. Nde …ďe ngi'i yim…ďe ngurtake berniwol, …ďe ummi, …ďe ukkani …ďe."
Judges9:44 Yaake nde ge…ďe go…ó…óe …ói…ói ukkani yim…ďe haa kayweeji e …ďe …óon mbara …ďe, Abimelek e ye…ďre muu…óum boo njaaw…ói yahugo ndaro haa dammugal berniwol."
Judges9:45 ∆Āe nyalli ha…ďugo bee yim…ďe berniwol haa Abimelek nyaami ngol, mbari yim…ďe won…ďe nder maagol. Nden o yibbini ngol, o sammini mannda dow maagol."
Judges9:46 Nde ardii…ďe suudu towndu haa Sikem nani habaru ndu'u, …ďe fuu …ďe nasti suudu wasaandu les suudu lawru ma…ď…ďe Ba'al-Berit."
Judges9:47 Abimelek anndinaama …ďe fuu …ďe moo…ďtake ton.
Judges9:48 Ngam maajum o wa'i hooseere Calmon, kaŇčko e yim…ďe wondu…ďe bee maako. O hoo'i fe'irde, o fe'i lisal lekki, o wakki ngal. Nden o wi'i yim…ďe maako: ‚ÄúOn ngi'i ko mba…ómi. Law, mba…óe bana nii onon boo!‚ÄĚ"
Judges9:49 Koo moy ma…ď…ďe fe'i lisal lekki boo. Nden …ďe tokki Abimelek, …ďe mballini le…ó…óe man dow suudu wasaandu go, …ďe ku…ď…ďi …óe. Ardii…ďe suudu towndu haa Sikem fuu maayi, baakin ujineere, wor…ďe e rew…ďe."
Judges9:50 ∆Āaawo man Abimelek yehi Tebes. O saŇčngini yeeso berniwol man, o taari ngol, o nyaami ngol."
Judges9:51 Woodi suudu towndu semmbi…óndu haa caka berniwol. Wor…ďe, rew…ďe e ardii…ďe Tebes fuu ndoggi haa maaru. ∆Āe pali dammugal, …ďe mba'i dow soorowol."
Judges9:52 Abimelek wari gal suudu man, ha…ďi bee yim…ďe ton. O …ďaditi dammugal suudu man ngam o wula ndu bee yiite."
Judges9:53 Ammaa debbo feere sakkini hayre namrude dow hoore Abimelek, gumbal hoore maako fusi."
Judges9:54 Law o ewni suka doondoowo balmi maako, o wi'i mo: ‚ÄúLos kaafahi ma, mbaram, ngam taa …ďe mbi'a: Debbo mbari mo.‚ÄĚ Suka maako yuwi mo, o maayi."
Judges9:55 Nde Isra'iila'en ngi'i Abimelek maayi, …ďe kooti …ďe fuu koo moy haa saare mum."
Judges9:56 Bana nii Allah lortiniri halleende Abimelek dow hoore maako. ∆äum halleende nde Abimelek wa…ói baaba mum, ngam o mbari deer…óiraa…ďe maako cappan…óe njowee…ói…óo."
Judges9:57 Allah lortini boo halleende nde ardii…ďe Sikem mba…ói dow ko'e muu…óum'en. Bana nii naaloore Yotam …ďii Yerub-Ba'al gooŇč…óiri.
Judges10:1 ∆Āaawo maayde Abimelek, Toola …ďii Pu'a taaniraawo Doodo ummi ngam hisna Isra'iila. O go…ó…óo lenyol Issakar, joo…óii…óo haa Samiira nder kooseeje Efrayim."
Judges10:2 Toola laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila duu…ďi noogas e tati. Nden o maayi, …ďe uwi mo haa Samiira."
Judges10:3 ∆Āaawo maayde Toola, Ya'ir, go…ó…óo Gile'at, laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila duu…ďi noogas e …ói…ói."
Judges10:4 O woodi …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe cappan…óe tato wa'otoo…ďe bam…óe cappan…óe tati e …ďe ngoodi berniiji cappan…óe tati nder lesdi Gile'at. Haa hannde berniiji …ói mbi'ete gure Ya'ir.
Judges10:5 Nde Ya'ir maayi, …ďe uwi mo haa Kamon."
Judges10:6 Fahin Isra'iila'en mba…ói ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. ∆Āe ndewi Ba'alji e Asteraaji, non boo …óowantee…ďe Siriya'en e Sidoni'en e Mo'abi'en e Ammooni'en e Filisti'en. ∆Āe ngudini Jawmiraawo, …ďe cujidanaay mo."
Judges10:7 Ngam maajum Jawmiraawo tikkani Isra'iila'en, o hokki …ďe haa juu…óe Filisti'en e Ammooni'en."
Judges10:8 Duu…ďi sappo e joweetati …ďe …ďilli Isra'iila'en fuu won…ďe haa fuunaaŇčge maayo Urdun nder lesdi Amoori'en, nder Gile'at."
Judges10:9 Ammooni'en …óonno eera maayo Urdun boo ngam ha…ďugo bee le'i Yahuuda e Benyamin e Efrayim. Isra'iila'en nastino …ďillaare naawnde.
Judges10:10 ∆Āe tori Jawmiraawo ballal, …ďe mbi'i: ‚ÄúMin mba…ói hakke, yaa Allah amin, ngam min ngudini ma, min ndewi Ba'alji.‚ÄĚ"
Judges10:11 Jawmiraawo jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúYaake Misra'en e Amoori'en e Ammooni'en e Filisti'en e Sidoni'en e Amaleki'en e Ma'oni'en …ďilli on, on tori yam ballal. Kadi mi hisnaay on juu…óe ma…ď…ďe na?"
Judges10:12 
Judges10:13 Ammaa on ngudini yam, on ndewi …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe. Ngam maajum mi hisnataa on fahin."
Judges10:14 Ndille! Tore ballal haa …óowantee…ďe …ďe cu…ď…óon, kam…ďe …ďe kisna on …ďillaare mon.‚ÄĚ"
Judges10:15 Nden Isra'iila'en mbi'i Jawmiraawo: ‚ÄúMin mba…ói hakke. Wa…ó ko fottani ma, ammaa hisnu min nyalaade nde'e.‚ÄĚ"
Judges10:16 ∆Āe itti …óowantee…ďe janan…ďe caka ma…ď…ďe, …ďe njaggani Jawmiraawo. Ngam maajum o yurmini Isra'iila'en nder …ďillaare ma…ď…ďe."
Judges10:17 Jama'aare Ammooni'en taaskani konu. ∆Āe caŇčngini nder lesdi Gile'at. Isra'iila'en boo moo…ďi, …ďe caŇčngini haa Mispa."
Judges10:18 Jama'aare, waato maw…ďe Gile'at mbi'mbi'tiri: ‚ÄúMoy aartata ha…ďugo bee Ammooni'en? KaŇčko o laato hooreejo dow joo…óii…ďe nder Gile'at fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:1 Woodino konoowo cemmbi…ó…óo nder Gile'at, bi'etee…óo Yefta, …ďii debbo daakaareejo e baaba maako wi'ete Gile'at."
Judges11:2 Debbo Gile'at boo danyani mo …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe. Nde …ďe mawni, …ďe ndiiwi Yefta bee wi'ugo mo: ‚ÄúA walaa ge…óal maral nder maral saare baaba amin, ngam a …ďii debbo feere.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:3 Nden Yefta doggi daayii…óum diga deer…óiraa…ďe muu…óum, o joo…óoyi haa lesdi Tooba. Meere'en ngari moo…ďti kommbi maako e …ďe tokki mo, …ďe njahdi hippugo lesdi."
Judges11:4 Wakkati se…ó…óa …ďaawo…óon, Ammooni'en ngari honugo Isra'iila."
Judges11:5 Saa'i maajum, ndotti'en Gile'at njehi …óa…ď…ďitoygo Yefta nder lesdi Tooba."
Judges11:6 ∆Āe mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúWar, laata ardii…óo amin, en ka…ďa bee Ammooni'en.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:7 Yefta jaabi ndotti'en Gile'at: ‚ÄúNaane on nganyi yam haa on ndiiwi yam e saare baaba am. Ngam …óume ngar…óon jonta nde on nasti …ďillaare?‚ÄĚ
Judges11:8 Ndotti'en mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúGooŇčga min ngaylitake haa maa…óa jonta. Min ngi…ói a yahda bee amin, en ka…ďa bee Ammooni'en e a laato hooreejo joo…óii…ďe Gile'at fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:9 Yefta jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúTo on koori yam ngam ha…ďugo bee Ammooni'en, to Jawmiraawo hokki yam …ďe, nden kam mi laatoto hooreejo mon.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:10 Ndotti'en Gile'at mbi'i Yefta: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo woni ceedoowo hakkunde mee…óen, min mba…óan ko a wi'i min.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:11 Nden Yefta yahdi bee ma…ď…ďe. Yim…ďe Gile'at mba…ói mo hooreejo e ardii…óo konu muu…óum'en. Yefta wolwi haala muu…óum fuu yeeso Jawmiraawo haa Mispa.
Judges11:12 ∆Āaawo man Yefta neli nelaa…ďe haa laamii…óo Ammooni'en, o wi'i: ‚ÄúKo yaali yam bee maa…óa? Ngam …óume ngar…óa ha…ďugo bee am nder lesdi am?‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:13 Laamii…óo Ammooni'en jaabi nelaa…ďe Yefta: ‚ÄúWakkati Isra'iila'en ngurti lesdi Misra, …ďe nyaami lesdi am, diga maayo Arnon haa yotti Yabbok e Urdun. Lornan min ge…ďe les…óe …óe jonta bee hakkiilo ma!‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:14 Fahin Yefta neli nelaa…ďe haa laamii…óo Ammooni'en,"
Judges11:15 ngam wi'ugo mo: ‚ÄúIsra'iila'en nyaamaay lesdi Mo'ab e ndi Ammooni'en.
Judges11:16 Ngam nde …ďe ummi lesdi Misra, …ďe caali gal ladde hamaadaare haa yotti maayo Maaliya, nden …ďe ndilli Kaades."
Judges11:17 Diga ton, …ďe neli nelaa…ďe haa laamii…óo Edoom ngam ∆īamugo mo duŇčayeere saalaago nder lesdi maako. Ammaa laamii…óo man yerdanaaki …ďe. Isra'iila'en ∆īami boo laamii…óo Mo'ab, kaŇčko boo o sali. Nden …ďe njoo…ói haa Kaades."
Judges11:18 ∆Āaawo man …ďe tokkitini jahaaŇčgal ma…ď…ďe gal ladde hamaadaare, …ďe mbiddi lesdi Edoom e lesdi Mo'ab, …ďe ngari diga fuunaaŇčge gal lesdi Mo'ab. ∆Āe caŇčngini ga…óa maayo Arnon, …ďe nastaay lesdi Mo'abi'en, Arnon woni keerol lesdi man."
Judges11:19 Diga ton, Isra'iila'en neli nelaa…ďe haa Sihon, laamii…óo Amoori'en haa Hesbon, …ďe mbi'a mo: Accu min caalo nder lesdi ma haa min njotto lesdi amin."
Judges11:20 Ammaa Sihon hoolaaki Isra'iila'en, o duŇčanaaki …ďe …ďe caalo nder lesdi maako. O moo…ďti yim…ďe maako fuu, …ďe caŇčngini haa Yahas. Nden o ha…ďi bee Isra'iila'en."
Judges11:21 Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila'en hokki Sihon e jama'aare konu mum fuu haa Isra'iila'en, …ďe njaali …ďe. Isra'iila'en mari lesdi ndi Amoori'en njoo…óino fuu,"
Judges11:22 diga waadiwol Arnon haa yotti maayo Yabbok e diga ladde hamaadaare gal fuunaaŇčge haa yotti Urdun.
Judges11:23 ∆äum Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila'en nyaami lesdi Amoori'en yeeso Isra'iila ummaatoore muu…óum, an a yi…ói ja…ďtugo ndi na?"
Judges11:24 Naa an mari lesdi koo ndiye ndi Kemos …óowantee…óo ma marni ma na? Bana non, minin boo min maran lesdi koo ndiye ndi Jawmiraawo Allah amin riiwi yim…ďe maari yeeso amin, min nyaami ndi."
Judges11:25 A …óon tammo a …ďuri Balak, …ďii Cippor, laamii…óo Mo'ab semmbe na? KaŇčko ma o mee…óaay jokkirgo bee Isra'iila, ummaatoore Allah e o mee…óaay ha…ďugo bee ma…ď…ďe boo."
Judges11:26 Duu…ďi teeme…ó…óe tati (300) Isra'iila'en …óonno njoo…ói haa Hesbon e gure maagol, haa Aro'er e gure maagol, non boo haa berniiji haa fomoonde maayo Arnon fuu. Diga saa'i man, ngam …óume on koocitaay les…óe …óe haa juu…óe ma…ď…ďe?"
Judges11:27 Aa'a, min mi wa…óaay ma aybe sam, ammaa an a …óon wa…óanammi kallu…óum, ngam a …óon …óa…ď…ďa ha…ďre bee am. Jawmiraawo woni kiitoowo, sey o hiito hannde hakkunde Isra'iila'en e Ammooni'en!‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:28 Ammaa laamii…óo Ammooni'en ja…ďaay bolle Yefta …óe o neldi mo.
Judges11:29 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo wari dow Yefta, o saali nder lesdi Gile'at e Manassa, nden o dilli Mispa nder lesdi Gile'at, o saali nder lesdi Ammooni'en."
Judges11:30 Yefta togani Jawmiraawo togayeere, o wi'i: ‚ÄúTo a hokki yam Ammooni'en …ďe'e,"
Judges11:31 to mi jaalake …ďe, mi warti jam, mi lii'ante koo moy aarti wurtaago diga saare am ngam ja…ď…ďaago yam bana guleteeŇčga.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:32 Nden o saali keerol Ammooni'en ngam o ha…ďa bee ma…ď…ďe. Jawmiraawo hokki mo …ďe.
Judges11:33 O jaali …ďe diga Aro'er haa yotti Minnit, berniiji noogas, haa yotti Abel-Keramiima boo. Isra'iila'en mbari Ammooni'en …óuu…ó…ďe masin. Bana nii Ammooni'en leestiri yeeso Isra'iila'en."
Judges11:34 Nde Yefta warti saare mum haa Mispa, ndaa, …ďiyiiko debbo wurti ngam ja…ď…ďaago mo, o …óon wama, o …óon fiya mbaggu. O bajjo Yefta, walaa …ďi…ó…óo feere, koo gorko, koo debbo."
Judges11:35 Nde Yefta yi'i mo, o seeki limce maako, o wi'i: ‚ÄúKayto, …ďiŇčngel am! A nastini yam boneeji naaw…ói masin! Ngam …óume laatii…óa caka torran…ďe …ďernde am? Min mi togani Jawmiraawo togayeere, mi waawataa faasititgo!‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:36 ∆Āi…ó…óo maako jaabi mo: ‚ÄúBaaba am, to a toganake Jawmiraawo togayeere, wa…óam ko togii…óa, Jawmiraawo hokki ma a waato konne'en ma Ammooni'en.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:37 Nden o wi'i baaba maako: ‚ÄúMi …óon toro ma huunde woore tan: Accam lebbi …ói…ói, mi yaha dow kooseeje, min e sappiraa…ďe am, min mboya paanyaaku am, nde nii mi anndaa gorko.‚ÄĚ"
Judges11:38 Yefta wi'i: Yah kadi! Nden o duŇčani mo dillugo joo…óo lebbi …ói…ói. O yehi, kaŇčko e sappiraa…ďe maako, o woyi paanyaaku maako dow kooseeje."
Judges11:39 Nde lebbi …ói…ói timmi, o warti haa baaba maako. KaŇčko o wa…ói mo ko o togani Jawmiraawo. Paanyo oo mee…óaay anndugo gorko. Diga wakkati man al'aada ka fu…ó…ói nder Isra'iila."
Judges11:40 Hitaande fuu nyal…óe nayi …ďi…ď…ďe rew…ďe Isra'iila'en njahata woyugo …ďii Yefta mo Gile'at.
Judges12:1 Yim…ďe Efrayim moo…ďti, …ďe eeri maayo Urdun, …ďe njehi haa Safon. ∆Āe mbi'i Yefta: ‚ÄúKoni a yehi a ha…ďoyi bee Ammooni'en, ammaa a ewnaaki min haa en njahda? Min njahan min ngula ma bee suudu ma fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Judges12:2 Yefta jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúMin e yim…ďe am min mba…ói ha…ďre saatunde bee Ammooni'en. Min ewni on, ammaa on kisnaay yam juu…óe ma…ď…ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Judges12:3 Nde ngi'mi on ngi…óaa wallugo yam, mi taaskani maayugo, mi yehi, mi ha…ďi bee Ammooni'en. Jawmiraawo hokki yam …ďe. Kadi, ngam …óume ngar…óon honugo yam hannde?"
Judges12:4 Yefta moo…ďti wor…ďe Gile'at fuu, ha…ďi bee wor…ďe Efrayim, jaali …ďe. Yim…ďe Efrayim mbi'no: ‚ÄúOnon yim…ďe Gile'at, onon on yim…ďe Efrayim doggu…ďe lesdi Efrayim ngam hisnugo ko'e moo…óon haa lesdi Efrayim e Manassa.‚ÄĚ"
Judges12:5 Yim…ďe Gile'at njoo…ói haa eeror…óe maayo Urdun yahugo lesdi Efrayim. To go…ó…óo Efrayim doggu…óo wari wi'i: Accee…óam mi eero, wor…ďe Gile'at …óon ∆īama mo: ‚ÄúA go…ó…óo Efrayim na?‚ÄĚ To o wi'i: ‚ÄúAa'a‚ÄĚ,"
Judges12:6 …ďe mbi'a mo: ‚ÄúWi': Cibbolet!‚ÄĚ To o wi'i: ‚ÄúSibbolet‚ÄĚ, ngam o waawaay wolwugo …óum laa…ď…óum, …ďe naŇčnga mo, …ďe mbara mo ton haa eerorde Urdun. Saa'i maajum wor…ďe Efrayim ujine cappan…óe nayo e …ói…óo (42.000) mbaraama."
Judges12:7 Bana nii Yefta laatori alkaaliijo Isra'iila duu…ďi joweego. Nden o maayi, …ďe uwi mo nder berniwol gootol caka berniiji Gile'at."
Judges12:8 ∆Āaawo maayde Yefta, Ibsaan mo Baytilaama laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila."
Judges12:9 O woodi …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe cappan…óe tato e …ďi…ď…ďe rew…ďe cappan…óe tato. O te'ni …ďi…ď…ďe maako rew…ďe haa wor…ďe …ďe ngonaay danygol maako. O te'ani …ďi…ď…ďe maako wor…ďe boo rew…ďe …ďe ngonaay danygol maako. O alkaaliijo Isra'iila duu…ďi jowee…ói…ói.
Judges12:10 Nden o maayi, …ďe uwi mo haa Baytilaama."
Judges12:11 ∆Āaawo maayde Ibsaan, Elon mo lenyol Zabulon laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila, duu…ďi sappo."
Judges12:12 Nden o maayi, …ďe uwi mo haa Eloon haa Ayyalon nder lesdi Zabulon."
Judges12:13 ∆Āaawo maayde Elon, Abdon …ďii Hillel, go…ó…óo Piraton laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila."
Judges12:14 O woodi …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe cappan…óe nayo e taaniraa…ďe wor…ďe cappan…óe tato, …ďe wa'ii…ďe bam…óe cappan…óe jowee…ói…ói. Abdon …ďii Hillel laati alkaaliijo Isra'iila duu…ďi joweetati."
Judges12:15 Nden o maayi, …ďe uwi mo haa Piraton nder lesdi Efrayim, nder lesdi kooseeje Amaleki'en."
Judges13:1 Fahin Isra'iila'en mba…ói ko fottanaay Jawmiraawo. Ngam maajum o hokki …ďe haa juu…óe Filisti'en duu…ďi cappan…óe nayi.
Judges13:2 Saa'i man woodi go…ó…óo lenyol Dan, iw…óo Cor'a mo innde mum Manooha. Debbo maako dimaro, o mee…óaay danyugo."
Judges13:3 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo waŇčgani debbo oo, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúMi anndi a mee…óaay danyugo …ďiŇčngel ngam a dimaro. Ammaa jonta a reedan, a danyan …ďi…ó…óo gorko."
Judges13:4 Reenta diga jonta, taa yar inaboojam malla nguykinoojam ngo…ó…óam, taa nyaam karam…óum boo,"
Judges13:5 ngam reedu ndu e …ďesnuki …ďi…ó…óo ma oo. Taa la…ďu gaasa hoore maako sam, ngam o cenaa…óo Allah diga o danyaaka. KaŇčko fu…ó…óata hisnugo Isra'iila'en e juu…óe Filisti'en.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:6 Debbo nasti saare, wi'i gorum: ‚ÄúGo…ó…óo Allah wari haa am. Bana mi yi'iri mo nii, go…ó…óo wi'an o malaa'ikaajo Allah, o kulnii…óo masin. Mi ∆īamaay mo haa o iwoy, o anndinaay yam innde maako boo."
Judges13:7 O wi'i yam a reedan, a danyan …ďi…ó…óo gorko. O umri yam taa mi yara inaboojam malla nguykinoojam ngo…ó…óam, taa mi nyaama karam…óum, ngam …ďi…ó…óo oo laatoto cenaa…óo ngam Allah diga o siwaa danyeego haa yotto maayde maako.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:8 Manooha tori Jawmiraawo: ‚ÄúYaa Jawmiraawo, go…ó…óo Allah mo nel…óa, accu o wara haa amin fahin, o yecca min ko min mba…óanta …ďiŇčngel danyeteeŇčgel.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:9 Allah ja…ďi tornde Manooha nde'e, malaa'ikaajo maako wari fahin haa debbo Manooha, saa'i debbo …óon joo…ói haa ngesa. Goriiko wondaay bee maako,"
Judges13:10 ngam maajum o yaaw…ói, o wi'i mo: ‚ÄúNdaa, go…ó…óo gar…óo haa am nyannde go, waŇčgani yam fahin.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:11 Manooha ummi, tokki debbo muu…óum haa go…ó…óo man, o ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúAn wolwani debbo am na?‚ÄĚ O jaabi: ‚ÄúOoho, …óum min.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:12 Manooha wi'i: Boo…ó…óum. To bolle ma ngooŇč…ói, umrooje …óeye min tokkoto ko laarani …ďiŇčngel ngel? ∆äume min nga…óanta ngel?"
Judges13:13 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo jaabi Manooha: ‚ÄúSey debbo ma daayo ko mi limtani mo fuu:
Judges13:14 Taa o metta ko iwi haa inabohi fuu, taa o yara inaboojam malla njaram nguykinoojam, taa o nyaama karam…óum. Sey o hakkilana umrooje am fuu boo…ó…óum.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:15 Nden Manooha wi'i malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo: ‚ÄúReenu se…ó…óa min nyaancane jawgel mbeewa.‚ÄĚ
Judges13:16 Malaa'ikaajo jaabi: ‚ÄúKoo to mi reeni, mi nyaamataa nyaamdu ndu a taaskantam. Ammaa to a yi…ói hokkugo jawgel man, lii'ana ngel Jawmiraawo guleteeŇčgel.‚ÄĚ Manooha faamaayno …óum malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo."
Judges13:17 Manooha wi'i mo: ‚ÄúAnndin min innde ma ngam haa min teddina ma to bolle ma ngooŇč…ói.‚ÄĚ
Judges13:18 Malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo jaabi: ‚ÄúNgam …óume ∆īamata innde am? Nde kaayeefiire.‚ÄĚ
Judges13:19 Manooha hoo'i jawgel mbeewa e dokkal nyaamdu, lii'ani …óum Jawmiraawo dow tapaare. Jawmiraawo wa…ói kaayeefi yaake Manooha e debbo muu…óum …óon ndaara."
Judges13:20 Yaake …óemŇčgal yiite ummi haa hirsirde man dilli dow, Manooha e debbo mum ngi'i malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo …óon lorto haa asama nder …óemŇčgal yiite. Nden …ďe cujidi."
Judges13:21 ∆Āe meetaay yi'ugo malaa'ikaajo man. Manooha faami …óum malaa'ikaajo Jawmiraawo.
Judges13:22 Manooha wi'i debbo mum: ‚ÄúFakat en maayan, ngam en ngi'i Allah.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:23 Ammaa debbo maako wi'i mo: ‚ÄúTo Jawmiraawo …óa…ď…ďino mbarugo en, o ja…ďataano nguleteeŇčga e dokkal nyaamdu haa juu…óe men, o yi'nataano en kuuje …óe'e fuu, o anndintaano en haala ka boo jonta.‚ÄĚ"
Judges13:24 Debbo Manooha danyi …ďi…ó…óo gorko, inndi mo Samson. ∆ĀiŇčngel man mawni, Jawmiraawo barki…óini ngel."

Judges14:1 Nyalaade wo…ónde Samson yehi Timna, ton o yi'i paanyo debbo Filistiijo."
Judges14:2 O hooti, o wi'i baaba e daada maako: ‚ÄúCaka Filisti'en haa Timna mi yi'i paanyo debbo, te'anee…óam mo.‚ÄĚ"
Judges14:3 Saaro'en maako ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúWalaa paanyo debbo nder banndiraa…ďe ma malla nder ummaatoore mee…óen na? Koni …óa…ď…ďata debbo haa Filisti'en saadooni'en …ďe'e?‚ÄĚ Samson jaabi baaba muu…óum: ‚ÄúKaŇčko fottani yam, te'anam mo!‚ÄĚ"
Judges14:4 Saaro'en Samson anndaa nii …óum Jawmiraawo wa…ói yelo ngo nder …ďi…ó…óo ma…ď…ďe haa o he…ďa dabare ha…ďugo bee Filisti'en. Ngam saa'i maajum Filisti'en …óon laamano Isra'iila'en.
Judges14:5 Nde Samson e saaro'en muu…óum …óon njaha Timna, …ďe …óon tokki laawol kommbi gese inabooje Timna, mbarooga wurti bee ubbaaŇčgo, fotti bee Samson."
Judges14:6 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo naŇčngi Samson, o naŇčngi mbarooga man o sampiti nga bee juu…óe cooke, bana go…ó…óo sampitirta jawgel. Ammaa o wi'aay saaro'en maako ko o wa…ói."
Judges14:7 Nden Samson yehi, wolidi bee paanyo debbo go, paanyo boo fottani mo."
Judges14:8 Nyal…óe se…ó…óa …ďaawo…óon o yehi fahin ngam haa o …ďaŇčga mo. O seli laawol haa o laara caa…óŇčgu mbarooga go. O yi'i udumre nyaaki e njumri …óon nder caa…óŇčgu man.
Judges14:9 O hoo'i njumri bee juŇčngo maako, o …óon nyaama saa'i o …óon yaha dow laawol. O yehi haa saaro'en maako, o hokki …ďe, kam…ďe boo …ďe nyaami. Ammaa o yeccaay …ďe o njumti njumri man haa caa…óŇčgu mbarooga."
Judges14:10 Baaba Samson yehi haa saare paanyo debbo go, Samson boo taaski nyaamduuji …ďaŇčgal ton, bana sukaa…ďe mboowi wa…óugo."
Judges14:11 Nde Filisti'en ngi'i Samson, …ďe neli sukaa…ďe cappan…óe tato ngam haa …ďe ngonda bee maako."
Judges14:12 Samson wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúMi wa…óanan on annditanamwol. To on ke…ďti ngol, on annditini yam ngol nder nyal…óe juulde jowee…ói…ói, nden kam mi hokkan on toggooje cappan…óe tati e ngapaleeji cappan…óe tati."
Judges14:13 Ammaa to on mbaawaay waŇčginango yam ngol, nden kam koo moy moo…óon hokkammi toggoore e ngapaleewol.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe njaabi mo: ‚ÄúWa…ó annditanamwol ma haa min nana ngol.‚ÄĚ"
Judges14:14 Samson wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúNyaamdu wurtake haa nyaamoojum. Dakam wurtake haa cemmbi…ó…óum.‚ÄĚ ∆äume …óum yi…ói wi'go? Haa ragare nyal…óe tati sukaa…ďe ke…ďtaay ko saawi nder annditanamwol man tawon.
Judges14:15 Nyannde jowee…ói…óawre …ďe mbi'i debbo Samson: ‚Äú∆≥oyru gorko ma, haa o waŇčginana min ko saawi nder annditanamwol man, to naa non min ngulete, an e saare baaba ma. Malla on ewni min ngam haa on ngartira min talaka'en?‚ÄĚ"
Judges14:16 Debbo Samson yehi bee bojji haa goriiko, o wi'i mo: ‚ÄúA yi…óaa yam, a …óon wanyammi! A wa…óani ummaatoore am annditanamwol, ammaa a anndinaay yam ko saawi nder maagol.‚ÄĚ Samson jaabi mo: ‚ÄúKoo saaro'en am ma mi anndinaay …ďe …óum. Ngam …óume sey mi anndine …óum an?‚ÄĚ"

Judges14:19 Nden Ruuhu Jawmiraawo nasti nder Samson, o jippi haa Askalon. O mbari ton wor…ďe cappan…óe tato, o hooci limce ma…ď…ďe, o hokki …óe he…ďtu…ďe annditanamwol go. Nden o lorti haa baaba maako, o …óon heewi tikkere."
Judges14:20 Nden …ďe te'ni debbo maako haa waloojo maako.
Judges15:1 ∆Āaawo se…ó…óa, wakkati wa'go alkamaari, Samson yilli debbo muu…óum. O wari bee jawgel mbeewa, o wi'i baaba debbo: ‚ÄúHaa mi nasta suudu debbo am.‚ÄĚ Ammaa baaba debbo maako ha…ói mo nastugo,"

Judges15:13 ∆Āe njaabi mo: ‚ÄúNonnon, ammaa min ka…ď…ďete, min ndokke haa juu…óe ma…ď…ďe. Minin min mbarataa ma.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe ka…ď…ďi mo bee …ďoggi kesi …ói…ói, bana nii …ďe ngurtiniri mo lowol tapaare."

Judges16:27 Suudu man heewi wor…ďe e rew…ďe, laamii…ďe Filisti'en njowo fuu …óon ton, dow soorowol boo yim…ďe ujine tato (3.000). ∆Āe fuu …ďe …óon ndaara no Samson seyniri …ďe."
