1Samuel11:8 Sawulu laari …ďe haa Bezek, limi …ďe. Woodi yim…ďe Isra'iila ujine teeme…ó…óe tato (300.000) e yim…ďe Yahuuda ujine cappan…óe tato (30.000)."
1Samuel11:9 ∆Āe umri nelaa…ďe Yaabes: ‚ÄúMbi'e yim…ďe berniwol mon: JaŇčngo, caka nyalawma, on kisan.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe njehi, …ďe ngecci …óum yim…ďe Yaabes. Kam…ďe …ďe ceyi."
1Samuel11:10 ∆Āe mbi'i Nahas: ‚ÄúJaŇčngo min ngurtoto haa on mba…óa min ko fottani on.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel11:11 JaŇčngo maajum Sawulu senndi yim…ďe mum moo…ďe tati. Subaha …ďe ukkani saŇčngeere Ammooni'en. ∆Āe mbari Ammooni'en haa yotti caka nyalawma. Luttu…ďe ndoggi, caŇčkiti gooto gooto."
1Samuel11:12 Nde ha…ďre timmi, Isra'iila'en mbi'i Samuyila: ‚ÄúToy salii…ďe Sawulu laamano en? Accide min bee ma…ď…ďe haa min mbara …ďe.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel11:13 Ammaa Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúWalaa mbaretee…óo hannde! Ngam hannde Jawmiraawo hisni Isra'iila.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel11:14 Samuyila wi'i yim…ďe: ‚ÄúNgare, njahden haa Gilgal, en tabitina laamu ton.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel11:15 Yim…ďe fuu njehi haa Gilgal. Yeeso Jawmiraawo …ďe mba…ói Sawulu laamii…óo. KaŇčko e Isra'iila'en fuu …ďe ceyi masin. ∆Āe lii'ani Jawmiraawo kirsetee…ói ngam kawtal ma…ď…ďe bee maako.
1Samuel12:1 Nden Samuyila wi'i Isra'iila'en fuu: ‚ÄúNdaa, mi wa…ói ko on tori yam, mi wa…óani on laamii…óo."
1Samuel12:2 Ndaa mo jonta yeeso moo…óon ngam o ardo on. Min kam mi ndottiijo, mar…óo dandanndi. ∆Āi…ď…ďe am …óon ngondi bee moo…óon. Mi huuwi yeeso moo…óon diga nderkaaku am haa wargo hannde."
1Samuel12:3 Ndaa yam …óo. Ceedanee…óam yeeso Jawmiraawo e laamii…óo mo o su…ďi to mi wa…ói aybewol koo ngole. Nagge moy koocumi? Malla wamnde moy koocumi? Moy mba…ómi rikici? Moy toonyiimi? Haa juŇčngo moy nja…ďmi ceede ngam sottingo gooŇčga? Mbi'e …óum jonta, haa mi hokkita on.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel12:4 Isra'iila'en mbi'i: ‚ÄúA wa…óaay min rikici, a toonyaay min, a ja…ďaay koo …óume haa juŇčngo koo moy.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel12:5 Samuyila wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo e laamii…óo mo o su…ďi laati seedoo…ďe, on tawaay aybewol koo ngole haa am.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe fuu …ďe mbi'i: ‚ÄúNonnon nii!‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel12:6 Samuyila wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúTo non kam, sey mi wullo on yeeso Jawmiraawo. Sey mi siftinora on kuu…óe boo…ó…óe …óe Jawmiraawo huuwani on, onon e kaakiraa…ďe mon. Nde Yaakubu e yim…ďe saare mum ngari haa Misra, nde kaakiraa…ďe mon tori Jawmiraawo ballal, saa'i maajum o nelani …ďe Muusa e Haruna. Bee juu…óe wor…ďe …ói…óo …ďe'e o wurtiniri …ďe lesdi Misra, o hokki …ďe joonde nder lesdi ndi'i."
1Samuel12:7 
1Samuel12:8 
1Samuel12:9 Ammaa kam…ďe …ďe ngejjiti ko Allah Jawmiraawo wa…óani …ďe, …ďe acci mo. Ngam maajum o hokki …ďe haa juu…óe Filisti'en e laamii…óo Mo'abi'en e Sisera, maw…óo honoo…ďe berniwol Hacoor. ∆Āe fuu …ďe ka…ďi bee kaakiraa…ďe mon, …ďe njaali …ďe."
1Samuel12:10 ∆Āe tori Jawmiraawo ballal, …ďe mbi'i: Min mba…ói hakke, yaa Jawmiraawo, ngam min ngudini ma, min ndewi suuraaji Ba'al e Astarot. Ammaa jonta hisnu min juu…óe konne'en amin, nden kam min njagganto ma an feere ma."
1Samuel12:11 Jawmiraawo nelani on Yerub-Ba'al, Bedan, Yefta e Samuyila. O hisni on juu…óe konne'en mon taarii…ďe on fuu, haa on njoo…óo bee jam e de'ere."
1Samuel12:12 Ammaa nde ngi'…óon Nahas, laamii…óo Ammooni'en …óon wara ngam ha…ďugo bee moo…óon, on mbi'i yam: Sey min ke…ďa laamii…óo. On ngejjiti Allah Jawmiraawo mon woni laamii…óo mon."
1Samuel12:13 Ndaa laamii…óo mo …óa…ď…ďu…óon, mo cu…ď…óon, Jawmiraawo darni mo dow moo…óon."
1Samuel12:14 Kadi, teddine Jawmiraawo, njaggane mo, …óowtane umrooje maako, taa luute …óe sam, tokke mo, onon e laamii…óo mon fuu. Nden kam on njoo…óoto jam."
1Samuel12:15 Ammaa to on nananaay Jawmiraawo, to on …óowtanaaki umrooje maako, nden kam o honan on bana o honno kaakiraa…ďe mon."
1Samuel12:16 Jonta kam ndare boo…ó…óum, ndaare kaayeefiwol ngol Jawmiraawo wa…óata yeeso moo…óon."
1Samuel12:17 Naa jonta …óum wakkati codol alkamaari na? Bee non fuu mi toroto Jawmiraawo, kaŇčko boo o neldan diggaali e iyeende. To …óum wa…ói, on anndan no ka…ď…ďotiral moo…óon …óa…ď…ďugo laamii…óo halliri yeeso Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel12:18 Nden Samuyila tori Jawmiraawo. Nyalaade maajum Jawmiraawo neldi diggaali e iyeende. Yim…ďe fuu kuli Jawmiraawo e Samuyila masin.
1Samuel12:19 ∆Āe mbi'i Samuyila: ‚ÄúUseni, torana min Allah Jawmiraawo ma, ngam taa min maaya. Fakat min mar…ďe hakke, dow maajum fuu min …ďesdi halleende bee …óa…ď…ďugo laamii…óo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel12:20 Samuyila jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúTaa kule. On mba…ói aybe fakat, ammaa tokke Jawmiraawo jonta, njaggane mo bee …ďernde woore."
1Samuel12:21 Taa ndewe labbi, ngam kanji …ói meereeji, …ói nafataa, …ói kisnataa on boo."
1Samuel12:22 Ammaa Jawmiraawo, ngam daliila innde mum mawnde, accataa yim…ďe mum. ∆äum fottani mo o wa…óa on ummaatoore maako."
1Samuel12:23 Min boo, taa mi wa…óa aybe dow Jawmiraawo, mi acca do'anaago on. Koo yeeso boo mi anndinan on ko foti, ko woo…ói."
1Samuel12:24 Sey on teddina Jawmiraawo, on …óowtano mo bee gooŇčga e …ďernde woore. Ciftore kuu…óe maw…óe …óe o huuwani on."
1Samuel12:25 Ammaa to on tokkake wa…óugo halleende, nden kam on kalkan, onon e laamii…óo mon fuu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel13:1 Sawulu woodi duu…ďi ‚Ä¶ saa'i o laamo. O laamani Isra'iila'en duu…ďi …ói…ói.
1Samuel13:2 Sawulu su…ďi wor…ďe ujine tato (3.000) nder Isra'iila'en, wi'i luttu…ďe …ďe koota. Ujine …ói…óo …óon ngondi bee maako haa Mikmas e dow kooseeje kommbi Baytila. Ujineere boo …óon ngondi bee Yonatan, …ďiyiiko, haa Gibiya-Benyamin."
1Samuel13:3 Yonatan mbari aynoo…ďe Filisti'en haa Geba, Filisti'en nani habaru maajum. Sawulu umri fuufugo luwal konu nder lesdi fuu, wi'i: ‚ÄúSey IbraniŇčke'en fuu nana …óum!‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel13:4 Isra'iila'en fuu nani haala man, mbi'i: ‚ÄúSawulu mbari aynoo…ďe Filisti'en, ummini nganyŇčgu ma…ď…ďe.‚ÄĚ Ngam maajum wor…ďe Isra'iila fuu moo…ďti haa Sawulu haa Gilgal."
1Samuel13:5 Filisti'en boo moo…ďti ngam ha…ďre bee Isra'iila'en. ∆Āe ngoodi mootaaji pucci ujine cappan…óe tati (30.000), wa'ii…ďe pucci ujine njoweego (6.000) e honoo…ďe wo…ó…ďe …óuu…ó…ďe bana njaareendi maayo. ∆Āe ngari, …ďe caŇčngini haa Mikmas, haa fuunaaŇčge Baytawiina."
1Samuel13:6 Nde Isra'iila'en ngi'i …ďe …óon yeeso joote ngam konne'en …ďaditi …ďe masin, …ďe nyukki nder lowi, nder kooraaje, caka tapaaje, nder cuu…ói gasaa…ói e nder …ďulli."
1Samuel13:7 Wo…ó…ďe ma…ď…ďe ndoggi haa ga…óa maayo Urdun, haa lesdi Gada e Gile'at. Ammaa Sawulu …óonno haa Gilgal, yim…ďe wondu…ďe bee maako ndiwni ngam kulol."
1Samuel13:8 Samuyila wi'no mo o reena nyal…óe jowee…ói…ói. Ammaa nde Samuyila waraay tawon, yim…ďe pu…ó…ói saŇčkitaago."
1Samuel13:9 Ngam maajum Sawulu umri waddugo dabbaaji ngam nguleteeŇčga e kirsetee…ói ngam kawtal yim…ďe, nden o lii'i nguleteeŇčga."
1Samuel13:10 Nde o timmini lii'aago nguleteeŇčga, Samuyila wari. Sawulu yehi haa fotta bee maako, hoofna mo."
1Samuel13:11 Samuyila ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúKo mba…ó…óa …óo?‚ÄĚ Sawulu jaabi: ‚ÄúYim…ďe pu…ó…ói saŇčkitaago ngam a waraay nder saa'iire ta'aande. Filisti'en boo …óon moo…ďi haa Mikmas.
1Samuel13:12 Ngam maajum mi numi: Jonta Filisti'en ukkanto yam haa Gilgal, min boo mi toraaki yerduye Jawmiraawo tawon. Kanjum mi ti…ó…óini …ďernde am, mi lii'ani mo nguleteeŇčga.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel13:13 Samuyila wi'i mo: ‚ÄúKay, a wa…ói faataare! Koni a …óowtanaaki umroore Allah Jawmiraawo maa…óa? O tabitinanno laamu ma dow Isra'iila haa foroy,"
1Samuel13:14 ammaa jonta ngu tabitittaa. Jawmiraawo su…ďani hoore mum go…ó…óo …ďur…óo fottango mo dow maa…óa, haa o wa…óa mo ardii…óo yim…ďe maako ngam a …óowtanaaki ko Jawmiraawo umri.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel13:15 Nden Samuyila ummi haa Gilgal, yehi haa Gibiya nder lesdi Benyamin. Sawulu limi yim…ďe mum, …ďe …óon baakin wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe njoweego."
1Samuel13:16 Sawulu e Yonatan …ďiyum e wondu…ďe bee muu…óum'en caŇčngini haa Geba nder lesdi Benyamin. Ammaa Filisti'en …óon caŇčngini haa Mikmas.
1Samuel13:17 Filisti'en neli moo…ďe honoo…ďe tati ngam wilugo e ja…ďtugo: Moo…ďre arannde yehi haa Ofra nder lesdi Su'al,"
1Samuel13:18 moo…ďre …ói…óawre haa Baytihurun e moo…ďre tata…ďre boo haa kooseeje dow Waadiwol-Pobbi haa sera ladde.
1Samuel13:19 Wakkati maajum walaa kilaajo nder lesdi Isra'iila fuu, ngam Filisti'en ngi…óaano Isra'iila'en mba…óa kaafaaje malla labbe."
1Samuel13:20 ∆äum dooli Isra'iila'en yahugo haa Filisti'en ngam welnugo baaneeje e gasir…óe e pe'ir…óe e baf…ói.
1Samuel13:21 Ngam welnugo fe'irde malla ngam wo'itingo se…ďatto sawru gaynaako, sey …ďe njo…ďa suleyre. Ngam welnugo baaneewo malla wafdu boo suleyje …ói…ói."
1Samuel13:22 Ngam maajum nyalaade ha…ďre walaa kaafahi malla labbo haa juu…óe Isra'iila'en, sey Sawulu e Yonatan …ďiyum ngoodi balmi, kam…ďe tan."
1Samuel13:23 Filisti'en neli moo…ďre honoo…ďe ngam haa …ďe ayna laawol Mikmas.
1Samuel14:1 Nyannde feere Yonatan …ďii Sawulu wi'i suka doondoowo balmi mum: ‚ÄúWar, en njah haa aynoo…ďe Filisti'en to.‚ÄĚ Ammaa o wi'aay …óum baaba maako."
1Samuel14:2 Saa'i maajum Sawulu …óon joo…ói les rummaanoohi haa laarre wi'eteende Migiron haa keerol gese Gibiya. Wor…ďe baakin teeme…ó…óe njoweego …óon ngondi bee maako.
1Samuel14:3 Ahiyya …ďii Ahitooba deer…óiraawo Ikabood …ďii Pinehas …ďii Eeli, …óonno limanjo Jawmiraawo haa Silo, kaŇčko o …óon …ďorni limce limanku saa'i man. Yim…ďe wondu…ďe bee Sawulu kam…ďe boo …ďe anndaa Yonatan dilli."
1Samuel14:4 Haa laawol ngol Yonatan tammi yahugo, woodi tapaaje tow…óe cee…ď…óe haa bakeeje maagol …ói…ói fuu. Tapaare nde'e wi'ete Booses, ndeya boo Seene."
1Samuel14:5 Nde'e …óon haa woyla maagol, yeeso Mikmas, ndeya boo haa fombina maagol, yeeso Geba."
1Samuel14:6 Kadi, Yonatan wi'i suka mum go: ‚ÄúWar, en njah haa aynoo…ďe saadooni'en …ďe'e to. Teema Jawmiraawo wallan en. Walaa ko ha…óata mo hokkugo en jaalorgal, koo en …óuu…óaay boo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:7 Doondoowo balmi maako jaabi mo: ‚ÄúWa…ó ko …ďernde ma yi…ói fuu, yah. Min kam mi yahdan bee ma koo toy a yi…ói yahugo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:8 Yonatan wi'i: ‚ÄúSey en …ďadito …ďe haa to …ďe ngi'i en.
1Samuel14:9 To …ďe mbi'i: Ndare, munye haa to min ngari ‚Äď nden kam en ndaroto haa en ngoni."
1Samuel14:10 Ammaa to …ďe mbi'i: Ngare haa amin ‚Äď nden kam en mba'oto, ngam Jawmiraawo hokki en …ďe haa juu…óe men. Bana nii en anndirta …óum.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:11 ∆Āe njehi haa aynoo…ďe Filisti'en ngi'i …ďe. Filisti'en mbi'i: ‚ÄúAsee, IbraniŇčke'en ngurti gas…óe muu…óum'en haa …ďe nyukkino!‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:12 Nden …ďe ewni Yonatan e doondoowo balmi, …ďe mbi'i: ‚ÄúHey, onon, ngare haa amin! Woodi ko min mbi'ata on!‚ÄĚ Yonatan wi'i suka mum: ‚ÄúTokkam! Jawmiraawo hokki …ďe haa juu…óe Isra'iila.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:13 Yonatan wa'i bee juu…óe e kos…óe fuu, doondoowo balmi maako tokki mo. Nde …ďe njotti haa dow, Filisti'en ndo'i yeeso maako, suka maako boo mbari …ďe."
1Samuel14:14 Ha…ďre aranndeere bee Filisti'en nde'e, Yonatan e suka mum mbari wor…ďe noogas haa nokkuure nde yaajaay sam."
1Samuel14:15 Filisti'en won…ďe nder lesdi, honoo…ďe nder saŇčngeere e moo…ďe ja…ďtoo…ďe fuu kultori ngam haala maajum. Allah hulni …ďe bee dimmbaaki lesdi boo."
1Samuel14:16 Yim…ďe Sawulu aynoo…ďe haa Gibiya-Benyamin ngi'i jii…ďotiral nder saŇčngeere Filisti'en.
1Samuel14:17 Sawulu umri yim…ďe wondu…ďe bee muu…óum, wi'i: ‚ÄúLime, ndaare to go…ó…óo mee…óen dilli.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe limi, …ďe tawi Yonatan e doondoowo balmi mum ngalaa ton."
1Samuel14:18 Sawulu wi'i Ahiyya, limanjo: ‚ÄúWaddu sundukru Allah.‚ÄĚ Ngam nyalaade maajum sundukru alkawal …óon caka Isra'iila'en."
1Samuel14:19 Saa'i Sawulu …óon wolida bee Ahiyya tawon, jii…ďotiral nder saŇčngeere Filisti'en …ďesdi masin. Sawulu wi'i limanjo: ‚ÄúAccu haala man!‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:20 Nden o ewni yim…ďe wondu…ďe bee maako, …ďe nasti ha…ďre. Saa'i man hakkiilooji Filisti'en cakli, …ďe …óon ka…ďa koo moy bee soobaajo mum, jii…ďre mawnde wa…ói."
1Samuel14:21 IbraniŇčke'en wondu…ďe bee Filisti'en diga naane, wardu…ďe bee ma…ď…ďe haa saŇčngeere, ngayliti, kawtani Isra'iila'en wondu…ďe bee Sawulu e Yonatan."
1Samuel14:22 Isra'iila'en nyukkii…ďe nder kooseeje Efrayim go, nde …ďe nani Filisti'en ndoggi, …ďe ngarti, …ďe taasni …ďe."
1Samuel14:23 Bana nii Jawmiraawo hisniri Isra'iila'en nyalaade maajum. Ha…ďre maajum yotti haa ga…óa Baytawiina.
1Samuel14:24 Sawulu umruno yim…ďe mum bee hunayeere: ‚ÄúNaaloore dow koo moy nyaami nyaamdu haa yahugo kiikii…óe, hiddeko mi waato konne'en am.‚ÄĚ Nyalaade man fuu, …ďe nyaamaay, ngam maajum …ďe comi masin."
1Samuel14:25 ∆Āe fuu …ďe ngari nder laynde, njumri …óon ton haa lesdi."
1Samuel14:26 ∆Āe ngi'i njumri …óon simta, ammaa walaa koo gooto ma…ď…ďe metti ndi, ngam …ďe kuli hunayeere Sawulu."
1Samuel14:27 Ammaa Yonatan anndaa haala maajum. O nastini se…ďatto sawru maako nder njumri, o nyaami ndi. Law …ďanndu maako ferti."
1Samuel14:28 Gooto nder yim…ďe maako wi'i mo: ‚ÄúBaaba ma huni hunayeere, naali koo moy nyaami nyaamdu hannde.‚ÄĚ Ngam maajum honoo…ďe fuu …óon comi."
1Samuel14:29 Yonatan wi'i: ‚ÄúBaaba am jaanyani lesdi fuu sarru. Ndaare, semmbe am warti ngam mi metti njumri se…ó…óa."
1Samuel14:30 To yim…ďe fuu nyaamino ko ke…ď…óen haa Filisti'en hannde, jaalorgal men …ďuranno mawnugo piw. Ammaa jonta kam en mbaraay …óuu…ó…ďe nder Filisti'en.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:31 Nyalaade maajum Isra'iila'en mbari Filisti'en diga Mikmas haa yotti Ayyalon. Weelo tampini …ďe masin,"
1Samuel14:32 haa …ďe ukkani ke…ďal konu, …ďe kirsi dammooji e ga'i e nyalbi, …ďe ndufi ∆īii∆īam maaji haa lesdi. Nden …ďe nyaami haa nokkuure nde …ďe kirsi ton."
1Samuel14:33 Sawulu anndinaama: ‚ÄúNdaa, yim…ďe …óon mba…óa hakke dow Jawmiraawo, …ďe …óon nyaama haa nokkuure nde …ďe kirsi ton.‚ÄĚ Sawulu hooli, wi'i: ‚ÄúOn zammbake Jawmiraawo. Ngadde hayre mawnde hiddeko naaŇčge muta.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:34 Nden o umri: ‚ÄúNaste caka yim…ďe, mbi'e …ďe …ďe ngadda dabbaaji malla dammooji ma…ď…ďe, …ďe kirsa …ói haa …óo dow hayre, …ďe nyaama bilaa ∆īii∆īam ngam taa …ďe nga…óa hakke dow Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ Jemmaare maajum yim…ďe ngaddi dabbaaji muu…óum'en, kirsi …ói ton."
1Samuel14:35 Sawulu mahani Jawmiraawo hirsirde. Kayre woni hirsirde arannde nde o mahani Jawmiraawo.
1Samuel14:36 Nden Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúSey en taasna Filisti'en jemmaare nde'e, en nja…ďta kuuje ma…ď…ďe haa weeta. Taa gooto nder ma…ď…ďe da…óa.‚ÄĚ Yim…ďe maako njaabi: ‚ÄúWa…ó ko fottani ma fuu!‚ÄĚ Ammaa limanjo wi'i: ‚ÄúEn aartu en ∆īama muuyo Allah.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:37 Sawulu ∆īami Allah: ‚ÄúMi diirto, mi taasna Filisti'en na? Min njaaloto …ďe na?‚ÄĚ Ammaa nyalaade maajum Allah jaabaaki mo."
1Samuel14:38 Sawulu ewni ardii…ďe yim…ďe, wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúKe…ďte hakkewol ngole laati hannde."
1Samuel14:39 Fakat mi …óon hunoro Jawmiraawo geeto, kisnu…óo Isra'iila: Ba…ó…óo hakke man o maayan, koo to …óum …ďiyam Yonatan!‚ÄĚ Ammaa walaa koo gooto wolwi."
1Samuel14:40 Nden Sawulu wi'i Isra'iila'en fuu: ‚ÄúOn fuu ndare haa wakeere nde'e, min e …ďiyam Yonatan min ndaroto wakeere ndeya.‚ÄĚ Yim…ďe njaabi mo: ‚ÄúWa…ó ko fottani ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:41 Sawulu tori Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila: ‚ÄúYaa Allah, anndinam gooŇčga bee hayre kur'u. Kur'u aybini Sawulu e Yonatan, gooŇč…óini yim…ďe wo…ó…ďe.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:42 Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúMba…óe kur'u hakkunde am bee …ďiyam.‚ÄĚ Ngu aybini Yonatan.
1Samuel14:43 Sawulu wi'i mo: ‚ÄúYeccam ko mba…ó…óa.‚ÄĚ Yonatan jaabi: ‚ÄúMi hoo'i njumri se…ó…óa bee se…ďatto sawru am, mi nyaami. Ndaa yam, mi taaskani maayugo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:44 Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúNonnon, Jawmiraawo hiito yam bee caatal muu…óum fuu, to mi acci ma bee yoŇčki.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel14:45 Ammaa yim…ďe mbi'i Sawulu: ‚ÄúKadi Yonatan mo he…ďani Isra'iila jaalorgal maŇčngal nga'al hannde, o maaya na? Walaa sam! Fakat min …óon kunoro Jawmiraawo geeto, min accataa a meema koo gaasaawol hoore maako gootol. Kuu…óe maako hannde kam, bee ballal Allah o huuwri …óe.‚ÄĚ Bana nii yim…ďe kisniri Yonatan, o da…ói maayde."
1Samuel14:46 Sawulu acci taasnugo Filisti'en. Kam…ďe …ďe kooti lesdi ma…ď…ďe.
1Samuel14:47 Wakkati Sawulu …óon laamano Isra'iila, o ha…ďi bee konne'en maako koo toy fuu: O ha…ďi bee yim…ďe Mo'ab e Ammoon e Edoom, bee laamii…ďe Soba, bee Filisti'en boo. Koo toy o ha…ďi fuu, o jaalo."
1Samuel14:48 O ti…ó…óini …ďernde maako, o ha…ďi bee yim…ďe Amalek, o hisni Isra'iila'en juu…óe ja…ďtoo…ďe."
1Samuel14:49 Sawulu woodi …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe tato: Yonatan e Isuwi e Malkisu'a. O woodi boo …ďi…ď…ďe rew…ďe …ói…óo: Innde mawniraawo, Meerab, innde minyiraawo boo, Mikal."
1Samuel14:50 Ahino'am …ďii Ahimaas woni debbo Sawulu. Innde maw…óo honoo…ďe maako, Abineer …ďii Neer. Neer woni bappa Sawulu,"
1Samuel14:51 ngam Kis baaba Sawulu e Neer baaba Abineer …ďe …ďi…ď…ďe Abiyel.
1Samuel14:52 Zamanu Sawulu fuu ha…ďre bee Filisti'en …óon saati. Ngam maajum koo ndeye Sawulu yi'i go…ó…óo cemmbi…ó…óo, baaw…óo konu, o hoo'a mo, o nastina mo haa jama'aare konu maako."
1Samuel15:1 Samuyila wari haa Sawulu, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúNaane Jawmiraawo nelino yam ngam haa mi moyte haa a laato laamii…óo yim…ďe maako Isra'iila'en. Ngam maajum nan umroore maako jonta."
1Samuel15:2 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i: Mi yi…ói waataago ko yim…ďe Amalek mba…ói Isra'iila'en, no …ďe ka…óiri …ďe laawol yaake …ďe ngurti Misra."
1Samuel15:3 Yah, ha…ďu bee Amaleki'en jonta, nattin …ďe kam…ďe e ko …ďe mari fuu, taa en…óa …ďe sam. Mbare wor…ďe e rew…ďe, derke'en e musinankoy, na'i e dammooji e geeloo…ói e bam…óe fuu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:4 Sawulu ewni yim…ďe mum …ďe ngara haa Telayim. O limi …ďe ton: Honoo…ďe ujine teeme…ó…óe …ói…óo (200.000), non boo wor…ďe Yahuuda ujine sappo (10.000)."
1Samuel15:5 ∆Āe njahdi bee maako haa berniwol Amaleki'en, …ďe mba…ói baaltol nder waadiwol kommbi berniwol man."
1Samuel15:6 Sawulu neldi habaru haa Keni'en, wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúNdille, ngurte caka Amaleki'en, ngam taa mi halka on bana ma…ď…ďe. Ngam saa'i Isra'iila'en …óonno ngara diga Misra, onon on kolli …ďe mboo…óeeŇčga.‚ÄĚ Keni'en cenndiri bee Amaleki'en."
1Samuel15:7 Nden Sawulu ukkani Amaleki'en, jaali …ďe diga Hawila haa yotti Sura haa fuunaaŇčge Misra."
1Samuel15:8 Sawulu e yim…ďe mum nattini …ďe fuu bee kaafahi, ammaa …ďe naŇčngi Agag, laamii…óo Amaleki'en."
1Samuel15:9 ∆Āe acci mo o geeto, kaŇčko e …ďur…óum woo…óugo haa dammooji e na'i e borti e ko mari saman fuu. ∆Āe nattini dabbaaji tampu…ói e …ói mboo…óaay tan."
1Samuel15:10 Jawmiraawo wi'i Samuyila:
1Samuel15:11 ‚Äú∆Āernde am …óon naawa ngam mi laamini Sawulu, o wayliti, o acci yam, o …óowtanaaki umrooje am.‚ÄĚ Kanjum …óum naawi Samuyila, o woyani Jawmiraawo jemmaare man fuu."
1Samuel15:12 JaŇčngo maajum o dawi cub, o yehi ngam fottugo bee Sawulu. O nani Sawulu warno haa Karmel, darnani hoore mum hayre maandorde, dilli haa Gilgal."
1Samuel15:13 Nde Samuyila yotti ton, Sawulu hoofni mo, wi'i: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo barki…óine. Mi wa…ói ko Jawmiraawo umri yam.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:14 Ammaa Samuyila ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúKo mi nanata …óo, naa …óum bojji dammooji e boodaali na'i na?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:15 Sawulu jaabi: ‚ÄúYim…ďe koo'i na'i e dammooji …ďur…ói woo…óugo haa Amaleki'en ngam lii'anaago …ói Jawmiraawo Allah maa…óa kirsetee…ói. Ammaa luttu…ói fuu min nattini …ói.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel15:16 Samuyila wi'i Sawulu: ‚ÄúHe'i kam! Haa mi yecce ko Jawmiraawo wi'i yam jemmaare saaliinde.‚ÄĚ Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúMi …óon he…óito.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel15:17 Samuyila wi'i mo: ‚ÄúWakkati a maraayno saman, a laati ardii…óo le'i Isra'iila, Jawmiraawo su…ďi ma a laato laamii…óo maaji."
1Samuel15:18 O neli ma, o umri ma a ha…ďa bee Amaleki'en hakke'en …ďe'e haa a nattina …ďe."
1Samuel15:19 Koni a …óowtanaaki mo? Koni a yaaw…ói …ďoftugo ke…ďal konu? A wa…ói ko haanaay yeeso Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel15:20 Sawulu jaabi: ‚ÄúNa mi …óowtani umroore Jawmiraawo? Mi yehi bana o wi'i yam, mi halki Amaleki'en fuu. Mi naŇčngi Agag, laamii…óo ma…ď…ďe, mi waddi mo haa …óo."
1Samuel15:21 Ammaa yim…ďe am nattinaay …ďur…óum woo…óugo haa ke…ďal konu, waato na'i e dammooji boo…ó…ói, ngam haa …ďe lii'ano …ói Allah Jawmiraawo maa…óa haa Gilgal …óo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:22 Ammaa Samuyila wi'i: ‚Äú∆äume …ďuri fottango Jawmiraawo, guletee…ói e kirsetee…ói na malla to go…ó…óo …óowtanake umroore maako? Fakat, …óowtaare ma …ďuran seynugo mo dow kirsetee…ói jaw…ói pay…ói fuu."
1Samuel15:23 Luutugo umroore maako halli bana kaaramaaku, tuurtango mo boo halli bana rewugo labbi. An a wudini umroore Jawmiraawo, ngam maajum o wudini ma, o …ďorti ma laamu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:24 Sawulu jaabi: ‚ÄúGooŇčga, mi wa…ói hakke. Mi luuti umroore Jawmiraawo e anndinol maa…óa, ngam mi huli yim…ďe am, mi wa…ói ko …ďe ngi…ói."
1Samuel15:25 Ammaa jonta yaafanam hakke am, yahdu bee am haa Gilgal, haa mi sujidana Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:26 Samuyila wi'i mo: ‚ÄúAa'a, mi yahdataa bee ma. A wudini umroore Jawmiraawo, kaŇčko boo o wudini ma, a laamantaako Isra'iila fahin.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:27 Samuyila wayliti haa dilla. Ammaa Sawulu naŇčngi gawargal limce Samuyila haa ngal seeki.
1Samuel15:28 Samuyila wi'i: ‚ÄúBana nii Jawmiraawo seekiri laamu Isra'iila dow maa…óa hannde, hokki ngu go…ó…óo feere …ďur…óo ma fottugo."
1Samuel15:29 Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila, o teddu…óo, o fewataa, o mimsitittaa boo, ngam naa o ne…ó…óo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:30 Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúMi wa…ói hakke. Ammaa teddinam jonta yeeso ndotti'en yim…ďe am e yeeso Isra'iila'en, yahdu bee am haa mi sujidana Allah Jawmiraawo maa…óa.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:31 Samuyila ja…ďi, yahdi bee maako haa Gilgal. Nde Sawulu timmini sujidango Jawmiraawo,"
1Samuel15:32 Samuyila umri: ‚ÄúNgaddanee…óam Agag, laamii…óo Amaleki'en.‚ÄĚ Agag wari haa maako o de'it…óo ngam o numi: ‚ÄúJonta kam joote maayde ittake.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel15:33 Ammaa Samuyila wi'i mo: ‚ÄúKaafahi ma sooyni rew…ďe …óuu…ó…ďe …ďikkoy muu…óum'en. Bana nii daada ma boo sooyan …ďiyum jonta.‚ÄĚ Nden o ta'i Agag ge…ďe ge…ďe yeeso Jawmiraawo haa Gilgal.
1Samuel15:34 ∆Āaawo maajum Samuyila yehi haa Rama. Sawulu boo hooti saare mum haa Gibiya.
1Samuel15:35 Samuyila joo…ói nder suno ngam …ďernde Jawmiraawo metti daliila Sawulu mo o laaminino dow Isra'iila. O meetaay yi'ugo Sawulu haa nyalaade maayde maako.
1Samuel16:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i Samuyila: ‚ÄúNdey a accata sunoraago Sawulu? Mi wudini mo ngam taa o tokko laamanaago Isra'iila. Hebbin luwal ma bee nebbam cenir…óam, yah haa Baytilaama haa go…ó…óo mo innde mum Yessa. Mi su…ďani hoore am gooto nder …ďi…ď…ďe maako haa o laato laamii…óo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:2 Samuyila wi'i: ‚ÄúNoy njahanmi ton? To Sawulu nani …óum, o mbaratam.‚ÄĚ Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúHoo'u wiige, yahru nge ton, wi' yim…ďe a wari ngam lii'anaago Jawmiraawo kirseteeŇčga."
1Samuel16:3 Ewna Yessa haa juulde kirseteeŇčga man, min boo mi wi'ete ko mba…óata, moy nder …ďi…ď…ďe maako a moytata ngam o laato laamii…óo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:4 Samuyila …óowtani Jawmiraawo, yehi Baytilaama. Nde ndotti'en berniwol ngi'i mo, …ďe kultori, …ďe ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúJam waddu ma boo?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:5 O jaabi: ‚ÄúJam! Mi wari ngam lii'anaago Jawmiraawo kirseteeŇčga. Cene ko'e mon, nden njahde bee am haa nyaamdu kirseteeŇčga.‚ÄĚ O seni Yessa e …ďikkoy muu…óum boo, o ewni …ďe ton."
1Samuel16:6 Nde …ďe ngari, Samuyila yi'i Eliyabu …ďii Yessa, numi: ‚ÄúKaŇčko woni cu…ďaa…óo Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:7 Ammaa Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: ‚ÄúTaa hakkilan darnde maako juutnde, mi su…ďaay mo. Min kam mi laarataa bana yim…ďe ndaardata. Ne…ó…óo laaran ko gite mum ngi'ata, ammaa min mi laaran ko woni nder …ďernde go…ó…óo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:8 Yessa ewni Abinadabu, yahri mo yeeso Samuyila. Ammaa Samuyila wi'i: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo su…ďaay mo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:9 Yessa waddi Samma, ammaa Samuyila wi'i: ‚ÄúKaŇčko boo Jawmiraawo su…ďaay mo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:10 Bana nii Yessa waddi …ďi…ď…ďe muu…óum njowee…ói…óo yeeso Samuyila. Ammaa Samuyila wi'i: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo su…ďaay koo gooto ma…ď…ďe.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel16:11 Nden o ∆īami Yessa: ‚ÄúKam…ďe tan ngoni …ďi…ď…ďe ma fuu na?‚ÄĚ Yessa jaabi: ‚ÄúAa'a, lutti gaajiijo am, o …óon dura dammooji.‚ÄĚ Samuyila wi'i: ‚ÄúNel go…ó…óo wadda mo, ngam en pu…ó…óataa nyaamugo hiddeko o wara.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:12 Yessa neli go…ó…óo, nden Daawuda wari. O suka Ňčarnii…óo, bo…óeejo, gite maako …óon njayna. Jawmiraawo wi'i Samuyila: ‚Äú∆äum kaŇčko, moytu mo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:13 Samuyila hoo'i luwal bee nebbam cenir…óam, moyti Daawuda yeeso deer…óiraa…ďe muu…óum fuu. Diga saa'i maajum Ruuhu Jawmiraawo jippi dow Daawuda. Nden Samuyila ummi, yehi haa Rama."
1Samuel16:14 Ruuhu Jawmiraawo acci Sawulu, Jawmiraawo neli mo ruuhuwol kalluŇčgol ngol hulna mo."
1Samuel16:15 Sukaa…ďe Sawulu mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúNdaa, ruuhuwol kalluŇčgol iwŇčgol haa Jawmiraawo …óon hulne, barkaama."
1Samuel16:16 Naa ndikka min …óa…ď…ďitane go…ó…óo anndu…óo fiyugo moolooru na? To ruuhuwol man wari dow maa…óa, o yimane bee moolooru haa ke…ďa daama.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:17 Sawulu jaabi: ‚ÄúNdaaranee…óam go…ó…óo anndu…óo fiyugo moolooru boo…ó…óum, ngadde mo haa am.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:18 Gooto nder sukaa…ďe maako wi'i: ‚ÄúMi anndi go…ó…óo. Yessa mo Baytilaama woodi …ďi…ó…óo baaw…óo moolooru. O konoowo cemmbi…ó…óo boo, o Ňčarnii…óo, baaw…óo wolwugo, Jawmiraawo …óon wondi bee maako.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:19 Sawulu neli nelaa…ďe haa Yessa, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúNeldam …ďi…ó…óo ma Daawuda, duroowo dammooji.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:20 Yessa hokki Daawuda jawgel mbeewa e wamnde rimdaande tamseeje e kanyakanyaawu inaboojam o yahra …óum haa Sawulu.
1Samuel16:21 Bana nii Daawuda wari, yehi haa laamii…óo Sawulu. Sawulu yi…ói mo masin, wa…ói mo doondoowo balmi mum."
1Samuel16:22 Sawulu neli go…ó…óo haa Yessa, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúMi yi…ói Daawuda. Accu mo o joo…óo haa am, o huuwanammi.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel16:23 Koo ndeye ruuhuwol iwŇčgol haa Allah go wari dow Sawulu, Daawuda hoo'a moolooru, fiya ndu. Nden Sawulu foofta, he…ďa daama, ruuhuwol boo acca mo."
1Samuel17:1 Filisti'en moo…ďti jama'aare konu muu…óum'en haa Soko nder lesdi Yahuuda. ∆Āe caŇčngini haa Efes-Damiima, hakkunde Soko bee Azeka."
1Samuel17:2 Sawulu e Isra'iila'en boo moo…ďi, …ďe caŇčngini nder waadiwol le…ó…óe maw…óe. ∆Āe mba…ói caffuuji ngam ha…ďugo bee Filisti'en."
1Samuel17:3 Filisti'en ndari dow hooseere to, Isra'iila'en boo dow hooseere …óo, waadiwol …óon hakkunde ma…ď…ďe."
1Samuel17:4 Soojeejo manaa…óo wurti saŇčngeere Filisti'en. Innde maako Goliyat, o iw…óo Gaat. Darnde maako baakin meetir tati."
1Samuel17:5 Hufneere maako e sulkewol maako fuu …óum njamndi mbo…óeeri. TeddeeŇčga sulke man, baakin kilo cappan…óe joweego."
1Samuel17:6 O woodi jam…óe bo…óeeje haa korle maako. Dow balawal maako boo, o wakki jaaral njamndi mbo…óeeri."
1Samuel17:7 Kalasal labbo maako nanndi bee leggal cannyirgal. Cee…ďndi labbo maako …óum njamndi …ďaleeri, teddeeŇčga maari baakin kilo jowee…ói…ói. Go…ó…óo feere ardi mo, …óon roondi wawarde mawnde."
1Samuel17:8 Goliyat dari, tel…ďani caffuuji Isra'iila'en, wi'i: ‚ÄúNgam …óume mba…ó…óon caffuuji konu? Min mi Filistiijo, onon boo on maccu…ďe Sawulu. Cu…ďe gooto nder moo…óon, o wara, o ha…ďa bee am."
1Samuel17:9 To o waawti yam, o mbari yam, min laatoto maccu…ďe mon. Ammaa to min mi jaalake mo, mi mbari mo, nden kam onon on laatoto maccu…ďe amin, on kuuwana min.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:10 Nden o fu…ó…ói jancugo caffuuji konu Isra'iila'en, o wi'i: ‚ÄúOn nani ko mbi'mi na? Ngadde go…ó…óo gooto haa min ka…ďa.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:11 Nde Sawulu e Isra'iila'en nani bolle …óe'e, …ďe ndiwtori, …ďe kuli masin."
1Samuel17:12 Daawuda go, o gaajiijo Yessa mo asŇčgol Efrata haa Baytilaama nder lesdi Yahuuda. Yessa, o ndottiijo saa'i man. O woodi …ďi…ď…ďe njoweetato. Mawniraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe tato, Eliyabu e Abinadabu e Samma tokkino Sawulu haa konu."
1Samuel17:13 
1Samuel17:14 
1Samuel17:15 Saa'i feere feere Daawuda …óon ummo haa saare Sawulu, …óon hoota, ngam durugo dammooji baaba mum haa Baytilaama."
1Samuel17:16 Ammaa Filistiijo go …óon wara fajiri e kiikii…óe fuu, …óon tiitotira bee Isra'iila'en, nyal…óe cappan…óe nayi."
1Samuel17:17 Nyannde feere Yessa wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúYah haa deer…óiraa…ďe ma haa saŇčngeere konu. Yahran …ďe buhuuyel gabbe ca'aa…óe e tamseeje sappo.
1Samuel17:18 Hoo'u boo lee…ďi sappo ngam maw…óo honoo…ďe ujineere. Laar no deer…óiraa…ďe ma mba'i, ∆īam njamu ma…ď…ďe. Ja…ď huunde koo ndeye haa ma…ď…ďe, waddanam nde ngam seedaago fakat a yi'i …ďe, a tawi …ďe …ďe yam…ďe."
1Samuel17:19 ∆Āe …óon ngondi bee Sawulu e wor…ďe Isra'iila fuu ngam ha…ďre nder waadiwol Le…ó…óe-maw…óe.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel17:20 JaŇčngo maajum Daawuda dawi cub, acci dammooji haa juŇčngo aynoowo. O hoo'i kuuje go, o yehi bana baaba maako umruno mo. Nde o yotti saŇčngeere, Isra'iila'en …óon ngurto, …óon ndarna caffuuji, …óon mba…óa gookaali konu."
1Samuel17:21 Caffuuji Isra'iila'en e …ói Filisti'en …óon tiitotiri.
1Samuel17:22 Daawuda acci kuuje mum haa juŇčngo aynoowo doŇčgle, doggi haa deer…óiraa…ďe mum won…ďe nokkuure ha…ďre, ∆īami …ďe njamu ma…ď…ďe."
1Samuel17:23 Saa'i o …óon wolida bee ma…ď…ďe, Goliyat Filistiijo go wari fahin, dari yeeso caffuuji Filisti'en, lorniti ko o wolwuno go. Daawuda nani …óum."
1Samuel17:24 Wor…ďe Isra'iila, nde ngi'i Goliyat, …ďe fuu …ďe kultori masin, …ďe ndoggi."
1Samuel17:25 ∆Āe mbi'mbi'tiri: ‚ÄúA yi'i mo na? Ndaa mo …óon wara! Kayya no o jancirta Isra'iila! Koo moy mbari Goliyat, laamii…óo riskinan mo, te'nan mo …ďiyiiko debbo. Saare baaba maako boo rim…óan e jomorli fuu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:26 Daawuda ∆īami wor…ďe darii…ďe kommbi muu…óum: ‚ÄúMbarjaari ndiye mbaran…óo Filistiijo oo, ittan…óo mbustu dow Isra'iila he…ďata? Moy saadooniijo oo haa o janca caffuuji konu Allah geeto?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:27 Yim…ďe mbolwani mo haala mbarjaari go fahin.
1Samuel17:28 Eliyabu, mawniiko nani mo o …óon wolida bee yim…ďe. O tikki, o wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúKo mba…óata …óo? A acci dammooji men pamari nder ladde. Moy aynata …ói jonta? Mi anndi ma, a elew…óo, bon…óo. A wari laarugo ha…ďre non.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:29 Daawuda jaabi: ‚ÄúKo mba…ómi kadi? Walaa koo …óume, sey ∆īamugo ∆īam…óe.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:30 Nden o wayliti, o ∆īami go…ó…óo feere. KaŇčko o jaabi mo bana naane."
1Samuel17:31 Wor…ďe wo…ó…ďe nani bolle Daawuda, anndini …óum Sawulu. KaŇčko o neli …óa…ď…ďugo mo."
1Samuel17:32 Daawuda wari, wi'i Sawulu: ‚ÄúTaa go…ó…óo hula Filistiijo oo, barkaama. Min mi yahan ha…ďugo bee maako.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:33 Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúA fotaay ngam ha…ďre man, ngam a derkeejo tawon. Ammaa kaŇčko o cemmbi…ó…óo, anndu…óo ha…ďre diga sukaaku maako.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:34 Daawuda wi'i: ‚ÄúBarkaama, saa'i mi …óon dura dammooji baaba am, koo ndeye mbarooga malla …ďoodu feere wari, naŇčngi jawgel haa tokkere,"
1Samuel17:35 mi taasna …óum, mi mbara …óum, mi hisna jawgel man diga hunnduko mum. To nga ummani yam, mi naŇčnga nga wakkude, mi mbara nga."
1Samuel17:36 Mi waawti baroo…óe e …ďoodi go…ó…ói fuu. Filistiijo saadooniijo oo laatoto bana maaje, ngam o janci caffuuji konu Allah geeto."
1Samuel17:37 Jawmiraawo hisni yam jagge baroo…óe e …ďoodi go…ó…ói, o hisnatam juŇčngo Filistiijo oo boo.‚ÄĚ Sawulu wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúBoo…ó…óum, yah, Jawmiraawo wondu bee ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:38 Nden o hoo'i sulkewol maako e hufneere njamndi, o …ďorni …óum Daawuda."
1Samuel17:39 Daawuda wakki kaafahi Sawulu, nden o foondi yahugo ngam o woowaay kuuje …óe'e. O wi'i Sawulu: ‚ÄúMi mee…óaay kuuje konu tawon, mi waawaay yahugo bee maaje.‚ÄĚ O …ďorti …óe,"
1Samuel17:40 o hoo'i sawru maako haa juŇčngo, o su…ďti kaa'e …ďorwu…óe jowi nder maayel, o waati …óe nder booro maako. Nden o naŇčngi piwlol maako, o yehi ngam fottugo bee Filistiijo go."
1Samuel17:41 Goliyat …ďaditi Daawuda, jogii…óo wawarde maako ardi mo."
1Samuel17:42 Nde o waawi yi'ugo Daawuda laa…ď…óum, o yawi mo ngam Daawuda o suka mo he'aay yahugo konu tawon, o bo…óeejo, o Ňčarnii…óo."
1Samuel17:43 Goliyat tel…ďani mo: ‚ÄúKoni ngar…óa haa am bee sawru? Mi rawaandu na?‚ÄĚ O naalori Daawuda bee labbi maako fuu.
1Samuel17:44 Nden o janci mo: ‚ÄúWar, haa mi nyaamna colli e kuuje ladde kusel ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:45 Daawuda jaabi mo: ‚ÄúAn a wari dow am bee kaafahi e labbo e jaaral. Min kam mi wari bee innde Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah caffuuji Isra'iila. KaŇčko njancu…óa."
1Samuel17:46 Ngam maajum o nastinte hannde haa juŇčngo am. Mi mbarete, mi ta'an hoore ma. ∆Āalli honoo…ďe Filisti'en, mi hokkan …ói colli e kuuje ladde. Nden kam duniyaaru fuu anndan Allah …óon haa Isra'iila."
1Samuel17:47 Moo…ďtii…ďe haa …óo fuu anndan Jawmiraawo walaa haaje kaafahi malla labbo ngam hisnugo yim…ďe mum. Ha…ďre nde'e …óum ha…ďre Jawmiraawo, o hokkan min on haa juu…óe amin.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:48 Nden Filistiijo …ďaditi ngam fottugo bee Daawuda. Daawuda boo yaaw…ói, doggi ngam fottugo bee maako,"
1Samuel17:49 hoo'i hayre haa booro mum, wa…ói nde haa piwlol, fi…ói Goliyat haa tiinde. Hayre nasti tiinde maako, o do'i dow yeeso maako haa lesdi."
1Samuel17:50 Bana nii Daawuda jaalori Filistiijo bee piwlol e hayre, mbari mo. O walaa kaafahi."
1Samuel17:51 Nden Daawuda yaaw…ói, dari dow maako, losi kaafahi maako, ta'i hoore maako. Nde Filisti'en ngi'i cemmbi…ó…óo muu…óum'en maayi, …ďe ndoggi."
1Samuel17:52 Yim…ďe Isra'iila e Yahuuda ummi, mba…ói gookaali ha…ďre, taasni …ďe haa njotti haa waadiwol, koo haa dammu…óe Ekuruun boo. Filisti'en mbaraa…ďe …óon mbaali haa laawol jahranŇčgol haa Saarayim haa Gaat e Ekuruun."
1Samuel17:53 Nde Isra'iila'en timmini taasnugo Filisti'en, …ďe lori, …ďe nyaami saŇčngeere ma…ď…ďe."
1Samuel17:54 Daawuda hoo'i hoore Goliyat, …ďaawo…óon o yahri nde haa Urusaliima. Ammaa o resi balmi Filistiijo nder laymaaru maako."
1Samuel17:55 Nde Sawulu yi'i Daawuda …óonno yaha ngam fottugo bee Filistiijo go, o ∆īami Abineer, maw…óo honoo…ďe maako: ‚ÄúSuka oo o …ďii moy?‚ÄĚ Abineer jaabi: ‚ÄúFakat bana a geeto, barkaama, mi anndaa.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel17:56 Laamii…óo wi'i mo: ‚ÄúHe…ďtu …óum.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel17:57 Nde Daawuda mbari Filistiijo, lorti nder saŇčngeere, Abineer yahri mo yeeso Sawulu, hoore Goliyat …óon haa juŇčngo Daawuda."
1Samuel17:58 Sawulu ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúAn suka, moy woni baaba ma?‚ÄĚ Daawuda jaabi: ‚ÄúMi …ďii Yessa, maccu…óo ma haa Baytilaama.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel18:1 Nde bolidal Sawulu bee Daawuda timmi, …ďernde Yonatan …ďii Sawulu fu…ó…ói yi…óugo Daawuda masin. O yi…ói mo bana yoŇčki maako."
1Samuel18:2 Nyalaade maajum Sawulu accaay Daawuda hoota saare baaba mum, ammaa o jogiti mo."
1Samuel18:3 Yonatan e Daawuda ka…ď…ďi alkawal soobiraaku, ngam Yonatan yi…ói mo bana o yi…óiri yoŇčki maako."
1Samuel18:4 Yonatan …ďorti ngapaleewol mum, hokki ngol Daawuda. O hokki mo limce maako e kaafahi maako e lagaawal maako e taadorgol maako fuu."
1Samuel18:5 Koo toy Sawulu neli Daawuda fuu, o yehi, o he…ďi jaalorgal. Ngam maajum Sawulu darni mo dow jama'aare konu muu…óum. Saraaki'en Sawulu e yim…ďe fuu ngerdi mo."
1Samuel18:6 ∆Āaawo Daawuda jaali Filistiijo go, nde jama'aare konu …óonno hoota, rew…ďe ngurti berniiji e gure Isra'iila fuu ngam fottugo bee laamii…óo Sawulu. ∆Āe …óon piya moolooji e baw…ói, …ďe …óon ngama, …ďe …óon ngimnda mo."
1Samuel18:7 Nder gimol ma…ď…ďe …ďe …óon mbi'a: ‚ÄúSawulu mbari ujineere, ammaa Daawuda ujine sappo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel18:8 Sawulu seyoraaki gimol man, o tikki masin. O numi: ‚ÄúSey ujineere tan …ďe ndokki yam, ammaa kaŇčko …ďe ndokki mo ujine sappo. Walaa ko luttani mo he…ďugo, sey laamu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel18:9 Nyalaade maajum Sawulu fu…ó…ói laarugo Daawuda bee gite kallu…óe e kaajal.
1Samuel18:10 JaŇčngo maajum ruuhuwol kalluŇčgol iwŇčgol haa Allah jippi dow Sawulu, o wolwi nder saare maako bana ginnaa…óo. Daawuda fu…ó…ói fiyugo moolooru bana nyal…óe go…ó…óe. Sawulu …óonno jogi labbo mum."
1Samuel18:11 Nden o …ďaŇčgti labbo ngo, o wi'i: ‚ÄúSey mi tigga Daawuda haa mahol‚ÄĚ, sakkini ngo boo. Ammaa Daawuda ruu…ói ngo nde …ói…ói."
1Samuel18:12 Sawulu fu…ó…ói hulugo Daawuda, ngam Jawmiraawo …óon wondi bee maako, acci Sawulu."
1Samuel18:13 Ngam maajum Sawulu daayni Daawuda, wa…ói mo hooreejo dow honoo…ďe ujineere. Daawuda ardi yim…ďe mum nder ha…ďre,"
1Samuel18:14 he…ďi jaalorgal nder kuu…óe mum fuu, ngam Jawmiraawo …óon wondi bee maako."
1Samuel18:15 Nde Sawulu yi'i …óum, o tokki hulugo Daawuda."
1Samuel18:16 Ammaa koo moy nder Isra'iila e nder Yahuuda yi…ói Daawuda ngam o ardii…óo boo…ó…óo.
1Samuel18:17 Sawulu wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúMi hokkete Meerab, …ďiyam debbo mawniraajo, a …ďaŇčga mo. Ammaa sey a huuwanammi, a ha…ďa bee konne'en Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ Sawulu numi: ‚ÄúWalaa haaje juŇčngo am meema mo, ndikka Filisti'en mbara mo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel18:18 Daawuda jaabi mo: ‚ÄúMin kam mi moy? ∆Āeye ngoni banndiraa…ďe am e asŇčgol amin nder Isra'iila? Mi fotaay mi laato esiraawo laamii…óo.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel18:19 Nde nyalaade …ďaŇčgal wa…ói, Daawuda …ďaŇčgaay Meerab ngam Sawulu te'ni mo haa Adiriyel, go…ó…óo iw…óo Mehola."
1Samuel18:20 Ammaa Mikal …ďii Sawulu debbo minyiraajo, yi…ói Daawuda. Nde Sawulu nani haala maajum, o seyi."
1Samuel18:21 O numi: ‚ÄúMi accan Daawuda …ďaŇčga mo, haa o laatano mo tuuforgol, Filisti'en boo mbara mo.‚ÄĚ Ngam maajum o wi'i Daawuda …ói…óawre: ‚ÄúHannde a laatoto esam.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel18:22 Sawulu umri saraaki'en mum: ‚ÄúMbolwane Daawuda bee sirri, mbi'e mo: A anndi laamii…óo …óon yerdi ma, yim…ďe maako fuu boo ngi…ói ma, esir bee maako kadi.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel18:23 Saraaki'en mbolwani Daawuda bana nii. Daawuda jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúOn tammi esirgo bee laamii…óo …óum koy…óum na? Naa mi lees…óo, talakaajo na?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel18:24 Kam…ďe …ďe anndini …óum Sawulu.
1Samuel18:25 O umri …ďe …ďe mbi'a Daawuda: ‚ÄúLaamii…óo …óa…ď…ďataa sadaaki haa maa…óa, sey lare saadooniiku Filisti'en teemerre, ngam waataago konne'en muu…óum.‚ÄĚ Ammaa o nufi halkugo Daawuda bee juu…óe Filisti'en."
1Samuel18:26 Saraaki'en ngecci Daawuda haala man fuu. ∆äum fottani mo o laato esiraawo laamii…óo. Diga nyalaade …ďaŇčgal siwaa,"
1Samuel18:27 Daawuda yehi bee wor…ďe mum, …ďe mbari Filisti'en teeme…ó…óe …ói…óo. O yahrani laamii…óo lare saadooniiku ma…ď…ďe, o limani mo …óe gootal gootal. Nden Sawulu hokki mo …ďi…ó…óo mum Mikal, o laato debbo maako."
1Samuel18:28 Sawulu faami bee laa…ď…óum Jawmiraawo …óon wondi bee Daawuda. O faami boo …ďiyiiko debbo yi…ói Daawuda.
1Samuel18:29 Ngam maajum o tokki hulugo mo, o laati ganyo maako haa foroy."
1Samuel18:30 Ardii…ďe Filisti'en tokki ha…ďugo bee Isra'iila'en. Nde ha…ďre wa…ói fuu, Daawuda …ďura saraaki'en wo…ó…ďe jaalaago. Ngam daliila man innde maako laati teddunde."
1Samuel19:1 Sawulu wi'i …ďi…ó…óo muu…óum Yonatan e saraaki'en muu…óum o tammi mbarugo Daawuda. Ammaa Yonatan soobiri bee Daawuda masin.
1Samuel19:2 Ngam maajum o reentini Daawuda, o wi'i: ‚ÄúBaaba am …óon …óa…ď…ďa mbarugo ma. Hakkil jaŇčngo fajiri, suu…óa, nyukka."
1Samuel19:3 Min kam mi wurtoto, min bee baaba am, mi daro kommbi maako haa ngesa haa ngon…óa. Nden mi wolwana mo haala maa…óa, haa mi he…ďta no ka wa'i. ∆Āaawo…óon mi anndinte.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel19:4 Yonatan mani Daawuda haa noppi baaba mum. O wi'i mo: ‚ÄúBarkaama, taa wa…óan suka ma Daawuda aybe, ngam o wa…óanaay ma aybe, ammaa o wa…ói ko nafete masin,"
1Samuel19:5 ngam o suklanaaki yoŇčki maako nde o ha…ďi bee Goliyat, o mbari mo. Bee maako Jawmiraawo hisniri Isra'iila fuu. An boo a yi'i …óum, a seyori …óum. Ngam …óume a yi…ói wa…óugo aybe bee mbarugo go…ó…óo mo wa…óaay aybe? A walaa daliila sam.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel19:6 Sawulu nanani Yonatan, o huni hunayeere, o wi'i: ‚ÄúFakat mi …óon hunoro Jawmiraawo geeto, Daawuda, o mbarataake.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel19:7 Yonatan ewni Daawuda, yecci mo haala man fuu. Nden o yahri mo haa Sawulu, Daawuda boo joo…ói haa saare Sawulu bana naane."
1Samuel19:8 Ha…ďre bee Filisti'en fu…ó…óiti. Daawuda yehi, ha…ďi bee ma…ď…ďe, jaali …ďe jaalorgal maŇčngal haa …ďe ndoggi."
1Samuel19:9 Nyannde feere, nde Daawuda …óon fiya moolooru yeeso Sawulu, ruuhuwol kalluŇčgol iwŇčgol haa Jawmiraawo wari dow laamii…óo fahin. O …óon joo…ói haa suudu maako, labbo …óon haa juŇčngo maako."
1Samuel19:10 O …óa…ď…ďi tiggugo Daawuda bee labbo haa mahol, ammaa Daawuda ruu…ói ngo, ngo tiggi haa mahol. Bee jemma Daawuda doggi, da…ói."
1Samuel19:11 Sawulu neli nelaa…ďe haa saare Daawuda, haa …ďe ayna mo, …ďe mbara mo jaŇčngo maajum fajiri. Ammaa Mikal, debbo Daawuda wi'i gorum: ‚ÄúTo a hisnaay yoŇčki ma jemmaare nde'e, …ďe mbarete jaŇčngo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel19:12 O jippini mo gal wurdere mahol, o wurti, o doggi, o da…ói."
1Samuel19:13 Nden Mikal hoo'i lawru saare, wallini ndu dow be'itte. Haa hoore maaru o wa…ói tayre laral mbeewa bee gaasaaji. O suddi lawru bee limce."
1Samuel19:14 Nde Sawulu neli nelaa…ďe ngam naŇčngugo Daawuda, Mikal wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúO nyaw…óo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel19:15 Sawulu neli …ďe fahin, umri …ďe …ďe nasta suudu, …ďe ndaara Daawuda. O wi'i: ‚ÄúNgadde mo bee be'itte maako fuu ngam haa mi mbara mo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel19:16 Nelaa…ďe nasti suudu, tawaay Daawuda, sey lawru tan …óon dow be'itte, bee gaasaaji mbeewa haa hoore maaru."
1Samuel19:17 Sawulu ∆īami Mikal: ‚ÄúKoni mba…ó…óa mi rikici bee wallugo konneejo am haa o da…ói?‚ÄĚ Mikal jaabi mo: ‚ÄúO wi'i o mbaratam to mi yoofaay mo.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel19:18 Ammaa Daawuda da…ói, yehi Rama, haa Samuyila. O yecci mo ko Sawulu wa…ói mo fuu. Nden o yahdi bee Samuyila haa Nayot."
1Samuel19:19 Nde Sawulu nani Daawuda …óon ton,"
1Samuel19:20 o neli nelaa…ďe ngam haa …ďe naŇčnga mo. Wakkati …ďe njotti ton, jama'aare annabi'en …óon wa…óa annabaaku. Samuyila, ardii…óo ma…ď…ďe boo …óon dari kommbi ma…ď…ďe. Nde yim…ďe Sawulu ngi'i …óum, Ruuhu Allah wari dow ma…ď…ďe, …ďe pu…ó…ói wa…óugo annabaaku."
1Samuel19:21 Go…ó…óo wi'i …óum Sawulu. O neli nelaa…ďe wo…ó…ďe. Kam…ďe boo …ďe pu…ó…ói wa…óugo annabaaku. Fahin Sawulu neli nelaa…ďe, ammaa kam…ďe boo …ďe mba…ói annabaaku."
1Samuel19:22 Nden Sawulu bee hoore mum yehi Rama. Nde o yotti waawru mawndu haa Seku, o ∆īami haa o tawata Samuyila e Daawuda. ∆Āe njaabi mo: ‚Äú∆Āe …óon haa Nayot haa Rama.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel19:23 Saa'i o …óon yaha ton, Ruuhu Allah wari dow maako kaŇčko boo, o …óon tokko laawol maako, o …óon wa…óa annabaaku haa o yotti Nayot haa Rama."
1Samuel19:24 O …ďorti limce maako, o wa…ói annabaaku yeeso Samuyila haa o somi, o do'i. Luttu…óum nyalawmaare maajum e jemmaare maajum fuu o …óon waali haa lesdi o temmbo. Bana nii geccawol fu…ó…óiri: Sawulu boo …óon caka annabi'en na?"
1Samuel20:1 Daawuda ummi Nayot haa Rama, o doggi, o wari haa Yonatan, o ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúAybewol ngole mi wa…óani baaba ma? Ngam …óume o …óon …óa…ď…ďa mbarugo yam?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:2 Yonatan wi'i: ‚ÄúAa'a, o mbarataa ma, wa…óataako! Baaba am wa…óataa koo …óume, koo maw…óum koo peetum, sonaa o aarta, o yeccammi …óum. Kadi o suu…óatam huunde nde mbi'…óa na? Irin maajum laatataako!‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:3 Ammaa Daawuda huni, wi'i: ‚ÄúBaaba ma anndi boo…ó…óum a yerdi yam. Ngam maajum o anndinaay ma ko o tammi wa…óugo, ngam taa …ďernde ma naawa. Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto, an boo a geeto, hakkunde am bee waade kam, falannde woore tan.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:4 Yonatan wi'i: ‚ÄúMi wa…óante ko ngi…ó…óa fuu.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel20:5 Daawuda wi'i: ‚ÄúBoo…ó…óum, jaŇčngo …óum fu…ó…óoode lewru hesru, mi nyaamdan bee laamii…óo. To a yerdake, mi yahataa, ammaa mi nyukkoto haa ladde haa fa…ď…ďijaŇčngo kiikii…óe."
1Samuel20:6 To baaba ma he…ďti mi waraay, wi' mo: Daawuda tori yam duŇčayeere yaaw…óaago haa Baytilaama, berniwol maako, ngam lenyol maako fuu …óon wa…óa kirseteeŇčga hitaande nde'e."
1Samuel20:7 To baaba ma wi'i: Boo…ó…óum, nden kam walaa ko saklatammi. Ammaa to tikkere maako saati jamum, a anndan o wa…ói anniya mbarugo yam."
1Samuel20:8 Useni, tabitin amaana mee…óen. Siftor alkawal soobaaku ngal ka…ď…ďu…óa bee am yeeso Jawmiraawo. Ammaa to mi wa…ói aybe, sey mbaraami an! Ammaa taa hokkam haa juŇčngo baaba ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:9 Yonatan jaabi mo: ‚ÄúAa'a, kayya! ∆äum wa…óataako! To mi anndi fakat baaba am …óon nufo haala sarru dow maa…óa, nden mi anndinte …óum.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:10 Daawuda ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúNoy mi anndirta to baaba ma jaabake ma bee tikkere?‚ÄĚ
1Samuel20:11 Yonatan wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúWar, ndillen haa yaasi.‚ÄĚ Nde …ďe …óon ngurto,"
1Samuel20:12 Yonatan wi'i: ‚ÄúMi hunorake bee Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila: Fa…ď…ďijaŇčngo bana wakkati jonta mi ∆īaman baaba am. To o numi hayru ma, mi neldete habaru."
1Samuel20:13 Non boo to o numi sarru ma, mi anndinte. To mi wa…óaay, Jawmiraawo hiito yam bee caatal! Fakat mi wallete haa a hisna yoŇčki ma. To doole a dogga, nden kam Jawmiraawo wondu bee maa…óa bana o wonduno bee baaba am."
1Samuel20:14 To mi lutti bee yoŇčki wakkati maajum, wa…óanam mboo…óeeŇčga bana Jawmiraawo wa…óani ma, taa mbaram."
1Samuel20:15 Taa ittan danygol am amaana haa foroy, koo to Jawmiraawo itti konne'en ma fuu dow lesdi.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:16 Yonatan ha…ď…ďi alkawal bee saare Daawuda, o wi'i: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo hiito konne'en Daawuda.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:17 Nden Yonatan …ďesdi wi'ugo: ‚ÄúHunoranam bee yiide nde mar…óa ngam am. Ngam min mi yi…ói ma bana ngi…ómi hoore am.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel20:18 ∆Āaawo maajum Yonatan wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúJaŇčngo …óum fu…ó…óoode lewru hesru. ∆Āe …óa…ď…ďititte ngam joonde ma haa faada nyaamdu ferwan.
1Samuel20:19 Fa…ď…ďijaŇčngo yah haa nokkuure nde nyukku…óa nyannde go, nyukka baŇčnge hayre wi'eteende Ejel."
1Samuel20:20 Min kam mi fi…óan kuri tati gal wakeere hayre man bana to huunde fi…óeego …óon ton.
1Samuel20:21 Nden mi nela derkeejo haa o su…ďta kuri man. To mi wi'i mo: Kuri njani gaa'e maa…óa, su…ďtu! ‚Äď nden kam wurta, haala ma jam, fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto, walaa sarru."
1Samuel20:22 Ammaa to mi wi'i mo: Kuri njani ga…óa maa…óa ‚Äď nden kam dillu, ngam Jawmiraawo neli ma daayii…óum."
1Samuel20:23 Ammaa siftor wolde alkawal hakkunde am bee maa…óa. Jawmiraawo tabitinan ngal haa foroy.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel20:24 Daawuda nyukki bana o wi'no. Nde fu…ó…óoode lewru hesru yotti, laamii…óo Sawulu wari haa pellel nyaamdu."
1Samuel20:25 O joo…ói dow joonde maako haa mahol bana o woowi. Yonatan joo…ói, tiitotiri bee maako, Abineer maw…óo ardii…ďe sooje'en boo haa wakeere Sawulu. Ammaa joonde Daawuda ferwi."
1Samuel20:26 Nyannde maajum Sawulu wi'aay koo …óume, ngam o numi: ‚ÄúTeema woodi ko he…ďi mo haa o senaaki ngam nyaamdu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:27 Ammaa koo nyalaade juulde …ói…óawre boo, joonde Daawuda ferwi. Ngam maajum Sawulu ∆īami Yonatan: ‚ÄúKoni …ďii Yessa waraay nyaamugo keenya e hannde?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:28 Yonatan jaabi: ‚ÄúDaawuda tori yam duŇčaye yahugo haa Baytilaama.
1Samuel20:29 O wi'i yam: Useni accam mi yaha, ngam banndiraa…ďe am mba…óan kirseteeŇčga nder berniwol. Mawnam umri yam mi wara. To a yerdake yam, accu mi yaha, mi laara deer…óiraa…ďe am. Ngam maajum o waraay haa nyaamdu maa…óa.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:30 Sawulu tikkani Yonatan masin, o tel…ďani mo: ‚ÄúAn njaaluujo! Mi anndi boo…ó…óum a soobiri bee …ďii Yessa oo, …óum mbustu dow maa…óa e dow daada ma fuu."
1Samuel20:31 Yaake Daawuda o geeto, yoŇčki maa…óa hisaay, laamu ma boo tabitaay. Jonta nel naŇčngugo mo, o he'i mbareego.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel20:32 Yonatan ∆īami baaba mum: ‚ÄúNgam …óume a yi…ói mbarugo mo? ∆äume o wa…ói?‚ÄĚ
1Samuel20:33 Ammaa Sawulu sakkini labbo mum haa yuwa Yonatan. Bana nii Yonatan anndiri anniya mbarugo Daawuda tabiti haa …ďernde Sawulu.
1Samuel20:34 Yonatan tikki masin, o ummi haa taabal, o waawaay nyaamugo koo …óume nyannde maajum. ∆Āernde maako naawi ngam baaba maako hu…ói Daawuda."
1Samuel20:35 JaŇčngo maajum fajiri Yonatan wurti, yehi haa nokkuure nde o narrino bee Daawuda go, derkeejo …óon wondi bee maako."
1Samuel20:36 O wi'i derkeejo: ‚ÄúYaaw…óa, su…ďtu kuri …ói pi…óanmi.‚ÄĚ Nde o doggi, Yonatan fi…ói kurol haa ga…óa maako."
1Samuel20:37 Derkeejo yotti pellel kurol man, ammaa Yonatan hooli: ‚ÄúKurol …óon ga…óa maa…óa."
1Samuel20:38 Yaaw…óa, taa dara!‚ÄĚ Derkeejo hooci kurol ngol, waddi ngol haa Yonatan."
1Samuel20:39 O anndaa ko saawi nder haala maajum, sey Yonatan e Daawuda anndi …óum."
1Samuel20:40 Yonatan hokki derkeejo lagaawal e kuri haa o hoora …óum nder berniwol.
1Samuel20:41 Nde o dilli, Daawuda wurti nyukkorde mum haa wakeere hayre fombinaare. O tuggi koppi, nden o sujidi nde tati. ∆Āe koofnindiri, kaŇčko e Yonatan, …ďe mboyi …ďe …ói…óo fuu, ammaa bojji Daawuda …ďuri semmbe."
1Samuel20:42 Nden Yonatan wi'i mo: ‚ÄúYah jam! Taa yejjitit ko en kunotiri bee innde Jawmiraawo. Alkawal man tabiti hakkunde mee…óen, hakkunde …ďi…ď…ďe men boo. Jawmiraawo tabitin …óum!‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel21:1 Daawuda ummi, dilli, Yonatan boo hooti berniwol mum."
1Samuel21:2 Daawuda yehi haa Ahimelek, limanjo haa Noba. Ahimelek wari haa Daawuda, o diwni, o ∆īami: ‚ÄúNgam …óume ngar…óa an feere ma? Toy yim…ďe ma?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel21:3 Daawuda jaabi: ‚ÄúLaamii…óo neli yam bee umroore sirri. O wi'i yam taa go…ó…óo annda ngam …óume o neli yam malla ko o umri yam. Sukaa…ďe am boo, mi hawran bee ma…ď…ďe haa nokkuure kaja."
1Samuel21:4 ∆äume a woodi bana nyaamdu? Hokkam tamseeje jowi koo boo ko a mari bana nyaamdu fuu.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel21:5 Limanjo jaabi mo: ‚ÄúMi walaa tamseeje meere, sey cenaa…óe. Mi hokkataa ma …óe, sonaa to sukaa…ďe ma kawtaay bee rew…ďe.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel21:6 Daawuda wi'i: ‚ÄúTaa sakla! Bana naane min meemaay rew…ďe. Wakkati min ummi, wor…ďe am …ďe senaa…ďe, koo …óum laataaki jahaaŇčgal cenaaŇčgal. Sakkomaa hannde …ďe senaa…ďe.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel21:7 Nde limanjo nani …óum, o hokki Daawuda tamseeje …óe o ittuno haa taabal nder suudu Jawmiraawo ngam haa o jo'ina kese."
1Samuel21:8 Nyannde man Do'ek Edoomiijo, maw…óo waynaa…ďe Sawulu …óon ton haa yeeso Jawmiraawo."
1Samuel21:9 Daawuda ∆īami Ahimelek: ‚ÄúA walaa labbo malla kaafahi ngam am na? Mi he…ďaay hoo'ugo balmi am, ngam umroore laamii…óo yaaw…óini yam masin.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel21:10 Limanjo jaabi: ‚ÄúMi woodi kaafahi Goliyat Filistiijo mo mbar…óa nder waadiwol bi'eteeŇčgol Le…ó…óe-maw…óe. Ki saawaama nder limce, ndaa ki …ďaawo limce limanku. To a yi…ói kam, hoo'u ki. Balmol feere walaa …óo.‚ÄĚ Daawuda wi'i: ‚Äú∆Āuranki ki'i walaa, hokkam ki.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel21:11 Nyannde maajum Daawuda ummi Noba, tokki doggugo Sawulu. O wari haa Akis, laamii…óo Gaat."
1Samuel21:12 Saraaki'en annditi mo, mbi'i Akis: ‚ÄúNa kaŇčko woni Daawuda, laamii…óo ma…ď…ďe! Ngam maako …ďe ngami, …ďe ngimi: Sawulu mbari ujineere, ammaa Daawuda ujine sappo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel21:13 Daawuda sam…óini bolle …óe'e, o huli laamii…óo Akis masin."
1Samuel21:14 O wa…ói hoore maako bana o ginnaa…óo caka ma…ď…ďe, o …óon ngaasa pareeje dammugal, o …óon ilna tuu…óe maako dow wakkude maako."
1Samuel21:15 Akis wi'i jaggii…ďe mum: ‚ÄúNdaa, on …óon ngi'a o ginnaa…óo. Koni ngaddu…óon mo haa am?"
1Samuel21:16 Kadi yinnaa…ďe haa …óo ke'aay na? On ngi…ói o daamammi bee ginnawol maako na? Mi yi…óaa mo haa saare am.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel22:1 Daawuda doggi ton, wari haa lowol Adullam. Nde deer…óiraa…ďe maako e luttu…ďe saare baaba maako nani …óum, …ďe ngari haa maako."
1Samuel22:2 Non boo yim…ďe wo…ó…ďe, …ďillii…ďe e tokkaa…ďe nyamaale e haa…óa-…ďer…óe'en, …ďe fuu …ďe moo…ďi haa Daawuda, …ďe …óon baakin teeme…ó…óe nayo. Daawuda laati ardii…óo ma…ď…ďe."
1Samuel22:3 Daawuda ummi ton, yehi Mispe nder lesdi Mo'ab. O tori laamii…óo Mo'abi'en: ‚ÄúAccu baaba am e daada am ngara haa …óo, …ďe ngonda bee moo…óon, haa to mi anndi ko Allah nufani yam.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel22:4 Bana nii o acciri saaro'en maako haa laamii…óo Mo'abi'en. ∆Āe njoo…ói ton saa'i Daawuda …óon nyukki nder gasol.
1Samuel22:5 Ammaa annabi Gada wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúTaa joo…óa haa …óo nder gasol, hootu lesdi Yahuuda.‚ÄĚ Ngam maajum Daawuda ummi, yehi laynde Heeret."
1Samuel22:6 Nyannde feere Sawulu nani habaru yim…ďe wo…ó…ďe ngi'i Daawuda e yim…ďe muu…óum. Saa'i maajum Sawulu …óon joo…ói les aslahi gonki haa towndiire haa Gibiya, labbo maako …óon haa juŇčngo maako. Saraaki'en maako fuu …óon ndari, taari mo."
1Samuel22:7 O wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúNanee…óam, onon yim…ďe Benyamin! Kadi on tammi …ďii Yessa hokkan on gese alkamaari e gese inabooje na? Malla o wa…óan on maw…ďe fuu dow honoo…ďe ujineere malla dow honoo…ďe teemerre?"
1Samuel22:8 Ngam maajum on tuurtani yam. Walaa koo gooto nder moo…óon anndini yam alkawal …ďiyam bee …ďii Yessa oo. Walaa koo gooto moo…óon suklani yam, walaa mo faamtini yam haala …ďiyam mo ummini maccu…óo am ngam waaltanaago yam bana hannde.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel22:9 Do'ek Edoomiijo …óon dari ton caka yim…ďe Sawulu. O wi'i: ‚ÄúNdaa, mi yi'i …ďii Yessa nde o wari haa Noba, haa Ahimelek …ďii Ahitooba."
1Samuel22:10 Limanjo ∆īami muuyo Jawmiraawo ngam maako, hokki mo njoo…ďaari, hokki mo kaafahi Goliyat Filistiijo boo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel22:11 Laamii…óo Sawulu neli …óa…ď…ďugo Ahimelek …ďii Ahitooba, kaŇčko e saare baaba maako fuu, waato liman'en won…ďe haa Noba fuu. ∆Āe fuu …ďe ngari haa laamii…óo."
1Samuel22:12 Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúNan, …ďii Ahitooba!‚ÄĚ Ahimelek jaabi: ‚ÄúNa'am, barkaama.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel22:13 Sawulu wi'i mo: ‚ÄúKoni on tuurtani yam, an e …ďii Yessa? Koni ndokku…óa mo tamseeje e kaafahi, ∆īam…óa muuyo Allah ngam maako boo? Jonta o ummani yam ngam waaltanaago yam.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel22:14 Ahimelek jaabi laamii…óo: ‚ÄúAsee, naa Daawuda woni koolaa…óo ma …ďur…óo yim…ďe ma fuu na? O esiraawo ma boo, o ardii…óo doogari'en ma su…ďaa…ďe, koo moy haa saare ma …óon teddina mo."
1Samuel22:15 Nonnon, naa hannde tan boo mi ∆īami Allah ngam maako. Aa'a, barkaama, taa aybinam dow koo …óume, taa aybin banndiraa…ďe am boo. Mi anndaano koo …óume nder haala maajum fuu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel22:16 Ammaa laamii…óo wi'i: ‚ÄúFakat, an Ahimelek, a maayan bee yim…ďe saare ma fuu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel22:17 O umri aynoo…ďe darii…ďe ton: ‚ÄúTaare liman'en Jawmiraawo, mbare …ďe. ∆Āe mballi Daawuda, …ďe anndi o doggi yam, ammaa …ďe ngeccaay yam.‚ÄĚ Ammaa wor…ďe …ďe'e cali fortugo juu…óe muu…óum'en ngam mbarugo liman'en Jawmiraawo."
1Samuel22:18 Ngam maajum Sawulu wi'i Do'ek Edoomiijo: ‚ÄúAn, war mbaru …ďe!‚ÄĚ Do'ek mbari …ďe, liman'en cappan…óe njoweetato e njowo, …ďornii…ďe toggooje limanku."
1Samuel22:19 Nden Sawulu umri mbarugo joo…óii…ďe haa Noba, berniwol liman'en fuu, bee mbeldi kaafahi: Wor…ďe e rew…ďe, derke'en e musinankoy, non boo na'i e bam…óe e dammooji fuu."
1Samuel22:20 Ammaa gooto nder …ďi…ď…ďe Ahimelek da…ói. Innde maako Abiyatar. O doggi, o wari haa Daawuda,"
1Samuel22:21 o yecci mo no Sawulu mbardi liman'en Jawmiraawo.
1Samuel22:22 Daawuda wi'i Abiyatar: ‚ÄúNde ngi'mi Do'ek Edoomiijo haa Noba naane, mi anndi o yeccan …óum Sawulu. Maayde banndiraa…ďe ma fuu …óum aybe am."
1Samuel22:23 Joo…óoda bee am, taa hul! Sawulu …óon …óa…ď…ďa mbarugo en en …ói…óo fuu, ammaa haa am a he…ďi jam.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:1 Daawuda nani habaru Filisti'en …óon ukkano Ke'ila, …ďe …óon nja…ďta gawri haa laar…óe."

1Samuel23:3 Ammaa yim…ďe maako mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúKoo haa …óo nder lesdi Yahuuda boo en …óon bee kulol, sakkomaa to en ndilli ha…ďugo bee caffuuji Filisti'en.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:4 Daawuda ∆īami Jawmiraawo fahin. Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: ‚ÄúUmma, yah haa Ke'ila. Mi hokkete Filisti'en haa juŇčngo ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:5 Daawuda yehi Ke'ila, kaŇčko e yim…ďe muu…óum. ∆Āe ukkani Filisti'en, …ďe mbari …óuu…ó…ďe nder ma…ď…ďe, …ďe koo'i dabbaaji ma…ď…ďe. Bana nii Daawuda hisniri joo…óii…ďe berniwol Ke'ila."

1Samuel23:7 Nde Sawulu nani Daawuda wari haa Ke'ila, o wi'i: ‚ÄúYowwa, jonta Allah hokki mo haa juŇčngo am. Daawuda do'ake nder tuuforgol, ngam o ma…ď…ďi hoore maako nder berniwol bee dammu…óe e jam…óe paldu…óe.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:8 Sawulu ewni honoo…ďe Isra'iila'en fuu, ngam haa …ďe njahda bee muu…óum haa Ke'ila, …ďe taaro berniwol ngam honugo Daawuda e wor…ďe mum."
1Samuel23:9 Daawuda faami Sawulu …óon wa…óa dabare honugo mo. Ngam maajum o umri Abiyatar, limanjo: ‚ÄúWaddu limce limanku.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:10 Nden o wi'i: ‚ÄúYaa Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila, mi anndi Sawulu wa…ói anniya wargo haa Ke'ila, haa o halka berniwol ngam daliila am."
1Samuel23:11 Yim…ďe Ke'ila ndokkatam haa juŇčngo maako na? Sawulu waran na? Mi …óon toro ma, yaa Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila, anndinam …óum.‚ÄĚ Jawmiraawo jaabi mo: ‚ÄúO waran.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:12 Daawuda ∆īami: ‚ÄúYim…ďe Ke'ila ndokkatam, min e yim…ďe am, haa juŇčngo maako na?‚ÄĚ Jawmiraawo jaabi: ‚Äú∆Āe ndokkan.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:13 Ngam maajum Daawuda ummi, kaŇčko e yim…ďe muu…óum, baakin wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe njoweego. ∆Āe ngurti Ke'ila, …ďe njehi haa …ďe mbaawi yahugo fuu. Nde Sawulu nani Daawuda wurti Ke'ila, da…ói, o acci taasnugo mo."
1Samuel23:14 Daawuda fa…ď…ďi nder gasi dow kooseeje nder ladde Zif haa Horeesa. Sawulu …óa…ď…ďiti mo wakkati man fuu, ammaa Allah hokkaay Daawuda haa juŇčngo Sawulu."
1Samuel23:15 Daawuda anndi laa…ď…óum Sawulu yi…ói mbarugo mo. Saa'i maajum Daawuda …óon joo…ói haa Horeesa nder ladde Zif.
1Samuel23:16 Yonatan …ďii Sawulu yehi, tawi mo ton. O semmbi…óini hoolaare Daawuda bee Allah,"
1Samuel23:17 o wi'i mo: ‚ÄúTaa hul! JuŇčngo baaba am he…ďataa naawnugo ma. An a laatoto laamii…óo Isra'iila, min boo mi …ói…óa…ďo maa…óa. Kanjum, baaba am anndi …óum boo…ó…óum.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:18 ∆Āe …ói…óo fuu …ďe ka…ď…ďi alkawal soobaaku yeeso Jawmiraawo. Nden Yonatan hooti saare mum, ammaa Daawuda tokki joo…óaago haa Horeesa."
1Samuel23:19 Yim…ďe Zif ngari haa Sawulu haa Gibiya. ∆Āe mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúDaawuda …óon nyukki haa lesdi amin, nder gasi haa Horeesa dow hooseere Hakila, haa fombina harde Yahuuda."
1Samuel23:20 War, wa…ó ko ngi…ó…óa barkaama. Minin kam min nastinan mo nder juu…óe ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:21 Sawulu wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo barki…óin on, ngam on en…ói yam."

1Samuel23:23 Mbi…óite nokkuuje fuu haa o waawi nyukkaago. To on anndi koo …óume fuu bee laa…ď…óum, lorte haa am. Nden mi yahda bee moo…óon. To o wurtaaki lesdi tawon, mi he…ďtan mo, koo to doole mi tefa mo nder le'i Yahuuda fuu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel23:24 Kam…ďe …ďe aarti Sawulu hootugo haa Zif. Ammaa Daawuda e wor…ďe mum njahno ladde hamaadaare Ma'on, …ďe nasti haa luggol haa fombina harde Yahuuda."
1Samuel23:25 Sawulu e wor…ďe mum njehi ngam haa …ďe …óa…ď…ďita mo ton. Nde Daawuda nani …óum, o wa'i tapaare feere nder ladde hamaadaare Ma'on. Sawulu nani …óum, o taasni mo."
1Samuel23:26 Sawulu e wor…ďe mum njehi haa wuttudu hooseere ndu'u, Daawuda e wor…ďe mum boo haa wuttudu maare nduya. Daawuda ha…ďdi doggugo taasnoo…ďe …óum, ammaa Sawulu e wor…ďe mum …ďadi taaraago mo e yim…ďe maako ngam naŇčngugo …ďe."
1Samuel23:27 ∆äon nii nelaa…óo wari haa Sawulu, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúWar law, wallu min, Filisti'en kippake lesdi mee…óen.‚ÄĚ"

1Samuel24:1 Daawuda wa'i, nyukki haa En-Gedi nder gasi."
1Samuel24:2 Nde Sawulu warti diga ha…ďre bee Filisti'en, o nani Daawuda …óon nder ladde haa En-Gedi."
1Samuel24:3 Sawulu hoo'i honoo…ďe ujine tato (3.000), su…ďaa…ďe nder Isra'iila fuu, nden o yehi haa o …óa…ď…ďita Daawuda e wor…ďe mum haa Tapaare-Be'i kooseeje."
1Samuel24:4 O wari haa baal…óe dammooji kommbi laawol. Lowol …óon ton. O nasti ngol ngam wa…óugo haaje maako. Daawuda e wor…ďe mum …óonno njoo…ói ton.
1Samuel24:5 Wor…ďe Daawuda mbi'i: ‚ÄúHannde woni nyalaade nde Jawmiraawo wi'i ma: Ndaa, mi hokkete konneejo ma haa juŇčngo ma. Wa…ó mo ko fottani ma.‚ÄĚ Daawuda …ďaditi Sawulu bee sirri, ta'i gawargal limce maako se…ó…óa."

1Samuel24:11 Hanndeere nde'e ngi'…óa bee gite ma no Jawmiraawo hokki ma nder juŇčngo am, haa ton nder lowol. Yim…ďe am mbi'i yam mi mbare, ammaa mi acci ma. Mi sali naawnugo jaagor…óo am, ngam an woni laamii…óo mo Jawmiraawo su…ďi."
1Samuel24:12 Baaba am, laar gawargal limce ma haa juŇčngo am. Koy…óum mi mbaranno ma, ammaa mi ta'i gawargal limce ma tan. Faamu mi tuurtanaay ma, mi …óa…ď…ďataa wa…óugo ma halleende. Mi wa…óaay ma aybe, ammaa an a …óon looho yam haa mbara mi."

1Samuel24:14 A anndi geccawol kaakiraa…ďe men: Halleende kam, haa hallu…ďe iwata. Kadi min mi meemataa ma."
1Samuel24:15 Anndu ko mba…óata. Moy a taasnata? Laamii…óo Isra'iila …óon taasna rawaandu waatndu, asee, pilpilyel o taasnata!"
1Samuel24:16 Mi accan kiita haa juŇčngo Jawmiraawo, haa o hiito hakkunde am bee maa…óa. KaŇčko o gooŇč…óinammi, o hisnammi juŇčngo ma.‚ÄĚ"

1Samuel24:18 Nden o wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúA semtini yam. A wa…óani yam mboo…óeeŇčga, ammaa min mi wa…ói ma halleende."

1Samuel25:2 Haa wuro Ma'on woodi go…ó…óo disku…óo masin. Innde maako Nabal mo lenyol Kaaleb. O mari baali ujine tati (3.000) e be'i ujineere (1.000), …ói …óon ndura kommbi wuro Karmel. 1Samuel25:13 Daawuda umri wor…ďe mum: ‚ÄúMbakke kaafaaje mon!‚ÄĚ Koo moy wakki kaafahi mum. KaŇčko boo o wakki ki maako nden o yahdi bee wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe nayo (400). Ammaa teeme…ó…óe …ói…óo (200), o acci …ďe ngam aynugo kuuje ma…ď…ďe."
1Samuel25:14 Ammaa gooto nder suka'en Nabal yehi haa Abigayel, o wi'i mo: ‚ÄúNelaa…ďe Daawuda ngari diga ladde ngam hoofnugo jaagor…óo amin. Ammaa kaŇčko o saatani …ďe."
1Samuel25:15 Fakat, wor…ďe Daawuda …óon mboonana min masin, …ďe mee…óaay wa…óugo min kallu…óum. Walaa ko majji yaake min …óonno ngondi bee ma…ď…ďe nder ladde."
1Samuel25:16 Wakkati min ngondi bee ma…ď…ďe e min ndurdi fuu, …ďe ayni min jemma e nyalawma bana mahol taariiŇčgol min."
1Samuel25:17 Useni, numtu …óum, anndu no a hisnirta en. To a waawaay, nden kam sarru ukkanto jaagor…óo amin e saare maako fuu. A anndi o meereejo, o nanantaa koo moy.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel25:18 Law Abigayel hoo'i tamseeje teeme…ó…óe …ói…ói, kanyakanyaaji inaboojam …ói…ói, baali kirsaa…ói jowi e gabbe ca'aa…óe deydey ko heewata buhu e tame inabooje joor…óe teemerre e tame ibbe joor…óe teeme…ó…óe …ói…ói. O rimdi …óum fuu dow bam…óe."

1Samuel25:20 O wa'i wamnde maako, o tokki …ďe. Nde o …óon diirto hooseere, ndaa, Daawuda e wor…ďe mum potti bee maako."
1Samuel25:21 Hiddeko …ďe potta, Daawuda numno: ‚ÄúFakat, ko gorko oo mari nder ladde fuu, mi ayni …óum meere. Walaa koo gootel majji. Ammaa kaŇčko o warji mboo…óeeŇčga am bee halleende."
1Samuel25:22 Jawmiraawo hiito konne'en am to mi luttani mo gorko gooto nder yim…ďe maako haa jaŇčngo fajiri.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel25:23 Nde Abigayel yi'i Daawuda, o jippi wamnde maako bee jaawal, o tuggi koppi, turi yeeso Daawuda."
1Samuel25:24 O do'i les kos…óe Daawuda, o wi'i: ‚Äú∆äum fuu …óum aybe am, barkaama! Mi kor…óo ma, duŇčanam wolwango ma, yerda nanugo bolle am."
1Samuel25:25 Useni, taa suklana gorko am Nabal, o laati ko innde maako wi'i, o paataa…óo meereejo. Min kam mi walaa ton nde nelaa…ďe ma ngari, barkaama."
1Samuel25:26 ∆äum Jawmiraawo ha…ói ma waataago aybe man e rufugo ∆īii∆īam hannde. Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto, an boo a geeto, konne'en ma e …óa…ď…ďan…ďe halkugo ma fuu …ďe hiitetee…ďe bana Nabal."
1Samuel25:27 Ja…ď dokkal ngal ngaddanmaami, a hokka ngal sukaa…ďe tokkii…ďe ma."
1Samuel25:28 Yaafanam, aybewol am, barkaama. Mi anndi Jawmiraawo wa…óete laamii…óo fakat, o tabitinan laamu ma haa saare ma boo. Ngam a …óon ha…ďana Jawmiraawo nder konuuji mum, bal…óe ma fuu walaa mo he…ďata aybingo ma dow koo …óume."
1Samuel25:29 To go…ó…óo taasni ma, yi…ói mbarugo ma, Allah Jawmiraawo maa…óa aynan yoŇčki ma kommbi maako. Ammaa yoŇčkiiji konne'en ma, o sakkinan …ói bana go…ó…óo sakkinirta hayre bee piwlol."
1Samuel25:30 To Jawmiraawo laatini barkaaji …ói o wi'no ma fuu, to o hokki ma laamu dow Isra'iila,"
1Samuel25:31 nden kam walaa ko teddanta numo …ďernde ma, ngam a rufaay ∆īii∆īam bilaa daliila, a acci waataago boo. To Jawmiraawo woonani ma, barkaama, siftor kor…óo ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel25:32 Daawuda wi'i Abigayel: ‚ÄúYettoore laatano Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila mo neli ma hannde ngam fottugo bee am."
1Samuel25:33 An boo, barka laatano ma ngam hakkiilo ma, ngam a ha…ói yam waataago e rufugo ∆īii∆īam hannde."
1Samuel25:34 Ammaa fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto, Allah Isra'iila mo ha…ói yam wa…óugo ma kallu…óum: To a yaaw…óaayno fottugo bee am, walaa koo gooto nder wor…ďe Nabal luttanno hiddeko jaŇčngo fajiri.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel25:35 Daawuda ja…ďi dokke Abigayel, o wi'i mo: ‚ÄúHootu saare ma jam. Mi wa…óan ko torii…óa mi.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel25:36 Nde Abigayel warti saare, Nabal …óon joo…óodi bee yim…ďe mum, …óon nyaama nyaamduuji …óuu…ó…ói bana …ói laamii…óo. ∆Āernde maako …óon seyi, o …óon wuyki masin. Ngam maajum debbo maako yeccaay mo koo …óume."
1Samuel25:37 JaŇčngo maajum fajiri, nde wuykere acci mo, Abigayel anndini mo ko wa…ói. Nde o nani …óum, …ďernde maako yoori nder maako, laati bana hayre."
1Samuel25:38 ∆Āaawo nyal…óe sappo Jawmiraawo maayni mo.
1Samuel25:39 Nde Daawuda nani haala maajum, o wi'i: ‚ÄúYettoore laatano Jawmiraawo ngam o wa…óani yam kiita, o gooŇč…óini yam. O ha…ói yam wa…óugo aybe, ammaa o hiiti mo ngam o hu…ói yam, o lorni halleende Nabal dow hoore muu…óum.‚ÄĚ Nden Daawuda neldi muuyugo Abigayel, ngam haa o te'a mo."
1Samuel25:40 Nelaa…ďe maako ngari haa Abigayel haa Karmel, …ďe mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúDaawuda neli min haa maa…óa, ngam o yi…ói te'ugo ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel25:41 Abigayel ummi, tuggi koppi, turi, nden o wi'i: ‚ÄúMi kor…óo maako, mi taaskani lootugo kos…óe huuwanoo…ďe mo.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel25:42 O yaaw…ói, o wa'i wamnde maako, o tokki nelaa…ďe Daawuda, kaŇčko e hor…ďe maako njowo. O laati debbo Daawuda."
1Samuel25:43 Daawuda aartuno te'ugo Ahino'am, iw…óo Yisre'el. Ahino'am e Abigayel, …ďe …ói…óo fuu …ďe laati rew…ďe maako."
1Samuel25:44 Ammaa Mikal, debbo maako arano, Sawulu hoocuno mo, hokki mo Palti …ďii Layis mo Gallima."
1Samuel26:1 Yim…ďe Zif ngari haa Sawulu haa Gibiya. ∆Āe mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúDaawuda …óon nyukki haa hooseere Hakila haa fuunaaŇčge harde Yahuuda.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel26:2 Sawulu ummi, yehi haa ladde Zif ngam …óa…ď…ďititgo Daawuda. Honoo…ďe Isra'iila su…ďaa…ďe ujine tato (3.000) njahdi bee maako."
1Samuel26:3 Nde …ďe njotti hooseere Hakila yeeso harde Yahuuda, …ďe caŇčngini kommbi laawol. Saa'i maajum Daawuda …óon haa harde tawon. O nani Sawulu wari ngam …óa…ď…ďititgo mo,"
1Samuel26:4 o neli horoo…ďe, o annditi fakat Sawulu wari."
1Samuel26:5 Nden o ummi bee hoore maako, o yehi, o tawi saŇčngeere Sawulu. O laari haa Sawulu e Abineer …ďii Neer, maw…óo honoo…ďe maako …óon mbaali. Sawulu …óon haa caka saŇčngeere, yim…ďe fuu …óon taari mo."
1Samuel26:6 Daawuda ∆īami Ahimelek Hetiijo e Abisay …ďii Seruyatu, deer…óiraawo Yo'ab: ‚ÄúMoy yahdata bee am nder saŇčngeere Sawulu?‚ÄĚ Abisay jaabi: ‚ÄúMi yahdan bee ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:7 Wakkati jemma Daawuda e Abisay nasti saŇčngeere. ∆Āe caali wor…ďe taarii…ďe Sawulu, …ďe caali Abineer boo, …ďe fuu …ďe …óon …óaani. ∆Āe tawi Sawulu haa caka saŇčngeere, o …óon …óaani. Labbo maako …óon tiggi nder lesdi kommbi hoore maako."
1Samuel26:8 Abisay wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúHannde Allah hokki konneejo ma haa juŇčngo ma. Accu mi tigga mo bee labbo haa lesdi, nde woore tan, walaa haaje mi wa…óa …óum nde …ói…ói.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:9 Ammaa Daawuda wi'i: ‚ÄúTaa halku mo! KaŇčko woni laamii…óo mo Jawmiraawo su…ďi. Kadi Jawmiraawo hiitataako mo meemi cu…ďaa…óo maako na?
1Samuel26:10 Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto, kaŇčko tan hiitoto Sawulu, koo o maaya non, koo o halka nder ha…ďre."
1Samuel26:11 Jawmiraawo ha…óammi meemugo laamii…óo mo o su…ďi. Ammaa hoocu labbo maako e jollooru maako, nden en ndillu!‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:12 ∆Āe kooci labbo e jollooru, …ďe ndilli. Walaa gi'…óo …ďe, walaa nan…óo …ďe, walaa pin…óo, …ďe …óon …óaani …ďe fuu, ngam Jawmiraawo ukki …óoyŇčgol lugguŇčgol dow ma…ď…ďe."
1Samuel26:13 Daawuda lori haa wakeere waadiwol feere, o wa'i hooseere haa o tiitotiri bee saŇčngeere, daayii…óum bee maare."
1Samuel26:14 Nden o hooli heedi ummaatoore e Abineer: ‚ÄúAbineer, a …óon nanammi na?‚ÄĚ Abineer jaabi: ‚ÄúMoy findinta laamii…óo bee hoolo bana nii?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:15 Daawuda wi'i: ‚ÄúNa a gorko? Moy nder Isra'iila foti ha…ďugo bee maa…óa? Kadi ngam …óume a aynaay jaagor…óo ma laamii…óo? Nee…ďaay go…ó…óo nasti saŇčngeere ngam mbarugo mo.
1Samuel26:16 A wa…óaay kuugal ma bana no fotti. Fakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto, on fuu on ke'i kiita mbareego, ngam on aynaay jaagor…óo mon, laamii…óo mo Jawmiraawo su…ďi. Laar! Toy labbo laamii…óo? Toy jollooru maako? Kuuje man …óonno haa hoore maako.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:17 Sawulu annditi sawtu Daawuda. O ∆īami: ‚Äú∆äum an na, Daawuda, …ďiŇčngel am?‚ÄĚ Daawuda jaabi: ‚Äú∆äum min, barkaama.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:18 Nden o …ďesdi wi'ugo: ‚ÄúNgam …óume a taasnatammi? Ko mba…ómaami? ∆äume woni aybe am?
1Samuel26:19 Nanam, laamii…óo am ko maccu…óo ma yi…ói wi'go: Moy ummini ma dow am? To …óum Jawmiraawo kam, lii'anen mo kirseteeŇčga. Ammaa to …óum yim…ďe, nden kam Jawmiraawo hiito …ďe. Ngam …ďe ndiiwi yam yaasi lesdi Jawmiraawo, …ďe ngi…ói doolugo yam mi rewa …óowantee…ďe janan…ďe."
1Samuel26:20 Taa accu …ďe mbarammi haa lesdi ndaayiindi bee Jawmiraawo. Ngam …óume a loohoto yam bana gerlal nder kooseeje? Laamii…óo Isra'iila wurti ngam naŇčngugo pilpilyel.‚ÄĚ
1Samuel26:21 Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúMi wa…ói aybe. Lorta, …ďiŇčngel am Daawuda, mi meetataa wa…óugo ma kallu…óum. A sam…óini yoŇčki am hannde. Fakat, mi laatino paataa…óo, mi wa…ói ma aybe masin.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:22 Daawuda jaabi mo: ‚ÄúNdaa …óo labbo ma, barkaama. Gooto nder yim…ďe ma wara, hoo'a ngo."
1Samuel26:23 Jawmiraawo warjoto koo moy fodde adilaaku e gooŇčgaaku maako. Hannde o nastini ma juŇčngo am, ammaa mi sali naawnugo laamii…óo mo o su…ďi."
1Samuel26:24 Bana min mi sam…óini yoŇčki ma hannde, bana non Jawmiraawo sam…óinirta yoŇčki am boo, wurtintammi …ďillaaje fuu.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel26:25 Sawulu wi'i: ‚ÄúAllah barki…óine, …ďiŇčngel am Daawuda. A he…ďan barka nder ko mba…óata fuu.‚ÄĚ Nden Daawuda tokki laawol mum, Sawulu boo hooti haa saare mum."
1Samuel27:1 Daawuda numi: ‚ÄúNyannde feere Sawulu mbaratam. Ndikka mi da…óa, mi he…ďa hisrude haa lesdi Filisti'en. Nden kam Sawulu accan tefugo yam koo toy nder Isra'iila.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel27:2 Daawuda ummi, kaŇčko e wor…ďe teeme…ó…óe njoweego (600) wondu…ďe bee maako, …ďe njehi haa Akis …ďii Ma'ok, laamii…óo Gaat."
1Samuel27:3 ∆Āe njoo…ói ton, koo moy bee saare mum. Rew…ďe Daawuda …ói…óo boo …óon ton, Ahino'am mo Yisre'el e Abigayel mo Karmel, laatinoo…óo debbo Nabal."
1Samuel27:4 Nde Sawulu nani Daawuda …óon haa Gaat, o acci tefugo mo."
1Samuel27:5 Daawuda wi'i Akis: ‚ÄúTo a yerdake yam, accu mi yaha berniwol ma gootol, mi joo…óo ton. Walaa haaje mi joo…óodo bee maa…óa nder berniwol laamii…óo, barkaama.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel27:6 Nyalaade maajum Akis hokki mo Cikilak. Ngam maajum laamii…ďe Yahuuda mari Cikilak haa wargo hannde.
1Samuel27:7 Daawuda fa…ď…ďi nder lesdi Filisti'en nduu…ďu e lebbi nayi.
1Samuel27:8 Wakkati maajum Daawuda e wor…ďe mum …óon njaha, …óon ukkano Gesuri'en e Gijiri'en e Amaleki'en, joo…óii…ďe haa lesdi man diga …ďooyma, haa yotti Sura e lesdi Misra."
1Samuel27:9 Haa Daawuda yahata fuu, o halka wor…ďe e rew…ďe, o hooca dammooji e na'i e bam…óe e geeloo…ói e limce. Nden o lora haa Akis."
1Samuel27:10 Akis ∆īama mo: ‚ÄúToy njah…óon hippugo jonta?‚ÄĚ Nden Daawuda jaaba: ‚ÄúHaa Lesdi Fombina, lesdi Yahuuda‚ÄĚ malla ‚ÄúHaa Lesdi Fombina, lesdi Yerahameeli'en‚ÄĚ, maaboo ‚ÄúHaa Lesdi Fombina, lesdi Keni'en.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel27:11 Daawuda accaay koo moy, o waddaay wor…ďe e rew…ďe naŇčngaa…ďe haa Gaat boo, ngam taa go…ó…óo yecca Filisti'en ko Daawuda e wor…ďe mum mba…ói. Saa'i o …óon joo…ói haa lesdi Filisti'en, nii non o waarata."
1Samuel27:12 Akis nu…ó…óini Daawuda ngam o numi: ‚ÄúDaawuda wartiri hoore mum o ganyaa…óo haa yim…ďe maako Isra'iila'en, doole o huuwanammi haa foroy.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel28:1 Wakkati maajum Filisti'en moo…ďti jama'aaje konu muu…óum'en fahin ngam haa …ďe ka…ďa bee Isra'iila'en. Akis wi'i Daawuda: ‚ÄúWalaa seko sam, a yahdan bee am haa saŇčngeere konu, an e wor…ďe ma.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel28:2 Daawuda jaabi: ‚ÄúNonnon nii, barkaama, jonta a yi'an no mi huuwrante.‚ÄĚ Akis wi'i mo: ‚ÄúBoo…ó…óum, mi wa…ói ma a aynoowo yam haa foroy.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel28:3 Samuyila maayi fa…ď…ďi. Isra'iila'en fuu mboyi mo, uwi mo haa Rama, berniwol maako. Sawulu riiwno sarwoo…ďe maay…ďe e laaroo…ďe fuu haa lesdi."
1Samuel28:4 Kadi, jama'aaje konu Filisti'en moo…ďi, …ďe ngari haa Sunem, …ďe caŇčngini ton. Sawulu moo…ďti Isra'iila'en fuu, kam…ďe …ďe caŇčngini haa Gilbo'a."

1Samuel28:7 Ngam maajum Sawulu wi'i yim…ďe mum: ‚Äú∆äa…ď…ďitee…óam debbo carwoowo maay…ďe, haa mi yaha haa maako, mi ∆īama mo.‚ÄĚ ∆Āe mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúIrin debbo oo …óon haa En-Door.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel28:8 Sawulu …ďorni limce go…ó…óe ngam taa go…ó…óo anndita mo, nden o yahdi bee wor…ďe …ói…óo. ∆Āe njotti haa debbo man jemma. Sawulu wi'i mo: ‚ÄúSarwanam maay…ďe, wurtinanam ruuhuwol maay…óo mo mbi'anmaami.‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel28:9 Debbo jaabi: ‚ÄúA anndi ko Sawulu wa…ói, no o riiwri sarwoo…ďe maay…ďe e laaroo…ďe fuu nder lesdi. A yi…ói nastingo yam tuuforgol haa mbara mi na?‚ÄĚ"
1Samuel28:10 Ammaa Sawulu hunani mo: ‚ÄúBana Jawmiraawo o geeto, walaa ko yaalu ma nder haala ka'a.‚ÄĚ"

1Samuel28:14 Sawulu ∆īami: ‚ÄúNoy ngol wa'i?‚ÄĚ O jaabi: ‚Äú∆äum gorko nayeejo, o …óon …ďorni ngapaleewol.‚ÄĚ Bee maajum Sawulu annditiri …óum Samuyila. Law o tuggi koppi, o turi."

1Samuel28:18 Jawmiraawo umruno ma a halka Amaleki'en e ko …ďe mari fuu. Ammaa an a …óowtanaaki wolde maako, a wa…óaay fodde tikkere Jawmiraawo saatunde dow ma…ď…ďe. Ngam maajum kuuje …óe'e nga…óete jonta."
