Jeremiah25:20 e janan…ďe won…ďe haa Misra e laamii…ďe lesdi Uus e laamii…ďe berniiji Filisti'en fuu: Askalon e Gaaza e Ekuruun e luttu…óum Asdod.
Jeremiah25:21 Non boo yim…ďe Edoom e Mo'ab e Ammoon,"
Jeremiah25:22 laamii…ďe Tirus e Sidon fuu, laamii…ďe les…óe ga…óa Mbeela"
Jeremiah25:23 e berniiji Dedan e Tema e Bus e yim…ďe la…ďa-taarna'en fuu.
Jeremiah25:24 Non boo laamii…ďe Arabiya e laamii…ďe janan…ďe joo…óii…ďe nder ladde
Jeremiah25:25 e laamii…ďe Zimiri e laamii…ďe Elam e laamii…ďe Mediya fuu
Jeremiah25:26 e laamii…ďe woyla …ďadii…ďe e daayii…ďe fuu. Laamuuji duniyaaru fuu njari ngel bee tokkindirko, haa ragare boo laamii…óo Sesak."
Jeremiah25:27 Nden Jawmiraawo wi'i yam: ‚ÄúYeccu yim…ďe, ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Njare haa on nguyka, on tuuta, haa on ndo'o, on ummitittaako ngam daliila kaafahi ki neldanmi caka moo…óon."
Jeremiah25:28 To …ďe calake hoo'ugo jardugel nder juŇčngo maa…óa e yarugo ngel, nden kam yeccu …ďe Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i: Doole on njara!"
Jeremiah25:29 Mi fu…ó…óiran ukkugo sarru dow berniwol haa innde am woni. Onon kam on tammi on nda…óan kiita na? Woodaa! On ke…ďan kiita, ngam mi neldan kaafahi dow yim…ďe duniyaaru fuu‚ÄĚ, non Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i."
Jeremiah25:30 ‚ÄúAn Yeremiya, anndin …ďe ko mi wi'ete fuu. Yeccu …ďe: Jawmiraawo ubban haa …ďaŇčgii…óum, riggoto diga joo…óorde mum seniinde haa asama. O ubboto dow yim…ďe maako, o wookan bana …ďi…ó…óoo…ďe inabooje. Koo moy haa duniyaaru nanan mo."
Jeremiah25:31 Hoolo man yottoto keeri duniyaaru, ngam Jawmiraawo hujjotiran bee ummaatooje, o wa…óan kiita bee yim…ďe fuu, o do'an hallu…ďe kiita maayde.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah25:32 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i: ‚ÄúSarru …óon ukkano ummaatoore nde'e, nden ndeya, henndu saatundu …óon ummo haa keeri duniyaaru …ďur…ói daayaago."
Jeremiah25:33 Nyalaade man mbaraa…ďe Jawmiraawo mbaaloto dow lesdi, diga keerol duniyaaru ngo'ol haa ngola. Walaa mo woyata …ďe koo moo…ďtata …ďe koo uwata …ďe. ∆Āalli ma…ď…ďe mbaaloto bana koonal haa lesdi.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah25:34 Mboye, onon ardii…ďe mba…óe bojji. Talle nder mbulwuldi, onon jaagor…ďe yim…ďe moo…óon, saa'i hirsugo on wa…ói, haa on ndo'o, on pusa bana fayannde marnde saman."
Jeremiah25:35 Laawol hisugo woodaa ngam ardii…ďe, jaagor…ďe yim…ďe nda…óataa."
Jeremiah25:36 Ardii…ďe …óon mboya, jaagor…ďe yim…ďe …óon uuma, ngam Jawmiraawo …óon wonna les…óe ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah25:37 Les…óe ma…ď…ďe de'it…óe kalki ngam tikkere Jawmiraawo saatunde.
Jeremiah25:38 O acci yim…ďe maako bana mbarooga wurtorto lowol mum, ngam tikkere maako saatunde e kaafahi maako kulniiki ngartiri lesdi fuu ladde meere."
Jeremiah26:1 Saa'i Yooyakim …ďii Yusiya fu…ó…ói laamaago nder lesdi Yahuuda, Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya."
Jeremiah26:2 Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúDara haa daldal haykaliiru, yeccu yim…ďe war…ďe diga gure Yahuuda ngam sujidango yam fuu ko mi umri ma fuu, taa ittu koo wolde woore."
Jeremiah26:3 Teema …ďe nanan, …ďe fuu …ďe lorto diga laabi ma…ď…ďe kallu…ói. Nden kam mi faasitan wa…óugo …ďe sarru ngu anninmi ukkango …ďe daliila kuu…óe ma…ď…ďe kallu…óe."
Jeremiah26:4 Yeccu …ďe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Nanee…óam, …óowtane tawreeta ka ndokkumi on,"
Jeremiah26:5 kakkilane bolle sukaa…ďe am annabi'en …ďe tokkiimi nelugo haa moo…óon. Ammaa on nanaay.
Jeremiah26:6 To on …óowtanaaki yam, nden kam mi wa…óan nokkuure nde'e bana mbaarumi Silo. Ummaatooje duniyaaru fuu naaliran bee innde berniwol ngo'ol.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah26:7 Liman'en e annabi'en e ummaatoore fuu ke…óiti yaake Yeremiya wolwi bolle …óe'e haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.
Jeremiah26:8 Nde Yeremiya timmini wolwugo ko Jawmiraawo umruno mo o wolwana ummaatoore fuu, liman'en e annabi'en e ummaatoore fuu naŇčngi mo, kooli: ‚ÄúA he'i mbareego!"
Jeremiah26:9 Koni mba…ó…óa annabaaku bee innde Jawmiraawo, mbi'…óa: Suudu ndu'u laatoto bana Silo, berniwol ngo'ol boo laatoto winnde, walaa go…ó…óo joo…óoto ton.‚ÄĚ Nden ummaatoore fuu moo…ďotiri dow Yeremiya haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo."
Jeremiah26:10 Nde ardii…ďe Yahuuda nani haala man, …ďe ummi diga laamii…óo …ďe ngari haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo, …ďe njoo…ói baŇčnge Dammugal Kesal ngal haykaliiru haa …ďe mba…óa kiita."
Jeremiah26:11 Nden liman'en e annabi'en mbi'i ardii…ďe e ummaatoore fuu: ‚ÄúGorko oo he'i kiita mbareego, ngam o wa…ói annabaaku dow berniwol ngo'ol, onon fuu on nani bee noppi moo…óon!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah26:12 Ammaa Yeremiya wi'i ardii…ďe e ummaatoore fuu: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo neli yam wa…óugo annabaaku dow suudu ndu'u e berniwol ngo'ol, bana ko nan…óon."
Jeremiah26:13 Ammaa jonta mbo'ine laabi mon e kuu…óe mon kadi. Nane bolle Jawmiraawo Allah mon. Nden kam Jawmiraawo faasitan ukkango on sarru ngu o wi'no.
Jeremiah26:14 Min kam, ndaa yam haa juu…óe mon. Mba…óee…óam ko fottani on."
Jeremiah26:15 Ammaa annde fakat: To on mbari yam, nden kam on mbari go…ó…óo mo walaa aybe, on ndoondoto aybe ∆īii∆īam dow ko'e mon e dow berniwol ngo'ol e dow yim…ďe maagol. Ngam gooŇčga, Jawmiraawo neli yam haa moo…óon, mi yecca on kuuje …óe'e fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah26:16 Nden ardii…ďe e ummaatoore fuu mbi'i liman'en e annabi'en: ‚ÄúGorko oo he'aay kiita mbareego, ngam o wolwani en bee innde Jawmiraawo Allah mee…óen.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah26:17 ∆Āaawo man wo…ó…ďe caka ndotti'en ummi, mbi'i ummaatoore moo…ďtiinde:"
Jeremiah26:18 ‚ÄúNder zamanu laamii…óo Hezekiya, Mika mo Moraset wa…óani yim…ďe Yahuuda fuu annabaaku, yecci …ďe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i: Konne'en ndeman Siyona bana ngesa, Urusaliima laatoto bille, hooseere haa haykaliiru woni laatoto towndiire guu…ďe."
Jeremiah26:19 Laamii…óo Hezekiya e yim…ďe Yahuuda fuu mbaraay Mika. Ammaa Hezekiya huli Jawmiraawo, tori mo …óuu…ó…óum. Jawmiraawo boo faasiti ukkango …ďe sarru ngu o wi'no. Enen jonta en …óon nastina ko'e mee…óen nder sarru naawŇčgu.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah26:20 Woodi boo go…ó…óo feere mo wa…ói annabaaku bee innde Jawmiraawo, innde maako Uriya …ďii Semaya mo Kiriyat-Ye'arim. KaŇčko o wolwi dow berniwol ngo'ol e lesdi ndi'i bana Yeremiya wolwiri."
Jeremiah26:21 Nde laamii…óo Yooyakim e honoo…ďe muu…óum e ardii…ďe muu…óum fuu nani bolle Uriya, laamii…óo tefi mbarugo mo. Ammaa Uriya faami …óum, o hultori, o doggi haa Misra."
Jeremiah26:22 Nden laamii…óo Yooyakim neli Elnatan …ďii Akbor bee wor…ďe wo…ó…ďe haa Misra.
Jeremiah26:23 ∆Āe ngaddi Uriya diga ton, …ďe njahri mo yeeso laamii…óo Yooyakim. O mbari mo, o wudini mo nder ngaska ngoota bee mbaraa…ďe wo…ó…ďe."
Jeremiah26:24 Ahikam …ďii Safan faddi Yeremiya, ngam taa o hokke haa juu…óe ummaatoore yi…ónde mbargo mo."
Jeremiah27:1 Nde Sedekiya …ďii Yusiya fu…ó…ói laamaago nder lesdi Yahuuda, Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya."
Jeremiah27:2 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i mo: ‚ÄúWa…óan hoore ma ka…ď…ďirgal e …ďoggi, yow ngal dow daande ma."
Jeremiah27:3 Nden neldu …óum laamii…ďe Edoom e Mo'ab e Ammoon e Tirus e Sidon, bee nelaa…ďe ma…ď…ďe war…ďe haa Urusaliima ngam laarugo laamii…óo Sedekiya."
Jeremiah27:4 Yeccu …ďe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila umri on wi'ugo jaagor…ďe mon:"
Jeremiah27:5 Min bee baaw…óe am maw…óe e juŇčngo am fortaaŇčgo tagrumi lesdi e yim…ďe e dabbaaji gon…ói dow maari. Mi hokkan …óum haa juŇčngo mo ngi…ómi.
Jeremiah27:6 Min hokki ummaatooje …óe'e fuu haa juŇčngo suka am Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila. Mi hokki mo koo kuuje ladde boo haa …óe kuuwana mo."
Jeremiah27:7 Ummaatooje fuu njagganto mo. ∆äe njagganto …ďi…ó…óo maako e taaniraawo maako boo, sey to saa'i wari haa ummaatooje …óuu…ó…óe e laamii…ďe mar…ďe baaw…óe …óowtina ummaatoore maako, kayre boo."
Jeremiah27:8 To ummaatoore wonnde malla laamu salake jagganaago Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila, ja…ďaay ka…ď…ďirgal laamu maako, nden kam mi hiitoto ummaatoore man bee konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu, haa to mi nattini ummaatoore nde'e bee juŇčngo maako."
Jeremiah27:9 Taa nanane annabi'en mon, koo laaroo…ďe mon, koo hoy…óoo…ďe mon, koo wa…óoo…ďe hatti, koo hiila'en wi'an…ďe on: On njaggantaako laamii…óo Baabila."
Jeremiah27:10 ∆Āe …óon mba…óa on annabaaku fewre haa …ďe ndaayna on e lesdi mon, haa mi riiwa on, on kalka."
Jeremiah27:11 Ammaa to ummaatoore ja…ďi ka…ď…ďirgal laamii…óo Baabila, huuwani mo, nden kam mi accan nde nde tokko remugo lesdi maare, nde joo…óo ton.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah27:12 Yeremiya yecci Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, habaru man. O wi'i: ‚ÄúNja…ďe ka…ď…ďirgal laamii…óo Baabila dow daa…óe mon, kuuwane ummaatoore maako, nden on ngee…óan."
Jeremiah27:13 Walaa haaje on maayra bee konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu, an e ummaatoore ma! Ngam Jawmiraawo wi'i kanjum laatanto ummaatoore koo ndeyeere nde sali jagganaago laamii…óo Baabila."
Jeremiah27:14 Taa nane bolle annabi'en wi'an…ďe on: On njaggantaako laamii…óo Baabila. Ngam …ďe …óon mba…óa on annabaaku fewre.
Jeremiah27:15 Jawmiraawo wi'i: Min kam, mi nelaay …ďe, …ďe …óon pewa bee innde am, haa mi riiwa on, on kalka, onon e fewan…ďe on wi'an…ďe …ďe annabi'en.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah27:16 Nden Yeremiya wolwani liman'en e ummaatoore fuu: ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Taa nane bolle annabi'en mon wa…óanan…ďe on annabaaku ni'i: Yeeso se…ó…óa …ďe ngartiran kuuwru…óe haykaliiru Jawmiraawo diga Baabila. ∆Āe …óon pewana on.
Jeremiah27:17 Taa nanane …ďe. Njaggane laamii…óo Baabila, nden on ngee…óan. Walaa haaje berniwol ngo'ol laato bille!"
Jeremiah27:18 To kam…ďe …ďe laati annabi'en fakat, to wolde am …óon wondi bee ma…ď…ďe, sey …ďe toro yam min Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, ngam taa kuuwru…óe luttu…óe nder haykaliiru am e nder saare laamii…óo Yahuuda e nder Urusaliima njahre haa Baabila."
Jeremiah27:19 Saa'i Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila dahi Yekoniya …ďii Yooyakim, laamii…óo Yahuuda e teddu…ďe Yahuuda e Urusaliima fuu haa Baabila, o acci daŇčraŇčge e ko wi'ete loonde mawnde e kuuwru…óe go…ó…óe nder Urusaliima."
Jeremiah27:20 
Jeremiah27:21 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i dow kuuwru…óe luttu…óe nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo e nder saare laamii…óo Yahuuda e nder Urusaliima fuu:"
Jeremiah27:22 ∆Āe ndahan …óe haa Baabila. Ton …óe ngonata, sey to mi yaali …óe fahin. Nden mi hooran …óe haa nokkuure nde'e.‚ÄĚ Nii Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah28:1 Hitaande man, waato nder nduu…ďu Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, naya…ďu, nder lewru jowa…ďru, annabi Hananiya …ďii Azzuru mo wuro Gibiyon wolwani Yeremiya nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo yeeso liman'en e ummaatoore fuu, o wi'i:"
Jeremiah28:2 ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Mi yewan ka…ď…ďirgal laamii…óo Baabila."
Jeremiah28:3 Hiddeko duu…ďi …ói…ói timma, ngartiranmi kuuwru…óe haykaliiru am fuu haa nokkuure nde'e. Kuuwru…óe …óe'e, Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila hoocuno …óe haa …óo, yahri …óe haa Baabila."
Jeremiah28:4 Mi wartiran boo Yekoniya …ďii Yooyakim, laamii…óo Yahuuda e dahaa…ďe diga Yahuuda haa Baabila fuu. Ngam mi yewan ka…ď…ďirgal laamii…óo Baabila. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah28:5 Annabi Yeremiya jaabi annabi Hananiya yeeso liman'en e ummaatoore dariinde nder haykaliiru Jawmiraawo fuu.
Jeremiah28:6 O wi'i: ‚ÄúAamiina, Jawmiraawo wa…ó …óum! Jawmiraawo hebbitina ko mbi'…óa, o wartira kuuwru…óe haykaliiru maako e dahaa…ďe fuu diga Baabila!"
Jeremiah28:7 Tan nii nan wolde nde mbi'anmaami, an e ummaatoore fuu:"
Jeremiah28:8 Annabi'en aartu…ďe en, kam…ďe boo …ďe mba…ói annabaaku dow les…óe …óuu…ó…óe e laamuuji maw…ói. ∆Āe mbolwi haala konu e sarru e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu."
Jeremiah28:9 Ammaa mo wa…ói annabaaku jam ‚Äď to jam man laatake, nden kam koo moy anndan o annabiijo mo Jawmiraawo neli …óum fakat.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah28:10 Annabi Hananiya hooci ka…ď…ďirgal dow daande annabi Yeremiya go, yewi ngal."
Jeremiah28:11 Nden o wolwi yeeso ummaatoore fuu: ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Bana nii ngewranmi ka…ď…ďirgal ngal Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila wallini dow ummaatooje fuu, hiddeko duu…ďi …ói…ói timma.‚ÄĚ Nden Yeremiya dilli."
Jeremiah28:12 ∆Āaawo nde annabi Hananiya yewi ka…ď…ďirgal dow daande annabi Yeremiya, Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, wi'i mo:"
Jeremiah28:13 ‚ÄúYah yeccu Hananiya: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: A yewi ka…ď…ďirgal ngal leggal, ammaa a jo'ina ngal njamndi haa pellel maagal."
Jeremiah28:14 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Mi wallini ka…ď…ďirgal ngal njamndi dow ummaatooje fuu ngam …óe njaggano Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila. Koo kuuje ladde boo njagganto mo.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah28:15 Nden annabi Yeremiya wi'i annabi Hananiya: ‚ÄúNan, Hananiya! Jawmiraawo nelaay ma. A …óon esta yim…ďe …ďe nu…ó…óina fewre."
Jeremiah28:16 Ngam maajum, ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi sottinte e lesdi ndi'i. A maayan hikka, ngam a esti ummaatoore haa nde tuurtana Jawmiraawo!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah28:17 Annabi Hananiya maayi hitaande man nden, nder lewru jowee…ói…óa…ďru."
Jeremiah29:1 Diga Urusaliima, annabi Yeremiya winndi bataakewol haa luttu…ďe ndotti'en e liman'en e annabi'en e ummaatoore fuu …ďe Nabukodonosor dahino diga Urusaliima haa Baabila."
Jeremiah29:2 O winndi ngol …ďaawo laamii…óo Yekoniya e daada mum e saraaki'en mum e ardii…ďe Yahuuda e Urusaliima e kila'en e wor…ďe wa…óoo…ďe sanaa'a fuu ndilli diga Urusaliima.
Jeremiah29:3 Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda neli El'aasa …ďii Safan e Gemariya …ďii Hilkiyya haa Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila. ∆Āe njahri bataakewol go. Ndaa ko winnda nder maagol:"
Jeremiah29:4 ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i dahaa…ďe …ďe o dahi diga Urusaliima haa Baabila fuu:"
Jeremiah29:5 Mahe cuu…ói, njoo…óe nder maaji. Mba…óe jarne, nyaame ko rimata nder maaje."
Jeremiah29:6 Te'e rew…ďe, ndanyde …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe e rew…ďe. Te'ane …ďi…ď…ďe mon wor…ďe, te'ne …ďi…ď…ďe mon rew…ďe, ngam haa kam…ďe boo …ďe ke…ďa …ďikkoy. ∆äuu…óe haa Baabila, taa uste!"
Jeremiah29:7 Kakkilane salaaman berniwol ngol ndahmi on, toree…óam ngam maagol. Ngam to ngol he…ďi salaaman, onon boo on ke…ďan salaaman."
Jeremiah29:8 Min Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila, mi wi'i on: Taa acce annabi'en won…ďe caka moo…óon malla wa…óoo…ďe hatti esta on, taa kakkilane koy…ói …ói …ďe koy…óata."
Jeremiah29:9 ∆Āe …óon mba…óa on annabaaku fewre bee innde am, min mi nelaay …ďe‚ÄĚ ‚Äď non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah29:10 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúTo Baabila wa…ói duu…ďi cappan…óe jowee…ói…ói, mi yaalan on fahin. Nden mi hebbitinan wolde am woonde haa mi hoora on haa lesdi mon."
Jeremiah29:11 Mi anndi nufayeeje am dow moo…óon. Mi …óon nufano on hayru, naa sarru, haa nyal…óe mon garan…óe keewa tammunde ‚Äď non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah29:12 On ewnoto yam, on ngaran ngam on toro yam, min boo mi ja…ďan tornde moo…óon."
Jeremiah29:13 On …óa…ď…ďitittam, on tawatam boo, ngam on …óa…ď…ďitittam bee …ďernde woore."
Jeremiah29:14 Fakat on tawatam. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i. Mi wartiran joonde mon bana naane, mi wurtinan on diga ummaatooje e nokkuuje haa ndiiwmi on fuu, mi hoora on haa lesdi ndi njoo…óinoo…óon hiddeko mi daha on. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah29:15 On …óon mbi'a Jawmiraawo hokki on annabi'en haa Baabila.
Jeremiah29:16 Nane ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow laamii…óo joo…óii…óo dow leeso laamu Daawuda e banndiraa…ďe mon luttu…ďe haa Urusaliima fuu, …ďe ndahaaka bee moo…óon."
Jeremiah29:17 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i: Mi nelan konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu caka ma…ď…ďe. Mi laatinan …ďe bana ibbe nyol…óe …óe yim…ďe ngi…óaa nyaamugo ngam …óe mbonnake masin.
Jeremiah29:18 Mi taasnan …ďe bee konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu, mi laatinan …ďe nyiddu…ďe haa laamuuji duniyaaru fuu. Koo toy haa caŇčkitanmi …ďe, yim…ďe kultoran, ku…óan, njancan …ďe, naaliran bee innde ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah29:19 Kanjum fuu …óum laatoto ngam …ďe …óowtanaaki bolle am …óe tokkiimi neldugo haa ma…ď…ďe bee kunndu…óe sukaa…ďe am annabi'en, …ďe cali nanugo. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah29:20 Ammaa onon dahaa…ďe …ďe ngurtinmi Urusaliima, njahrumi haa Baabila, nane ko mbi'anmi on, min Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah29:21 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i dow Akab …ďii Kolaya e Sedekiya …ďii Ma'aseya, wa…óan…ďe on annabaaku fewre bee innde am: ‚ÄúMi hokki …ďe haa juŇčngo Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila, haa o mbara …ďe dow gite mon."
Jeremiah29:22 To go…ó…óo nder dahaa…ďe diga Urusaliima haa Baabila yi…ói naalugo go…ó…óo feere, o wi'an: Jawmiraawo laatine bana Sedekiya e Akab …ďe laamii…óo Baabila sa'i bee yiite!"
Jeremiah29:23 Kanjum woni kiita ma…ď…ďe, ngam …ďe kuuwi cemtinii…óum nder Isra'iila, …ďe mba…ói njeenu bee rew…ďe heeddi…ó…óiraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe, …ďe mbolwi pewe bee innde am, asee boo walaa ko umrumi …ďe. Min mi anndi, mi ceedoowo dow ma…ď…ďe. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah29:24 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yeremiya: ‚ÄúYeccu Semaya Nehelamiijo:
Jeremiah29:25 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: A neldi bataakeeji bee innde maa…óa haa ummaatoore Urusaliima fuu, non boo haa limanjo Sefaniya …ďii Ma'aseya e liman'en fuu. Nder bataakeeji man a wi'i Sefaniya:"
Jeremiah29:26 Jawmiraawo darni ma a limanjo haa pellel Yoyada limanjo, a hooreejo haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo haa a naŇčnga yinnaa…ďe wi'an…ďe …ďe annabi'en, a ha…ď…ďa …ďe bee callalluuji e bee njamndi taarotoondi daa…óe ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah29:27 Koni a felaay Yeremiya mo Anatot mo wolwani on bana annabiijo?
Jeremiah29:28 Jonta boo o neldi min habaru haa Baabila, o winndi: Ko…óamku mon duuran, ngam maajum mahe cuu…ói, njoo…óe nder ton, mba…óe jarne, nyaame ko rimata nder maaje.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah29:29 Limanjo Sefaniya jaŇčngani annabi Yeremiya bataakewol ngo'ol.
Jeremiah29:30 Nden Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, o wi'i:"
Jeremiah29:31 ‚ÄúNeldu habaru haa dahaa…ďe fuu, yeccu …ďe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Semaya Nehelamiijo: Mi hiitoto mo e danygol maako. Mi nelaay mo, ammaa o wolwani on bana annabiijo, o esti on haa on nu…ó…óina fewre. Mi accantaa mo danygol caka moo…óon, o mee…óataa yi'ugo boo…ó…óum ko mba…óananmi ummaatoore am, ngam o yer…ďi ummaatoore haa nde tuurtanammi. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah29:32 
Jeremiah30:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya.
Jeremiah30:2 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúWinndu bolle …óe mbi'maami fuu haa deftere."
Jeremiah30:3 Ngam nyalaade mi wartirta joonde yim…ďe ummaatoore am Isra'iila e Yahuuda bana naane …óon wara. Mi hooran …ďe haa lesdi ndi marnumi kaakiraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe, …ďe mara ndi fahin.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah30:4 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Isra'iila e Yahuuda:
Jeremiah30:5 ‚ÄúMi nani wookaandu kultoreeŇčgol e kulol, ngam salaaman woodaa."
Jeremiah30:6 ∆≥ame go…ó…óo: Gorko mee…ói …ďesnugo na? Ngam …óume mi …óon yi'a wor…ďe fuu bee juu…óe muu…óum'en dow keeci muu…óum'en, kal-kal bee debbo …ďesnan…óo? Ngam …óume geese ma…ď…ďe pur…ói?"
Jeremiah30:7 Kayto! Nyalaade hulniinde …óon wara, nanndu maare walaa. ∆äum wakkati …ďillaare ngam danygol Yaakubu, ammaa …ďe kisan nde.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah30:8 Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i: ‚ÄúNyalaade man ngewanmi ka…ď…ďirgal dow daa…óe ma…ď…ďe, mi ta'an callalluuji ma…ď…ďe, ngam taa …ďe tokko jagganaago janan…ďe."
Jeremiah30:9 Ammaa …ďe njagganto Jawmiraawo Allah ma…ď…ďe e laamii…óo ma…ď…ďe Daawuda mo umminanmi ngam ma…ď…ďe.
Jeremiah30:10 Onon yim…ďe danygol suka am Yaakubu, taa kule! Onon yim…ďe Isra'iila, taa kultore! Ndaa mi hisnan on e lesdi ndaayiindi ndi daheeki, ndi laatii…óon ha…ď…ďaa…ďe e muu…óum. Danygol Yaakubu wartan, joo…óoto bee jam e de'ere, walaa kulnan…óo …ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah30:11 Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúMi …óon wondi bee moo…óon ngam hisnugo on. Mi nattinan ummaatooje fuu haa caŇčkititmi on. Ammaa onon, mi nattintaa on. Mi eltan on fakat, ammaa mi eltan on deydey, mi laarataa on bana on ngalaano aybe.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah30:12 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i Urusaliima: ‚ÄúNaawnere ma nyawndataako, kuuduuje ma kurgataako."
Jeremiah30:13 Walaa jiŇčngan…óo ma, walaa lekki ngam …ďuule ma, walaa nyawndeeki."
Jeremiah30:14 Waaye'en ma fuu ngejjiti ma, acci suklanaago ma. Mi fiyi ma bana konneejo fiyrata, mi …ďocci ma naaw…óum masin, ngam halleende ma mawni, hakkeeji ma …óuu…ói."
Jeremiah30:15 Koni mboyata ngam piy…óe ma, ngam kuuduuje ma nyawndataako? Mi wa…ói ma …óum, ngam halleende ma mawni, hakkeeji ma …óuu…ói."
Jeremiah30:16 Ammaa mo…óoo…ďe ma, …ďe mo…óetee…ďe. Konne'en maa…óa fuu …ďe ndahetee…ďe. Ja…ďtoo…ďe ma, wo…ó…ďe nja…ďtan kuuje ma…ď…ďe. Wiloo…ďe ma boo, mi nelan wo…ó…ďe ngam wilugo cuu…ói ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah30:17 Min mi yam…óitinte, mi hurgan kuuduuje ma, koo to konne'en ma …óon mbi'a: Siyona wudinaama, walaa cuklanii…óo ngol.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah30:18 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúMi wartiran joonde danygol Yaakubu bana naane, mi en…óoto ci'e ma…ď…ďe fuu. ∆Āe nyi…ďtoto berniwol ngo'ol dow towndiire, …ďe njo'itinan laamorde haa babal maare."
Jeremiah30:19 Joo…óotoo…ďe ton ngiman maŇčgtooje, koolan bee seyo. Mi …óu…ó…óinan …ďe, …ďe ustataako. Mi teddinan …ďe, …ďe leestintaake."
Jeremiah30:20 Danygol Yaakubu laatoto bana naane, moo…ďtorde ma…ď…ďe tabitan yeeso am. Mi hiitoto toonyoo…ďe …ďe fuu."
Jeremiah30:21 Hooreejo ma…ď…ďe iwan caka ma…ď…ďe, go…ó…óo ummaatoore ma…ď…ďe laamanto …ďe. Mi ewnoto mo haa o …ďadito yam. Ngam moy hulataa …ďaditaago yam? Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah30:22 On laatoto ummaatoore am, min boo mi laatoto Allah moo…óon‚ÄĚ."
Jeremiah30:23 Ndaa Jawmiraawo tuurti! Tikkere maako saatunde ummake! Nde …óon bana duluuru ukkotoondu dow ko'e hallu…ďe. Nde jinnataa, sonaa to o timmini ko o annini fuu. Haa timmoode bal…óe, on paaman …óum laa…ď…óum."
Jeremiah30:24 
Jeremiah31:1 Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúSaa'i maajum mi laatoto Allah ngam ci'e yim…ďe Isra'iila fuu, kam…ďe boo …ďe laatoto ummaatoore am."
Jeremiah31:2 Yim…ďe da…ó…ďe kaafahi ke…ďi mo'ere nder ladde. Isra'iila …ďadi he…ďugo de'ere.
Jeremiah31:3 Jawmiraawo waŇčgani …ďe diga daayii…óum, wi'i: Onon yim…ďe am, diga …ďooyma mi yi…ói on, ngam man mi …óon tokko mo'ango on."
Jeremiah31:4 Mi darnitan on haa on ndaro, onon yim…ďe Isra'iila. On ngurtoto fahin bee baw…ói, on ngama bee seyo."
Jeremiah31:5 On njuboto gese inabooje fahin dow kooseeje Samariya, remoo…ďe …óe nyaaman ko …ďe njubi."
Jeremiah31:6 Fakat saa'i …óon wara haa aynoo…ďe koola dow kooseeje Efrayim: Umme, njehenma Siyona haa Jawmiraawo Allah men!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah31:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúMba…óe hoolo seyo ngam daliila Yaakubu, mbelmbelte ngam ummaatoore …ďurnde mawnugo. Ngooyne maŇčgtoore, mbi'e: Jawmiraawo, hisnu yim…ďe ummaatoore ma, luttu…ďe Isra'iila!"
Jeremiah31:8 Ndaa, mi wartiran …ďe diga lesdi woyla, mi moo…ďtan …ďe diga keerol duniyaaru …ďurŇčgol daayaago. Bum…óo e boos…óo ngardan bee ma…ď…ďe, reedu'en e …ďesnan…ďe fuu, moo…ďtorde mawnde wartata haa …óo."
Jeremiah31:9 ∆Āe ngardan bee bojji, …ďe toroto yam saa'i mi …óon …óowa …ďe. Mi yahran …ďe haa maaje ndiyam, dow laawol boo…óŇčgol ngam taa …ďe pergo. Ngam mi laatani Isra'iila bana baaba, Efrayim boo woni afo am.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah31:10 Onon ummaatooje, nane koŇčngol Jawmiraawo, anndine ngol haa duu…óe daayii…óe! Mbi'e: ‚ÄúMo saŇčkiti Isra'iila'en, moo…ďtan …ďe, aynan …ďe bana gaynaako aynirta tokkere mum.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah31:11 Ngam Jawmiraawo sootti yim…ďe Yaakubu, rim…óini …ďe diga juŇčngo …ďur…óo …ďe semmbe."
Jeremiah31:12 ∆Āe ngaran, …ďe mbelmbeltan dow hooseere Siyona, seyo ma…ď…ďe waŇčgan daliila barkaaji Jawmiraawo, waato alkamaari e inaboojam e nebbam e baali e na'i …óum o hokki …ďe. ∆Āe laatoto bana jarne cafaa…óe, …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe meetataa torraago."
Jeremiah31:13 Nden faany…ďe ngaman bee seyo, suka'en e ndotti'en fuu ceyoto. Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúMi de'itinan …ďe, haa bojji ma…ď…ďe laato seyo, torra …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe laato welwelo."
Jeremiah31:14 Mi haarnan liman'en bee kusel marŇčgel …ďellere, mi hebbinan ummaatoore am bee kuuje am boo…ó…óe.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah31:15 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúGookaali ummi haa Rama, bojji kaa…ó…ói e yooyooji …óuu…ói. ∆äum Rahiilu …óon woya …ďikkoy mum. O sali de'itineego, ngam koy maayi.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah31:16 Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúAccu woyugo e ilnugo gon…ói! Mbarjaari torra ma …óon, …ďikkoy ma ngartan diga lesdi konne'en."
Jeremiah31:17 Yeeso …óo, tammunde …óon ngam maa…óa, …ďikkoy ma ngartan haa lesdi muu…óum'en.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah31:18 ‚ÄúMi nani yim…ďe Efrayim …óon mboya, …óon mbi'a: Yaa Jawmiraawo, a elti min. Minin boo min nja…ďi elto ma bana ga'i …ói eltaaka. Lortin min, nden min lortoto, ngam an woni Jawmiraawo Allah amin."
Jeremiah31:19 Min ngayliti, min acci ma, ammaa jonta min …óon mimsito. Min ke…ďti hakkiilo amin, ngam man min piyi bi…ď…ďe amin. Min cemti, min toskake, ngam min mba…ói aybe, saa'i min derke'en tawon."
Jeremiah31:20 An Efrayim, a …ďi…ó…óo am gi…óaa…óo, a …ďiŇčngel am ngel …ďurmi yi…ógo. Nde ngi…ómi felugo ma fuu, mi siftoran no mi yi…óiri ma. Ngam maajum …ďernde am …óon waylo nder am, mi hinnoto ma fakat.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah31:21 ‚ÄúDarnu alaamaaji, jo'in maandor…óe haa laawol. He…ďtu laawol ngol tokkinoo…óa. Wartu, Isra'iila, wartu haa berniiji maa…óa!"
Jeremiah31:22 Haa ndey on accata yiilaago, onon tuurtu…ďe? Ndaa, min Jawmiraawo mi tagi go…ó…óum kesum haa duniyaaru: Debbo muuyan gorko!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah31:23 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúTo mi wartiri joonde yim…ďe bana naane, …ďe mbi'an fahin nder lesdi Yahuuda e nder gure maari: Jawmiraawo barki…óin Urusaliima, joo…óorde adilaaku, hooseere seniinde!"
Jeremiah31:24 Yim…ďe njoo…óoto nder lesdi Yahuuda e nder gure maari fuu, hawtaade bee remoo…ďe e waynaa…ďe bee tokke muu…óum'en."
Jeremiah31:25 Mi semmbi…óinan koo moy com…óo, mi haarnan koo moy dol…óo.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah31:26 Nden Yeremiya fini, tawi …óoyŇčgol muu…óum weli!"
Jeremiah31:27 Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúSaa'i …óon wara haa mi hebbina lesdi Isra'iila e lesdi Yahuuda bee yim…ďe e dabbaaji.
Jeremiah31:28 Bana mi ti…ó…óiniri …óoofugo e fe'ugo, ngam halkugo e yibbingo e wonnugo, bana non mi ti…ó…óiniran nyi…ďtaago e jubaago …ďe.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah31:29 ‚ÄúSaa'i man …ďe meetataa wi'ugo: Baabiraa…ďe muri lammu…óum, ammaa …óum nyii'e …ďikkoy mbaati."
Jeremiah31:30 Naa non, ammaa koo moy muri lammu…óum, nyii'e mum tan mbaatata. Koo moy maayan ngam hakkeeji muu…óum tan.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah31:31 Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúNyal…óe …óon ngara haa mi ha…ď…ďa alkawal kesal bee yim…ďe Isra'iila e yim…ďe Yahuuda.
Jeremiah31:32 Ngal laatataako bana alkawal ngal ka…ď…ďumi bee kaakiraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe nyannde mi naŇčngi juu…óe ma…ď…ďe ngam wurtingo …ďe lesdi Misra. Koo mi laati jawmii…ďe, kam…ďe …ďe piisti alkawal bee am."
Jeremiah31:33 Ammaa to saa'i man wari, mi ha…ď…ďan alkawal bee yim…ďe Isra'iila bana ni'i: Mi nastinan tawreeta am nder hakkiilooji ma…ď…ďe, mi winndan ka nder …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe. Min mi laatoto Allah ma…ď…ďe, kam…ďe boo …ďe laatoto ummaatoore am."
Jeremiah31:34 Walaa haaje go…ó…óo ekkitina keeddi…ó…óum malla deer…óum, wi'a mo: Anndu Jawmiraawo. Ngam …ďe fuu …ďe anndatam, diga lees…óo ma…ď…ďe haa maw…óo ma…ď…ďe. Ngam mi yaafoto aybeeji ma…ď…ďe, mi meetataa siftorgo hakkeeji ma…ď…ďe.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah31:35 Jawmiraawo jo'ini naaŇčge ngam yaynugo nyalawma, lewru e koode boo ngam yaynugo jemma. O …óon ummina mbeela haa ∆īuuge maaga koola. Innde maako Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama. KaŇčko o wi'i: ‚ÄúSonaa to umrooje …óowan…óe tagefo …óe'e nafataa fahin, ummaatoore Isra'iila tabitittaako ummaatoore yeeso am."
Jeremiah31:36 
Jeremiah31:37 To go…ó…óo waawi foondugo asamanji e wi…óitaago ca…ď…ďaaje lesdi, nden kam mi wudinan yim…ďe Isra'iila fuu ngam kuu…óe ma…ď…ďe.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah31:38 ‚ÄúSaa'i …óon wara nde yim…ďe nyi…ďtoto berniwol ngo'ol, diga suudu Hananiyel towndu haa Dammugal Toldu.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah31:39 ‚ÄúDiga ton keerol maagol yahan gal hiirnaaŇčge haa yotto towndiire Gareb, nden ngol waylititto, ngol yahan Go'a."
Jeremiah31:40 Waadiwol nyawman…óe e ndoondi e babe fuu haa yotto maayel Kederon, haa yotto Dammugal Pucci haa fuunaaŇčge, …óum fuu …óum laatoto cenaa…óum ngam Jawmiraawo, …óum meetataa yibbineego koo halkeego haa foroy.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah32:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya nder nduu…ďu Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, sappoowu. ∆äum nduu…ďu Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila, sappo e joweetata…ďu."
Jeremiah32:2 Saa'i man honoo…ďe laamii…óo Baabila …óon kippo Urusaliima. Annabi Yeremiya o ka…ď…ďaa…óo haa daldal saare laamii…óo Yahuuda haa …ďe aynata naŇčngaa…ďe.
Jeremiah32:3 Laamii…óo Sedekiya ma…ď…ďi mo ton, wulli mo ngam Yeremiya wa…óno annabaaku, wi'no: ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi hokkan berniwol ngo'ol haa juŇčngo laamii…óo Baabila, o nyaaman ngol."
Jeremiah32:4 Laamii…óo Sedekiya da…óataa Kaldiya'en, ngam mi hokkan mo haa juŇčngo laamii…óo Baabila, o laaran mo gite bee gite, o wolidan bee maako."
Jeremiah32:5 O yahran Sedekiya haa Baabila. Ton o joo…óoto haa saa'i mi yaali mo fahin. Koo to on ka…ďi bee Kaldiya'en, on ke…ďataa jaalorgal sam.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah32:6 Yeremiya wi'i: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo wolwani yam, wi'i:"
Jeremiah32:7 Hananiyel …ďii bappa ma Sallum, waran haa maa…óa, wi'an: Soodu ngesa am haa Anatot, ngam an woni banndam …ďadii…óo, mo woodi laawol soottugo ka."
Jeremiah32:8 ∆äum laati bana Jawmiraawo wi'no. Hananiyel, …ďii bappa am wari haa daldal saare laamii…óo go, wi'i yam: Soodu ngesa am haa Anatot nder lesdi Benyamin, ngam a woodi laawol soottugo ka. Soodu ka ngam hoore maa…óa. Nden mi annditi …óum wolde Jawmiraawo."
Jeremiah32:9 Mi soodi ngesa man haa Anatot e juŇčngo Hananiyel, …ďii bappa am, mi yo…ďi mo ceede cardi sappo e jowee…ói…ói."
Jeremiah32:10 Mi winndi …óereewol coggu, mi ma…ď…ďi ngol, mi wa…óani ngol lammba, mi seedni ngol seedoo…ďe, mi awni ceede man dow awnor…óum."
Jeremiah32:11 Nden mi hoo'i …óereewol coggu ma…ď…ďaaŇčgol e misaaluwol maagol ma…ď…ďitiiŇčgol.
Jeremiah32:12 Mi hokki …óereeji man …ói…ói fuu haa Baruku …ďii Neriya …ďii Mahaseya, gite Hananiyel …ďii bappa am e seedoo…ďe wa…ó…ďe juu…óe muu…óum'en haa …óereewol coggu e Yahuudu'en joo…óii…ďe nder daldal saare go."
Jeremiah32:13 Nden mi umri Baruku yeeso ma…ď…ďe, mi wi'i:"
Jeremiah32:14 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Hoo'u …óereeji coggu …ói'i, ma…ď…ďaaŇčgol e misaaluwol maagol ma…ď…ďitiiŇčgol, resu …ói nder mbulku, ngam haa …ói nduura ton duu…ďi …óuu…ó…ói."
Jeremiah32:15 Ngam min Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila, mi wi'i: Yim…ďe coodan fahin cuu…ói e gese inabooje e gese go…ó…óe nder lesdi ndi'i.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah32:16 Nde mi hokki Baruku …ďii Neriya …óereewol coggu go, mi tori Jawmiraawo:"
Jeremiah32:17 ‚ÄúYaa Allah Jawmiraawo, an a tagi asama e lesdi bee baaw…óe ma maw…óe e juŇčngo ma fortaaŇčgo. Walaa ko salorte!"
Jeremiah32:18 A …óon mo'ana gide ujineeje, a …óon hiito aybe baabiraa…ďe haa …ďi…ď…ďe ma…ď…ďe. An woni Allah maw…óo, baaw…óo, innde ma Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama!"
Jeremiah32:19 Nufayeeje ma e kuu…óe ma …óe maw…óe. Gite ma …óon ndaara laabi …ďi…ď…ďe Aadama fuu, ngam a warjo koo moy fodde laabi mum e kuu…óe mum."
Jeremiah32:20 A wa…ói alaamaaji e kaayeefiiji nder lesdi Misra. A …óon tokko wa…óugo …ói haa wargo hannde, nder Isra'iila e nder ummaatooje go…ó…óe. Jonta yim…ďe anndi innde ma bana ko laati hannde."
Jeremiah32:21 A wurtini yim…ďe ummaatoore ma diga lesdi Misra bee alaamaaji e kaayeefiiji e juŇčngo ma semmbi…óŇčgo, fortiiŇčgo e kulniiŇčgo."
Jeremiah32:22 A hokki …ďe lesdi ndi'i, keewndi kosam e njumri, bana a hunorani kaakiraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah32:23 Ammaa nde …ďe nasti ndi, …ďe mari ndi, …ďe …óowtanaaki ma, …ďe …óowtanaaki tawreeta ma. ∆Āe mba…óaay ko a umruno …ďe wa…óugo fuu. Ngam maajum a ukkani …ďe sarru ngu'u fuu."
Jeremiah32:24 Ndaa, Kaldiya'en mbaagi lesdi haa yotti mahol berniwol ngam nyaamugo ngol. Ngol yanan haa juu…óe honan…ďe ngol ngam daliila konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu. Ko mbi'…óa fuu laatake, a …óon yi'a …óum!"
Jeremiah32:25 Ammaa bee non fuu, yaa Jawmiraawo, a wi'i mi sooda ngesa bee ceede haa gite seedoo…ďe, koo nde a hokki berniwol ngo'ol haa juu…óe Kaldiya'en.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah32:26 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, wi'i mo:"
Jeremiah32:27 ‚ÄúMin woni Jawmiraawo Allah mo yim…ďe fuu. Walaa ko salortammi.
Jeremiah32:28 Ngam maajum mbi'mi: Mi hokkan berniwol ngo'ol haa juu…óe Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila e Kaldiya'en, …ďe nyaama ngol!"
Jeremiah32:29 Kaldiya'en honan…ďe berniwol ngo'ol, nastan ngol, ku…ď…ďan yiite nder maagol, ngulan ngol bee soorooji maagol fuu. Ngam dow soorooji …ói'i fuu yim…ďe nguli uurle ngam Ba'al, ndufi dokke dufetee…óe ngam …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe. ∆Āe tikkini yam bee maajum."
Jeremiah32:30 Diga fu…ó…óam yim…ďe Isra'iila e Yahuuda …óon mba…óa kallu…óum tum yeeso am. ∆Āe …óon tikkinammi tum bee kuu…óe ma…ď…ďe kallu…óe.
Jeremiah32:31 Berniwol ngo'ol tikkini yam, ummini …ďernde am, diga nyalaade yim…ďe pu…ó…ói nyi…ďugo ngol haa wargo hannde. Mi taynori halkugo ngol yeeso am,"
Jeremiah32:32 ngam yim…ďe Isra'iila e Yahuuda fuu, kam…ďe e laamii…ďe ma…ď…ďe e ardii…ďe ma…ď…ďe e liman'en ma…ď…ďe e annabi'en ma…ď…ďe e yim…ďe Yahuuda e joo…óii…ďe haa Urusaliima fuu, …ďe tikkini yam bee halleende ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah32:33 ∆Āe ngaylitani yam …ďaawe, naa geese ma…ď…ďe. Koo nde mi tokki ekkitingo …ďe, …ďe nanaay, …ďe nja…ďaay elto."
Jeremiah32:34 Ko …ďuri hallugo boo, …ďe njo'ini labbi ma…ď…ďe nyiddu…ói nder suudu senaandu ngam am, …ďe co…ďni ndu."
Jeremiah32:35 ∆Āe mahi towndiije ngam Ba'al nder waadiwol ∆Āii-Hinnom, haa …ďe ngula …ďi…ď…ďe ma…ď…ďe wor…ďe e rew…ďe bana kirsaa…ói ngam lawru Molek. Min mi umraay …ďe wa…óugo …óum, mi mee…óaay koo numugo …óum. Ammaa kam…ďe …ďe mba…ói nyiddu…óum …óu'um, …ďe nastini yim…ďe Yahuuda nder hakke.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah32:36 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúOn mbi'i dow Urusaliima: Berniwol ngo'ol yani haa juŇčngo laamii…óo Baabila ngam daliila konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu.
Jeremiah32:37 Nder tikkere am e …ďernuki am caatuki caŇčkititmi yim…ďe am haa les…óe fuu. Mi moo…ďtan …ďe ton, mi hoora …ďe haa nokkuure nde'e, …ďe njoo…óo ton nder de'ere."
Jeremiah32:38 Nden …ďe laatoto ummaatoore am, min boo mi laatoto Allah ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah32:39 Mi hokkan …ďe hakkiilo wooto e laawol gootol, haa …ďe kulammi foroy, …ďe ke…ďa hayru, …ďikkoy ma…ď…ďe boo ke…ďa hayru …ďaawo ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah32:40 Mi ha…ď…ďan alkawal duumiiŇčgal bee ma…ď…ďe, mi accataa woonango …ďe. Mi laatinan …ďe hul…ďe yam, ngam taa …ďe loro, …ďe ndaayto yam."
Jeremiah32:41 Mi seyorto woonango …ďe. Bee …ďernde am e muuyo am fuu tabitinanmi …ďe bee hoolaare nder lesdi ndi'i.
Jeremiah32:42 Bana njahrirmi sarru naawŇčgu ngu'u fuu dow yim…ďe ummaatoore nde'e, bana non ndokkiranmi …ďe kuuje boo…ó…óe …óe kunaniimi …ďe fuu."
Jeremiah32:43 On mbi'i lesdi ndi'i ferwan, walaa yim…ďe koo dabbaaji ngonata ton, ngam ndi yani haa juu…óe Kaldiya'en. Ammaa yim…ďe coodan gese nder lesdi ndi'i."
Jeremiah32:44 ∆Āe coodan …óe bee ceede, …ďe mba…óanan …óe …óereeji coggu, …ďe ma…ď…ďan …ói, …ďe mba…óan lammba dow maaji, …ďe ceednan …óe bee seedoo…ďe. ∆äum fuu …óum laatoto nder lesdi Benyamin e nder gure taarii…óe Urusaliima e nder gure Yahuuda, non boo nder gure haa kooseeje e lesdi towndiije e Lesdi Fombina. Ngam mi wartiran joonde ma…ď…ďe bana naane.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah33:1 Saa'i nde Yeremiya …óonno ma…ď…ďi nder daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata, Jawmiraawo wolwani mo …ói…óa…ďre."
Jeremiah33:2 Jawmiraawo mo tagi duniyaaru, tabitini ndu, mo innde mum Jawmiraawo, wi'i Yeremiya:"
Jeremiah33:3 ‚ÄúEwnam, mi jaaboto ma, mi anndinte kuuje maw…óe nyukkii…óe …óe a mee…óaay anndugo."
Jeremiah33:4 Min Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila mi wi'i: Kaldiya'en ngibbinan cuu…ói Urusaliima e cuu…ói laamii…ďe Yahuuda. Gurtaaki mon ngam ha…ďre bee kuuje kippor…óe …óe …ďe …ďadini haa berniwol, nafataa. ∆äum hebbingo berniwol bee …ďalli yim…ďe …ďe mbaranmi nder tikkere am e …ďernuki am tan. Mi wiirni yeeso am, taa mi yi'a berniwol ngo'ol ngam daliila halleende nde yim…ďe maagol mba…ói fuu."
Jeremiah33:5 
Jeremiah33:6 Ammaa mi hurgan ngol, mi yam…óitinan ngol. Mi yam…óitinan yim…ďe maagol, mi seynan …ďe bee salaaman e de'ere."
Jeremiah33:7 Mi wo'itinan joonde Yahuuda e Isra'iila, mi wartiran nde bana naane."
Jeremiah33:8 Mi la…ď…ďinan …ďe e aybeeji ma…ď…ďe …ói …ďe mba…óno heedi am fuu, mi yaafoto hakkeeji ma…ď…ďe fuu e tuurtol ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah33:9 Urusaliima laatanto yam daliila seyo e maŇčgtoore e tedduŇčgal. Yim…ďe ummaatooje duniyaaru fuu kulan, ndiwnan to …ďe nani habaru kuuje boo…ó…óe e hayru ko mba…óananmi yim…ďe Urusaliima fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah33:10 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúYim…ďe mbi'i nokkuure nde'e ferwi, walaa yim…ďe koo dabbaaji ton. GooŇčga, gure Yahuuda e laabi Urusaliima perwi, walaa yim…ďe koo dabbaaji ton. Ammaa haa nokkuuje …óe'e on nanan fahin"
Jeremiah33:11 hoolo seyo e welwelo, daande …ďaŇč…óo e daande …ďaŇčaa…óo. On nanan gime waddoo…ďe kirsetee…ói ngam yettugo Jawmiraawo nder suudu maako. ∆Āe mbi'an: Ngette Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, ngam o boo…ó…óo, mboo…óeeŇčga maako …óon haa abada! Ngam mi wartiran lesdi ndi'i bana naane.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah33:12 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama wi'i: ‚ÄúHaa nokkuure ferewnde nde'e nde walaa yim…ďe koo dabbaaji e haa gure fuu, durdu…óe laatoto fahin haa waynaa…ďe ciwtina tokke muu…óum'en."
Jeremiah33:13 Nder gure fuu, dow kooseeje, haa lesdi towndiije, haa Lesdi Fombina, nder lesdi Benyamin, nder gure taarii…óe Urusaliima e nder gure Yahuuda, waynaa…ďe caalinan dammooji muu…óum'en fahin, liman …ói.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah33:14 Jawmiraawo wi'i: ‚ÄúSaa'i …óon wara haa mi hi…ď…ďina iinaaji …ói mi iinani yim…ďe Isra'iila e Yahuuda.
Jeremiah33:15 Saa'i man umminanmi go…ó…óo mo danygol Daawuda bi'etee…óo Fu…óŇčgo, o adiliijo. KaŇčko o wa…óan kiita ngooŇč…óuka e adilaaku nder lesdi."
Jeremiah33:16 Saa'i man Yahuuda hisan, Urusaliima boo joo…óoto jam. Yim…ďe ndokkan ngol innde Jawmiraawo-woni-adilaaku-mee…óen."
Jeremiah33:17 Min Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: Foroy go…ó…óo danygol Daawuda joo…óoto dow leeso laamu Isra'iila.
Jeremiah33:18 Tum liman'en …ďe lenyol Lewi ndaroto yeeso am ngam lii'aago guletee…ói e dokke nyaamdu e kirsetee…ói nyalaade nyalaade fuu.‚ÄĚ
Jeremiah33:19 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya,"
Jeremiah33:20 o wi'i mo: ‚ÄúOn mbaawataa fiistugo alkawal am bee nyalawma, koo alkawal am bee jemma, haa nyalawma e jemma acca waŇčgugo nder wakkati man."
Jeremiah33:21 Bana non boo walaa mo waawata fiistugo alkawal am bee suka am Daawuda, haa go…ó…óo danygol maako acca laamaago dow leeso laamu maako. Non boo alkawal am bee liman'en Lewi'en jagganii…ďe yam."
Jeremiah33:22 Mi …óu…ó…óinan danygol suka am Daawuda e limgal liman'en Lewi'en jagganii…ďe yam, …ďe …óuu…óan bana koode asama malla njaareendi maayo, walaa baawan…óo limugo …óum.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah33:23 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, wi'i mo:"
Jeremiah33:24 ‚ÄúA nani ko yim…ďe mbi'ata na? ∆Āe …óon mbi'a: Jawmiraawo wudini yim…ďe Isra'iila e Yahuuda …ďe o su…ďi naane. ∆Āe …óon njawo yim…ďe am, …ďe laataaki ummaatoore am fahin."
Jeremiah33:25 Ammaa min Jawmiraawo mi ha…ď…ďi alkawal bee nyalawma e bee jemma, mi wa…ói umrooje ngam asama e lesdi."
Jeremiah33:26 Fakat bana mi tabitini …óum, mi jogoto alkawal am bee danygol Yaakubu e suka am Daawuda, mi laaman go…ó…óo danygol Daawuda dow danygol Ibrahiima e Isiyaaku e Yaakubu. Ngam mi wartiran joonde ma…ď…ďe bana naane, mi en…óan …ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah34:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya saa'i Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila wardi bee jama'aare konu muu…óum e honoo…ďe diga laamuuji gon…ói les laamu maako fuu e ummaatooje fuu, …ďe ka…ďi bee Urusaliima e gure taarii…óe ngol fuu."
Jeremiah34:2 Jawmiraawo Allah Isra'iila wi'i Yeremiya: ‚ÄúYah, yeccu Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi hokkan berniwol ngo'ol haa laamii…óo Baabila, ngam o wula ngol."
Jeremiah34:3 An boo a da…óataa mo, ammaa …ďe naŇčngete, …ďe ndokke haa juŇčngo maako. A laaran mo gite bee gite, a wolidan bee maako. Nden a yahan Baabila."
Jeremiah34:4 An Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, nan ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow maa…óa: A maayrataa bee kaafahi."
Jeremiah34:5 A maayan nder de'ere. Bana yim…ďe ngulno uurle ngam kaakiraa…ďe ma laamii…ďe aartu…ďe ma, bana non …ďe ngulan uurle ngam maa…óa boo. ∆Āe mboyete: Wayyo, barkaama! Ndaa ko mbi'mi, min Jawmiraawo.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah34:6 Annabi Yeremiya lornani laamii…óo Sedekiya bolle …óe'e fuu haa Urusaliima.
Jeremiah34:7 Saa'i man honoo…ďe laamii…óo Baabila …óon ka…ďa bee berniwol. ∆Āe …óon ka…ďa boo bee Lakis e Azeka, ngam berniiji …ói'i tan lutti nder berniiji Yahuuda cemmbi…ó…ói fuu."
Jeremiah34:8 Fahin Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, …ďaawo laamii…óo Sedekiya ha…ď…ďi alkawal bee yim…ďe Urusaliima fuu ngam wooynugo …ďe njoofa jeyaa…ďe ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah34:9 ∆Āe narri koo moy yoofa maccu…óo mum IbraniŇčkeejo fuu e kor…óo mum IbraniŇčkeejo, taa go…ó…óo huuwna banndum Yahuuduujo."
Jeremiah34:10 Ardii…ďe e ummaatoore fuu nja…ďi alkawal nga'al ngam yoofugo maccu…ďe e hor…ďe muu…óum'en, taa …ďe meeta macci…óingo …ďe. ∆Āe mba…ói non, …ďe ndim…óini …ďe."
Jeremiah34:11 Ammaa …ďaawo…óon numooji ma…ď…ďe ngayliti, …ďe …óa…ď…ďiti yoofaa…ďe, …ďe macci…óini …ďe kadiboo."
Jeremiah34:12 Saa'i man Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya.
Jeremiah34:13 Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúMi ha…ď…ďi alkawal bee kaakiraa…ďe moo…óon saa'i mi rim…óini …ďe diga njeyaaŇčgu haa lesdi Misra. Mi umri …ďe, mi wi'i:"
Jeremiah34:14 Nde duu…ďi jowee…ói…ói njaalti fuu, sey …ďe njoofa banndiraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe IbraniŇčke'en soorru…ďe ko'e muu…óum'en haa jaagor…ďe muu…óum'en nde nii …ďe kuuwani …ďe duu…ďi joweego. Ammaa kaakiraa…ďe mon …óowtanaaki yam, …ďe kakkilanaay ko mbi'mi …ďe."
Jeremiah34:15 Onon boo, nee…ďaay on ngartani yam, on mba…ói ko fottani yam bee yoofugo banndiraa…ďe mon fuu. On ka…ď…ďi alkawal yeeso am nder suudu senaandu ngam am."
Jeremiah34:16 Ammaa jonta numooji mon ngayliti, on co…ďni innde am. Koo moy moo…óon …óa…ď…ďiti maccu…óo mum e kor…óo mum, on macci…óini …ďe kadiboo, koo nde on ndim…óinno …ďe."
Jeremiah34:17 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo mi wi'i: On …óowtanaaki yam, on njoofaay banndiraa…ďe mon fuu. Ammaa min mi yoofan on ngam haa maayron bee konu e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu e weelo, haa ummaatooje duniyaaru fuu kula saa'i …óe ngi'i on."
Jeremiah34:18 Ardii…ďe Yahuuda e Urusaliima e saraaki'en e liman'en e yim…ďe lesdi fuu ka…ď…ďi alkawal yeeso am. ∆Āe ta'i gaggel caka cak, …ďe caali caka reetaaji maagel …ói…ói. Ammaa …ďe piisti alkawal am, …ďe tokkaaki umrooje maagal. Ngam maajum mba…óanmi …ďe ko …ďe mba…ói gaggel."
Jeremiah34:19 
Jeremiah34:20 Mi hokkan …ďe haa konne'en ma…ď…ďe yi…ó…ďe mbarugo …ďe. ∆Āalli ma…ď…ďe laatanto colli e dabbaaji ladde nyaamdu.
Jeremiah34:21 Mi hokkan Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda e saraaki'en muu…óum, haa juu…óe konne'en ma…ď…ďe yi…ó…ďe mbarugo …ďe. Mi hokkan …ďe haa honoo…ďe laamii…óo Baabila, accu…ďe ha…ďugo bee moo…óon."
Jeremiah34:22 Mi umran …ďe …ďe lorto, …ďe ka…ďa bee berniwol ngo'ol, …ďe nyaama ngol, …ďe ngula ngol. Mi laatinan gure Yahuuda ladde meere, bilaa joo…óii…ďe ton.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah35:1 Nder zamanu Yooyakim …ďii Yusiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, wi'i mo:"
Jeremiah35:2 ‚ÄúYah haa Rekabi'en, wolidu bee ma…ď…ďe. Waddu …ďe haa suudu wooru nder haykaliiru, yarnu …ďe nguykinoojam.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah35:3 Yeremiya moo…ďti Rekabi'en fuu, waato Yaajaniya …ďii Yeremiya feere …ďii Habacciniya e deer…óum'en e …ďiyum'en fuu,"
Jeremiah35:4 yahri …ďe haa haykaliiru, nastini …ďe nder suudu …ďi…ď…ďe Hanan …ďii Yigidaliya, go…ó…óo Allah. Suudu ndu …ďadi bee suudu maw…ďe, ndu …óon dow suudu Ma'aseya …ďii Sallum, aynoowo dammugal."
Jeremiah35:5 Nden Yeremiya jo'inani Rekabi'en njardukoy e bulki bee nguykinoojam, o wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúNjare kadi!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah35:6 Ammaa …ďe njaabi: ‚ÄúMin njarataa nguykinoojam, ngam Yonadabu …ďii Rekab, kaaka amin umri min e …ďi…ď…ďe amin, taa min njara …óam sam."
Jeremiah35:7 O ha…ói min boo mahugo cuu…ói e remugo lesdi e jubaago gese inabooje e marugo …óe. O umri min min njoo…óo nder cuu…ói laymaaji ngeendam amin fuu, ngam haa min njuutina bal…óe amin nder lesdi ndi min ko…óata."
Jeremiah35:8 Min …óowtani umrooje Yonadabu …ďii Rekab, kaaka amin. Min njarataa nguykinoojam sam, koo minin, koo rew…ďe amin, koo …ďi…ď…ďe amin wor…ďe e rew…ďe."
Jeremiah35:9 Min mahataa cuu…ói ngam joo…óaago ton. Min marataa inabooje, koo gese, koo aawre."
Jeremiah35:10 Min …óon njoo…ói haa cuu…ói laymaaji, min …óowtani umrooje …óe kaaka amin Yonadabu umrino min fuu."
Jeremiah35:11 Ammaa nde Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila hippi lesdi ndi'i, min mbi'i sey min ngara haa Urusaliima, ngam min nda…óa jama'aaje konu Kaldiya'en e Siriya'en. Ngam maajum min …óon njoo…ói haa Urusaliima jonta.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah35:12 Nden Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya.
Jeremiah35:13 Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i mo: ‚ÄúYah, yeccu yim…ďe Yahuuda e joo…óii…ďe haa Urusaliima: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Koni on nja…ďataa elto, on …óowtantaako bolle am?"
Jeremiah35:14 Rekabi'en …óowtani umroore kaakiraawo muu…óum'en Yonadabu …ďii Rekab, umri danygol muu…óum, taa …ďe njara nguykinoojam. ∆Āe mee…óaay yarugo …óam haa wargo hannde. Min boo mi tokki wasaago on, ammaa on nananaay yam."
Jeremiah35:15 Mi tokki nelugo sukaa…ďe am annabi'en haa moo…óon, …ďe mbi'a on: Lorte diga laabi mon kallu…ói, mba…óe ko fotti, taa tokke …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe, taa njaggane …ďe, ngam haa on njoo…óo nder lesdi ndi ndokkumi on, onon e kaakiraa…ďe mon. Ammaa on nananaay yam, on kakkilanaay bolle am."
Jeremiah35:16 ∆Āi…ď…ďe Yonadabu …ďii Rekab …óowtani umrooje kaakiraawo muu…óum'en, ammaa ummaatoore nde'e …óowtanaaki yam."
Jeremiah35:17 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila, mi wi'i: Onon yim…ďe Yahuuda e joo…óii…ďe nder Urusaliima, mi ukkanan on sarru ngu mbi'mi on fuu. Ngam mi wolwani on, ammaa on nanaay, mi ewni on, ammaa on njaabaaki.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah35:18 Nden Yeremiya wolwani Rekabi'en: ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: On …óowtani ko kaaka mon Yonadabu umri on. On njogi umrooje maako fuu, on mba…ói ko …óe umri boo."
Jeremiah35:19 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila mi wi'i: Haa foroy go…ó…óo danygol Yonadabu …ďii Rekab daroto yeeso am ngam jagganaago yam.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:1 Nder nduu…ďu Yooyakim …ďii Yusiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, naya…ďu, Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, wi'i:"
Jeremiah36:2 ‚ÄúHoo'u deftere taggaande, winndu nder maare ko mbi'maami dow Isra'iila e Yahuuda e ummaatooje fuu, diga saa'i mi aarti wolwango ma nder zamanu Yusiya, haa wargo hannde."
Jeremiah36:3 Teema, to yim…ďe Yahuuda nani haala sarru ngu taaskiimi ukkango …ďe fuu, …ďe fuu …ďe lortoto diga laabi ma…ď…ďe kallu…ói haa mi yaafo aybeeji ma…ď…ďe e hakkeeji ma…ď…ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:4 Yeremiya ewni Baruku …ďii Neriya, anndini mo ko Jawmiraawo wi'no fuu. Baruku winndi …óum haa deftere taggaande."
Jeremiah36:5 Nden Yeremiya wi'i Baruku: ‚Äú∆Āe ka…ói yam yahugo haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo.
Jeremiah36:6 Sey a yaha, an. Nyannde suumaye, to yim…ďe moo…ďtake ton, jaŇčngu deftere nde'e, haa …ďe nana ko Jawmiraawo wi'i yam, ko mi jaŇčngani ma, an boo a winndi …óum. JaŇčngu nde boo haa noppi Yahuudu'en war…ďe diga gure muu…óum'en."
Jeremiah36:7 Teema tornde ma…ď…ďe yottoto Jawmiraawo, …ďe fuu …ďe lortoto diga laabi ma…ď…ďe kallu…ói. Ngam Jawmiraawo furkiti yim…ďe …ďe'e bee …ďernuki mum e tikkere mum saatunde masin.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:8 Nden Baruku …ďii Neriya yehi, jaŇčngi bolle Jawmiraawo binndaa…óe nder deftere nder haykaliiru, bana annabi Yeremiya umruno mo."
Jeremiah36:9 Nder nduu…ďu Yooyakim …ďii Yusiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, njowa…ďu, nder lewru joweenaya…ďru, yim…ďe mba…ói suumaye yeeso Jawmiraawo. Joo…óii…ďe haa Urusaliima e war…ďe diga gure Yahuuda fuu cuumi."
Jeremiah36:10 Baruku jaŇčngi haa deftere bolle Yeremiya fuu haa noppi yim…ďe ummaatoore. ∆äum laati nder haykaliiru, haa suudu Gemariya …ďii Safan, binndoowo, haa daldal …ďaŇčgiiŇčgal haa nastirde Dammugal Kesal ngal haykaliiru."
Jeremiah36:11 Mika …ďii Gemariya …ďii Safan nani bolle Jawmiraawo gon…óe nder deftere go.
Jeremiah36:12 O yehi haa saare laamii…óo, haa suudu binndoowo. Saraaki'en fuu moo…ďti ton: Eliisama, binndoowo e Delaya …ďii Semaya e Elnatan …ďii Akbor e Gemariya …ďii Safan e Sedekiya …ďii Hananiya e saraaki'en wo…ó…ďe fuu."
Jeremiah36:13 Mika lornani …ďe ko o nani fuu nde Baruku jaŇčngani ummaatoore ko winnda nder deftere.
Jeremiah36:14 Nden saraaki'en neli Yehuudi …ďii Netaniya …ďii Selemiya …ďii Kusi haa Baruku, o wi'i mo o hoo'a deftere nde o jaŇčngi yeeso yim…ďe, o wara. Baruku hoo'i nde, yehi haa ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah36:15 ∆Āe mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúJoo…óa, jaŇčngan min nde.‚ÄĚ Baruku jaŇčngani …ďe nde."
Jeremiah36:16 Nde …ďe nani nde fuu, …ďe ndaarndaartiri, …ďe kultori, …ďe mbi'i Baruku: ‚ÄúDoole min lornana laamii…óo bolle …óe'e fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:17 Nden …ďe ∆īami mo: ‚ÄúYeccu min, noy a winndiri …óum? Yeremiya anndini ma …óum na?‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku jaabi: ‚ÄúO anndini yam bolle …óe'e fuu, min boo mi winndi …óe bee dawa haa deftere taggaande.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:19 Nden saraaki'en mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúSey on nyukko, an e Yeremiya, taa go…ó…óo annda toy on ngoni!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:20 Saraaki'en ndesi deftere go haa suudu Eliisama, binndoowo. Nden …ďe nasti daldal laamorde, …ďe anndini laamii…óo ko wa…ói fuu."
Jeremiah36:21 Laamii…óo neli Yehuudi, o wadda deftere man. KaŇčko o hoo'i nde haa suudu Eliisama, o jaŇčngani nde laamii…óo e saraaki'en taarii…ďe laamii…óo."
Jeremiah36:22 ∆äum lewru jowee…ói…óa…ďru, saa'i dabbunde, ngam man laamii…óo …óon joo…ói haa suudu taaskitinaandu ngam dabbunde, …óon aytino."
Jeremiah36:23 Nde Yehuudi jaŇčngi jabbi tati koo nayi, laamii…óo ta'i …ói bee la…ďel binndoowo, sakkini …ói nder yiite. O tokki wa…óugo bana non haa o wuldi deftere man fuu."
Jeremiah36:24 Laamii…óo e suka'en mum nan…ďe bolle …óe'e kultoraay, ceekaay limce muu…óum'en."
Jeremiah36:25 Elnatan e Delaya e Gemariya torino laamii…óo taa o wula deftere, ammaa o nananaay …ďe."
Jeremiah36:26 Nden o umri …ďiyiiko Yerahameel e Seraya …ďii Ajiriyel e Selemiya …ďii Abdeyel, …ďe naŇčnga Baruku, binndoowo e annabi Yeremiya. Ammaa Jawmiraawo suu…ói …ďe."
Jeremiah36:27 ∆Āaawo laamii…óo wuli deftere nde Yeremiya anndinino Baruku, Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, wi'i:"
Jeremiah36:28 ‚ÄúHoo'u deftere wo…ónde, winndu nder maare ko wonno haa deftere ndeya nde Yooyakim, laamii…óo Yahuuda wulno go."
Jeremiah36:29 Wa…ó annabaaku dow laamii…óo Yooyakim: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: A wuli deftere nde'e, a ∆īami Yeremiya koni o winndi: Fakat laamii…óo Baabila waran, wonnan lesdi ndi'i, halkan yim…ďe maari e dabbaaji maari."
Jeremiah36:30 Ngam maajum, ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Yooyakim, laamii…óo Yahuuda: Walaa koo gooto mo danygol maako he…ďata joo…óaago dow leeso laamu Daawuda. ∆Āanndu maako, yim…ďe ngudinan ndu yaasi, ndu waalo haa nguli naaŇčge e jaaŇčgol jemma."
Jeremiah36:31 Mi hiitoto mo, kaŇčko e danygol maako e suka'en maako, ngam daliila hakkeeji …ói …ďe mba…ói fuu. Kam…ďe e yim…ďe Urusaliima e yim…ďe Yahuuda kakkilanaay bolle am. Ngam maajum ukkananmi …ďe sarru ngu mbi'noomi fuu dow ma…ď…ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah36:32 Nden Yeremiya hoo'i deftere wo…ónde, hokki nde Baruku …ďii Neriya, binndoowo. KaŇčko o winndi ko Yeremiya anndini mo, ko wonno haa deftere nde Yooyakim, laamii…óo Yahuuda wulno fuu bee yiite. O winndi boo bolle nanndu…óe …óuu…ó…óe …óe Yeremiya …ďesdi."
Jeremiah37:1 Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila laaminno Sedekiya …ďii Yusiya dow lesdi Yahuuda, haa pellel Koniya …ďii Yooyakim."
Jeremiah37:2 Ammaa Sedekiya e suka'en mum e yim…ďe lesdi …óowtanaaki ko Jawmiraawo wi'i bee hunnduko annabi Yeremiya.
Jeremiah37:3 Laamii…óo Sedekiya neli Yehukal …ďii Selemiya e Sefaniya …ďii Ma'aseya, limanjo, haa annabi Yeremiya, …ďe mbi'a mo: ‚ÄúUseni tora Jawmiraawo Allah mee…óen ngam amin!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah37:4 Saa'i man Yeremiya …óon waanca caka yim…ďe tawon, o siwaa nastineego nder fursina."
Jeremiah37:5 Jama'aare konu Firawna wurtino Misra. Nde Kaldiya'en hippunoo…ďe Urusaliima nani haala ka'a, …ďe ndaayti Urusaliima."
Jeremiah37:6 Jawmiraawo wolwani annabi Yeremiya:
Jeremiah37:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúMbi'e laamii…óo Yahuuda mo neli on ∆īamugo yam: Jama'aare konu Firawna wurtiinde wallugo on, loroto haa lesdi Misra."
Jeremiah37:8 Kaldiya'en loroto haa …óo ngam honugo berniwol ngo'ol. ∆Āe nyaaman ngol, …ďe ngulan ngol."
Jeremiah37:9 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Taa pewane ko'e mon bee wi'ugo: Kaldiya'en accan en, ndillan daayii…óum bee mee…óen fakat! Ngam …ďe accaay en!"
Jeremiah37:10 Koo to on njaalake jama'aare Kaldiya'en hon…ďe on fuu, haa yuwaa…ďe waalii…ďe nder cuu…ói laymaaji muu…óum'en tan luttani …ďe, fakat …ďe ummoto, …ďe ngulan berniwol!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah37:11 Jama'aare konu Kaldiya'en daayti, acci Urusaliima, daliila jama'aare konu Firawna."
Jeremiah37:12 Saa'i man Yeremiya wurti Urusaliima, o yi…ói yahugo lesdi Benyamin ngam ja…ďoygo ge…óal babal ndonŇčgu maako caka banndiiko'en."
Jeremiah37:13 Ammaa nde o yotti Dammugal Benyamin, hooreejo aynoo…ďe ton, mo innde mum Yiriya …ďii Selemiya …ďii Hananiya, naŇčngi annabi Yeremiya, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúA yi…ói hawtango Kaldiya'en.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah37:14 Yeremiya wi'i: ‚Äú∆äum fewre! Mi yi…óaa hawtango …ďe.‚ÄĚ Ammaa Yiriya nananaay mo. O jogiti Yeremiya, o yahri mo yeeso saraaki'en."
Jeremiah37:15 Kam…ďe …ďe tikkani Yeremiya, …ďe …ďocci mo e …ďe ma…ď…ďi mo nder suudu Yonatan, binndoowo, ngam …ďe laatinno ndu fursina."
Jeremiah37:16 ∆Āe njolli mo nder ngaska, ton o joo…ói nyal…óe …óuu…ó…óe."
Jeremiah37:17 Nden laamii…óo Sedekiya neli …óa…ď…ďitoygo mo. Nder saare maako o ∆īami Yeremiya bee sirri: ‚ÄúWoodi wolde iwnde diga Jawmiraawo na?‚ÄĚ Yeremiya jaabi: ‚ÄúOoho, ndaa nde: A hokkaama haa laamii…óo Baabila.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah37:18 Nden Yeremiya ∆īami laamii…óo Sedekiya: ‚ÄúAybewol ngole mba…ómi dow maa…óa koo dow saraaki'en ma e ummaatoore ma haa on nastini yam nder fursina?
Jeremiah37:19 Toy annabi'en mon wa…ó…ďe on annabaaku, wi'…ďe: Laamii…óo Baabila warataa honugo on e honugo lesdi ndi'i?"
Jeremiah37:20 Useni, barkaama, ja…ď tornde am. Taa lornitam haa suudu Yonatan, binndoowo, ngam taa mi maaya ton.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah37:21 Laamii…óo Sedekiya umri …ďe ma…ď…ďa Yeremiya haa daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata. Ton …ďe ndokka mo nyal…óe fuu tamseere diga Laawol Tamsoo…ďe, sey to tamseeje timmidi nder berniwol. Bana nii Yeremiya joo…óori haa daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata."
Jeremiah38:1 Sefatiya …ďii Mattan e Gedaliya …ďii Pashuuru e Yukal …ďii Selemiya e Pashuuru …ďii Malkiya nani ko Yeremiya wi'i yim…ďe ummaatoore fuu, o yecci …ďe:"
Jeremiah38:2 ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mo joo…óoto nder berniwol ngo'ol maayran bee konu malla weelo malla nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu. Ammaa mo wurtoto ngam hawtango Kaldiya'en, kaŇčko o maayataa, o hisnan yoŇčki maako, o yee…óan."
Jeremiah38:3 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo wi'i: Mi hokkan berniwol ngo'ol haa jama'aare konu laamii…óo Baabila, nde nyaama ngol.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:4 Nden saraaki'en mbi'i laamii…óo: ‚ÄúSey gorko oo maaya! Bee wolwugo bana nii o …óon tampina honoo…ďe luttu…ďe nder berniwol men e non boo ummaatoore fuu. O …óa…ď…ďataa salaaman ummaatoore nde'e, sey sarru maare!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:5 Laamii…óo Sedekiya jaabi: ‚ÄúNdaa mo haa juu…óe mon, mi waawataa ha…ógo on.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:6 Kam…ďe …ďe koo'i Yeremiya, …ďe ngubi mo nder …ďulndu Malkiya …ďii laamii…óo, wonndu haa daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata. ∆Āe njippini mo bee …ďoggi. Ndiyam woodaa nder maaru, sey loope. Yeremiya nufi nder loope man."
Jeremiah38:7 Ton nder saare laamii…óo woodi Etiyopiyaajo saraakiijo, innde maako Ebed-Melek. KaŇčko o nani …ďe njolli Yeremiya nder …ďulndu. Saa'i man laamii…óo …óonno joo…ói haa Dammugal Benyamin."
Jeremiah38:8 Ebed-Melek wurti saare laamii…óo, yehi haa maako, wi'i mo:"
Jeremiah38:9 ‚ÄúBarkaama, ko wor…ďe …ďe'e mba…ói annabi Yeremiya, woo…óaay. ∆Āe njolli mo nder …ďulndu. Walaa seko o maayran bee dolo ton, ngam nyaamdu timmi nder berniwol.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:10 Nden laamii…óo umri Ebed-Melek Etiyopiyaajo o hoo'a wor…ďe cappan…óe tato won…ďe ton, …ďe ngurtina Yeremiya e …ďulndu, hiddeko o maaya."
Jeremiah38:11 Ebed-Melek hoo'i wor…ďe man, yehi haa sigordu nder saare laamii…óo, hoo'i ton limce ceek…óe e leppi kii…ó…ói, jippini …óum bee …ďoggi haa Yeremiya nder …ďulndu."
Jeremiah38:12 Nden o wi'i Yeremiya: ‚ÄúWa…ó limce e leppi les naaf…óe ma dow …ďoggi.‚ÄĚ Yeremiya wa…ói bana non.
Jeremiah38:13 ∆Āe poo…ói mo bee …ďoggi, …ďe ngurtini mo. ∆Āaawo maajum Yeremiya joo…ói haa daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata."
Jeremiah38:14 Laamii…óo Sedekiya umri waddugo annabi Yeremiya haa maako haa dammugal haykaliiru Jawmiraawo tata…ďal. O wi'i Yeremiya: ‚ÄúMi yi…ói ∆īamugo ma ∆īamol gootol. Taa suu…óam koo …óume.‚ÄĚ
Jeremiah38:15 Yeremiya jaabi mo: ‚ÄúTo mi wi'i ma gooŇčga, a mbaratam. To mi hokki ma sawari, a nanantaa yam!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:16 Laamii…óo Sedekiya hunani Yeremiya bee sirri, wi'i: ‚ÄúFakat bana Jawmiraawo o geeto mo hokki en yoŇčki, mi mbarataa ma, mi hokkataa ma haa juu…óe wor…ďe yi…ó…ďe mbarugo ma boo.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:17 Nden Yeremiya wi'i Sedekiya: ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: To a hawtani maw…ďe laamii…óo Baabila, nden kam yoŇčki ma hisan, berniwol ngo'ol boo wulataake, a hisan bee saare ma fuu."
Jeremiah38:18 Ammaa to a hawtanaay maw…ďe laamii…óo Baabila, nden kam berniwol ngo'ol hokkete haa Kaldiya'en, …ďe ngula ngol, an boo a da…óataa …ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:19 Laamii…óo Sedekiya wi'i Yeremiya: ‚ÄúMi …óon hula Yahuudu'en hawtan…ďe Kaldiya'en. Teema Kaldiya'en ndokkatam haa juu…óe ma…ď…ďe, …ďe pijirammi.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:20 Yeremiya jaabi: ‚ÄúA hokkataake haa juu…óe ma…ď…ďe. Useni …óowtana bolle Jawmiraawo …óe mbi'maami. Nden kam a he…ďan hayru, yoŇčki ma boo hisan."
Jeremiah38:21 Ammaa ndaa ko Jawmiraawo yi'ni yam to a salake wurtaago:
Jeremiah38:22 ∆Āe ngurtinan rew…ďe luttu…ďe nder saare laamii…óo Yahuuda fuu haa maw…ďe laamii…óo Baabila. Ndaa ko rew…ďe mbi'ata dow maa…óa: Sooba'en ma esti ma, mba…ói ma rikici. Jonta, nde kos…óe ma nufi nder loope, …ďe acci ma.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:23 Yeremiya …ďesdi wi'ugo: ‚Äú∆Āe ngurtinan rew…ďe ma e …ďikkoy ma fuu haa Kaldiya'en. An boo a da…óataa …ďe, a laatoto ka…ď…ďaa…óo laamii…óo Baabila, nden …ďe ngulan berniwol ngo'ol.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:24 Sedekiya jaabi Yeremiya: ‚ÄúTaata go…ó…óo annda ko en mbolidi, nden kam a maayataa."
Jeremiah38:25 To saraaki'en nani mi wolidi bee ma, to …ďe ngari haa maa…óa, …ďe mbi'i ma: Yeccu min ko a wolidi bee laamii…óo. Min mbarataa ma, to a yecci min koo …óume fuu,"
Jeremiah38:26 nden kam yeccu …ďe no a tori yam, taa mi lortine haa suudu Yonatan, a maaya ton.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah38:27 Saraaki'en fuu ngari haa Yeremiya, ∆īami mo. KaŇčko o yecci …ďe ko laamii…óo umri mo wi'ugo. ∆Āe njee…ói, …ďe ndilli, ngam walaa mo nani haala man."
Jeremiah38:28 Yeremiya boo joo…ói haa daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata haa nyalaade Kaldiya'en nyaami Urusaliima.
Jeremiah39:1 Nder nduu…ďu Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, njoweenaya…ďu, nder lewru sappooru, Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila wardi bee jama'aare konu muu…óum fuu, hippi Urusaliima."
Jeremiah39:2 Nder nduu…ďu Sedekiya sappo e go'oowu, lewru naya…ďru, nyannde joweenaya…ďre maaru, …ďe cumpiti mahi berniwol."
Jeremiah39:3 Nden maw…ďe laamii…óo Baabila fuu nasti, njoo…ói haa Dammugal Cakaawal. Nder ma…ď…ďe Nergal-Sarecer e Samgar-Nebo e Sarsekim, maw…óo saraaki'en e Nergal-Sarecer feere, ardii…óo anndu…ďe alaamaaji koode non boo maw…ďe laamii…óo Baabila wo…ó…ďe."
Jeremiah39:4 Nde Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda e honoo…ďe muu…óum fuu ngi'i …óum, …ďe ngurti berniwol bee jemma, …ďe ndoggiri laawol jarne laamii…óo e dammugal caka mahi …ói…ói, …ďe ngurtori waadiwol Urdun."
Jeremiah39:5 Ammaa jama'aare konu Kaldiya'en taasni …ďe, jokki Sedekiya nder ∆īoole baŇčnge Yeriko. ∆Āe naŇčngi mo, …ďe njahri mo haa laamii…óo Baabila haa Ribla nder lesdi Hamat. Ton Nabukodonosor hiiti mo."
Jeremiah39:6 O umri hirsugo …ďi…ď…ďe Sedekiya yeeso maako. O umri hirsugo teddu…ďe Yahuuda boo.
Jeremiah39:7 Nden o …óoofi gite Sedekiya, o ha…ď…ďi mo bee callalluuji njamndi mbo…óeeri, …ďe njahri mo haa Baabila."
Jeremiah39:8 Kaldiya'en nguli saare laamii…óo e cuu…ói yim…ďe, …ďe ngibbini mahi Urusaliima."
Jeremiah39:9 Nden Nebuzaradan, hooreejo aynoo…ďe laamii…óo hoo'i luttu…ďe nder berniwol e hawtannoo…ďe mo, dahi …ďe haa Baabila."
Jeremiah39:10 Walaa mo o acci, sey lees…ďe, talaka'en nder lesdi Yahuuda, o hokki …ďe gese e gese inabooje."
Jeremiah39:11 Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila umruno Nebuzaradan, hooreejo aynoo…ďe muu…óum, ngam daliila Yeremiya, wi'no mo:"
Jeremiah39:12 ‚ÄúHoo'u Yeremiya, hakkilan mo, taa hallan mo sam. Ammaa wa…óan mo ko o wi'ete fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah39:13 Ngam man Nebuzaradan, maw…óo saraaki'en e Nebusazaban, ardii…óo anndu…ďe alaamaaji koode e Nergal-Sarecer e maw…ďe laamii…óo Baabila fuu"
Jeremiah39:14 neli …óa…ď…ďitoygo Yeremiya haa daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata. ∆Āe acci mo haa juŇčngo Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam …ďii Safan, ngam o hoora mo jam. Bana nii Yeremiya joo…óori caka ummaatoore."
Jeremiah39:15 Saa'i Yeremiya …óonno ha…ď…ďi haa daldal saare laamii…óo haa aynoo…ďe aynata, Jawmiraawo wolwani mo, wi'i:"
Jeremiah39:16 ‚ÄúYah, yeccu Ebed-Melek Etiyopiyaajo: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Mi timminan ko mbi'mi dow berniwol ngo'ol. Mi ukkanan ngol sarru, naa hayru, an bee hoore ma a yi'an …óum nyannde man."
Jeremiah39:17 Ammaa mi hisnete nyalaade man. A hokkataake haa juu…óe yim…ďe …ďe kulata.
Jeremiah39:18 Mi aynete fakat, ngam taa a maaya bee kaafahi. A hisnan yoŇčki ma ngam a hoolake yam.‚ÄĚ Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah40:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, …ďaawo Nebuzaradan, hooreejo aynoo…ďe laamii…óo rim…óini mo haa Rama. ∆Āe njahrno mo ton, o ka…ď…ďaa…óo bee callalluuji, caka yim…ďe Urusaliima e Yahuuda, dahetee…ďe haa Baabila fuu."
Jeremiah40:2 Hooreejo aynoo…ďe go umri waddugo Yeremiya, wi'i mo: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo Allah maa…óa wolwuno haala sarru ngu'u dow lesdi ndi'i."
Jeremiah40:3 Jonta o timmini ko o wi'no, ngam on mba…ói hakke dow Jawmiraawo, on …óowtanaaki mo. Ngam maajum kuuje …óe'e fuu laatanake on."
Jeremiah40:4 Jonta piistanmi callalluuji haa juu…óe ma, mi rim…óine. To …óum fottani ma a yahda bee am haa Baabila, nden kam war, min boo mi hakkilante. Ammaa to …óum fottanaay ma, nden kam taa war. Ndaa, lesdi fuu …óon we'iti yeeso maa…óa, yah haa ngi…ó…óa fuu.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah40:5 Ammaa Yeremiya dillaay tawon. Ngam maajum Nebuzaradan wi'i mo: ‚ÄúLorta haa Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam …ďii Safan mo laamii…óo Baabila wa…ói ngomna dow gure Yahuuda. Joo…óoda bee maako caka yim…ďe malla yah haa nokkuure koo ndeye fottanannde ma fuu.‚ÄĚ Nden o hokki mo dokkal e njoo…ďaari laawol, o ja…ď…ďiti mo."
Jeremiah40:6 Yeremiya yehi haa Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam, joo…óodi bee maako haa Mispa, caka yim…ďe luttu…ďe nder lesdi."
Jeremiah40:7 Nden maw…ďe jama'aaje konu won…ďe nder ladde e honoo…ďe muu…óum'en nani laamii…óo Baabila wa…ói Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam ngomna lesdi fuu, halfitinani mo lees…ďe nder lesdi …ďe ndahaaka haa Baabila, wor…ďe e rew…ďe e …ďikkoy."
Jeremiah40:8 Ngam maajum Isma'iilu …ďii Netaniya e Yohanan …ďii Kareha e Seraya …ďii Tanhumet e …ďi…ď…ďe Efay Netofaajo e Yaajaniya Ma'akatiijo, kam…ďe e wor…ďe ma…ď…ďe njehi haa Gedaliya haa Mispa."
Jeremiah40:9 Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam …ďii Safan hunani …ďe: ‚ÄúTaa kule jagganaago Kaldiya'en. Njoo…óe nder lesdi, njaggane laamii…óo Baabila, nden kam on njoo…óoto jam."
Jeremiah40:10 Min mi joo…óoto haa Mispa, mi wakiiliijo moo…óon haa Kaldiya'en waran…ďe haa amin. Onon boo, moo…ďte inaboojam e …ďi…ď…ďe le…ó…óe e nebbam, cige …óum. Njoo…óe nder gure …óe maroton.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah40:11 Yahuudu'en won…ďe haa Mo'ab e Ammoon e Edoom e les…óe go…ó…óe, kam…ďe boo …ďe nani laamii…óo Baabila acci yim…ďe luttu…ďe haa Yahuuda. ∆Āe nani boo o darni Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam …ďii Safan ngomnaajo dow ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah40:12 Ngam maajum …ďe ngurti haa nokkuuje …ďe caŇčkiti fuu, …ďe ngarti Yahuuda, haa Gedaliya nder wuro Mispa, …ďe moo…ďti inaboojam e …ďi…ď…ďe le…ó…óe, …óuu…ó…óum masin."
Jeremiah40:13 ∆Āaawo man Yohanan …ďii Kareha e maw…ďe konu wo…ó…ďe go ngari haa Gedaliya haa Mispa,"
Jeremiah40:14 mbi'i: ‚ÄúA anndi na? Ba'alis, laamii…óo Ammoon neli Isma'iilu …ďii Netaniya ngam mbarugo ma.‚ÄĚ Ammaa Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam ja…ďaay ko …ďe mbi'i."
Jeremiah40:15 Nden Yohanan wi'i mo bee sirri: ‚ÄúAccu mi yaha, mi mbara Isma'iilu …ďii Netaniya. Walaa mo he…ďtata …óum. Koni o …óa…ď…ďata mbarugo ma? To bana non, Yahuudu'en moo…ďtii…ďe haa maa…óa fuu caŇčkititto, luttu…ďe Yahuuda fuu kalkan.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah40:16 Ammaa Gedaliya jaabi mo: ‚ÄúTaa wa…ó …óum. Ko mbi'…óa dow Isma'iilu, …óum fewre.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah41:1 Nder lewru jowee…ói…óa…ďru, Isma'iilu …ďii Netaniya …ďii Eliisama, go…ó…óo danygol laamii…óo, gooto nder maw…ďe huuwanoo…ďe mo, wardi bee wor…ďe sappo haa Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam haa Mispa. Saa'i …ďe …óon nyaamda bee maako,"
Jeremiah41:2 Isma'iilu e wor…ďe mum sappo losi kaafaaje muu…óum'en, mbari Gedaliya mo laamii…óo Baabila wa…ói ngomna lesdi."
Jeremiah41:3 Nden Isma'iilu mbari Yahuudu'en wondu…ďe bee Gedaliya haa Mispa fuu e honoo…ďe Kaldiya'en won…ďe ton.
Jeremiah41:4 JaŇčngo man, hiddeko go…ó…óo he…ďta …ďe mbari Gedaliya,"
Jeremiah41:5 wor…ďe cappan…óe njoweetato ngari diga Sikem e Silo e Samariya. ∆Āe la…ďno bakku…óe ma…ď…ďe, …ďe ceekno limce ma…ď…ďe, …ďe ∆īarino …ďalli ma…ď…ďe boo. ∆Āe ngari bee dokke nyaamdu e uurle haa juu…óe ma…ď…ďe, haa …ďe lii'o …óum haa haykaliiru Jawmiraawo."
Jeremiah41:6 Isma'iilu …ďii Netaniya wurti Mispa ngam fottugo bee ma…ď…ďe, o …óon woya. Nde o fotti bee ma…ď…ďe, o wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúNgare kommbi Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah41:7 Nde …ďe nasti wuro, Isma'iilu e wor…ďe muu…óum mbari …ďe, cakkini …ďe nder …ďulndu."
Jeremiah41:8 Ammaa woodi wor…ďe sappo caka ma…ď…ďe …ďe mbi'i Isma'iilu: ‚ÄúUseni taa mbar min! Min nyukkini alkamaari e sa'iiruuri e nebbam e njumri nder gese.‚ÄĚ Ngam man o acci …ďe, o mbardaay …ďe bee sooba'en ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah41:9 ∆Āulndu ndu Isma'iilu sakkini …ďalli mbaraa…ďe go nder muu…óum, ndu mawndu. Laamii…óo Asa wasno ndu ngam daliila Ba'asa, laamii…óo Isra'iila. Isma'iilu …ďii Netaniya hebbini ndu bee mbaraa…ďe."
Jeremiah41:10 Nden o naŇčngi …ďi…ď…ďe laamii…óo rew…ďe e yim…ďe luttu…ďe haa Mispa …ďe Nebuzaradan, hooreejo aynoo…ďe halfitinno Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam. O hoo'i …ďe ngam o daha …ďe haa lesdi Ammoon."
Jeremiah41:11 Ammaa Yohanan …ďii Kareha e maw…ďe wondu…ďe bee maako fuu nani kallu…óum ko Isma'iilu …ďii Netaniya wa…ói.
Jeremiah41:12 ∆Āe moo…ďti wor…ďe ma…ď…ďe fuu, …ďe njehi ha…ďugo bee maako. ∆Āe njokki mo baŇčnge weendu mawndu haa Gibiyon."
Jeremiah41:13 Nde naŇčngaa…ďe Isma'iilu diga Mispa ngi'i Yohanan e maw…ďe konu wo…ó…ďe, …ďe ceyi. Ngam maajum …ďe ngayliti, …ďe ndoggi haa Yohanan …ďii Kareha."
Jeremiah41:14 
Jeremiah41:15 Ammaa Isma'iilu e wor…ďe njoweetato nda…ói Yohanan, ndilli lesdi Ammoon."
Jeremiah41:16 Nden Yohanan …ďii Kareha e maw…ďe konu wondu…ďe bee maako kooci honoo…ďe e rew…ďe e …ďikkoy e suka'en laamii…óo, waato yim…ďe …ďe Isma'iilu naŇčnguno haa Mispa, …ďaawo o mbarino Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam. ∆Āe koo'i …ďe haa Gibiyon,"
Jeremiah41:17 …ďe ndilli. ∆Āe njippi wakkati se…ó…óa haa ho…óorde Kimham baŇčnge Baytilaama. ∆Āe annini yahugo haa Misra
Jeremiah41:18 ngam daaytaago bee Kaldiya'en. ∆Āe kuli Kaldiya'en, ngam Isma'iilu mbari Gedaliya mo laamii…óo Baabila wa…óino ngomna lesdi."
Jeremiah42:1 Yohanan …ďii Kareha e Yejaniya. …ďii Hosa'ya e maw…ďe konu wo…ó…ďe fuu ngardi bee yim…ďe maw…ďe e lees…ďe fuu
Jeremiah42:2 haa annabi Yeremiya, mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúUseni ja…ď tornde amin! Toran min Jawmiraawo Allah maa…óa, minin luttu…ďe. Naane min …óuu…ó…ďe, ammaa minin luttu…ďe jonta, min …óuu…óaay, bana ngi'rata …óo."
Jeremiah42:3 Ngam maajum tora Jawmiraawo haa o anndina min laawol ngol min tokkoto e ko min mba…óata boo.‚ÄĚ
Jeremiah42:4 Annabi Yeremiya jaabi …ďe: ‚ÄúBoo…ó…óum, mi nani kadi. Mi toroto Jawmiraawo, Allah moo…óon ko ∆īam…óon. Nden mi yecca on ko Jawmiraawo jaaboto, mi suu…óataa on koo …óume.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah42:5 ∆Āe mbi'i Yeremiya: ‚ÄúJawmiraawo laato ceedoowo gooŇč…óu…óo koolnii…óo dow amin, to min …óowtanaaki umrooje fuu …óe Jawmiraawo Allah maa…óa umrete ngam amin."
Jeremiah42:6 Koo boo…ó…óum koo kallu…óum, min …óowtanto Jawmiraawo Allah amin mo min neli ma ∆īamugo …óum. Min anndi to min …óowtanake mo, min ke…ďan hayru.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah42:7 ∆Āaawo nyal…óe sappo, Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya."
Jeremiah42:8 Yeremiya ewni Yohanan …ďii Kareha e maw…ďe konu wondu…ďe bee maako e yim…ďe maw…ďe e lees…ďe fuu,"
Jeremiah42:9 wi'i …ďe: ‚ÄúNdaa ko Jawmiraawo, Allah Isra'iila mo nel…óon yam toraago …óum ngam moo…óon, wi'i:"
Jeremiah42:10 To on tokkake joo…óaago nder lesdi ndi'i, nden kam mi tabitinan on, mi nattintaa on, mi juboto on, mi …óoofataa on. Ngam mi mimsitan sarru ngu mi ukkani on."
Jeremiah42:11 Taa kule laamii…óo Baabila. Taa kule mo, ngam min Jawmiraawo mi …óon wondi bee moo…óon, haa mi hisna on e juŇčngo maako, mi rim…óina on. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i."
Jeremiah42:12 Mi hinnoto on, haa kaŇčko boo o hinno on, o acca on on koota."
Jeremiah42:13 Ammaa onon luttu…ďe nder Yahuuda, taa cale …óowtanaago Jawmiraawo, Allah moo…óon e joo…óaago nder lesdi ndi'i. Taa mbi'e: Woodaa, sey min ndilla, min njoo…óo haa lesdi Misra, ngam taa min meeta yi'ugo konu e nanugo luuwe konu, koo maatugo dolo. To on mbi'i bana nii, nden kam Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i ni'i: To on kuucitini gite mon haa lesdi Misra ngam joo…óaago ton,"
Jeremiah42:14 
Jeremiah42:15 
Jeremiah42:16 nden kam kaafahi ki kuloton jokkoto on haa lesdi Misra. Dolo ngo hulni on, tokkoto on, haa ton maayoton."
Jeremiah42:17 Huucitin…ďe gite muu…óum'en haa Misra ngam joo…óaago ton, maayran bee kaafahi malla weelo malla nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu. Walaa koo gooto ma…ď…ďe luttata. Walaa koo gooto ma…ď…ďe da…óata sarru ngu ukkananmi …ďe.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah42:18 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúBana mi rufi tikkere am e …ďernuki am dow yim…ďe Urusaliima, bana non ndufranmi …ďernuki am dow moo…óon, to on ndilli Misra. Mi laatinan on hulnii…ďe, yim…ďe ku…óan on, naaliran bee in…óe mon. On meetataa yi'ugo nokkuure nde'e boo.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah42:19 Nden Yeremiya tokki wi'ugo …ďe: ‚ÄúOnon luttu…ďe Yahuuda, Jawmiraawo wolwani on, taa on njaha Misra. Ndaa, mi reentini on hannde."
Jeremiah42:20 On …óon majjina ko'e moo…óon. On neli yam haa Jawmiraawo, Allah moo…óon, on mbi'i yam: Do'ana min Jawmiraawo Allah amin. Anndin min ko o wi'ete fuu, min mba…óan …óum."
Jeremiah42:21 Mi anndini on …óum jonta, ammaa on …óowtanaaki umrooje Jawmiraawo …óe o neli yam wi'ugo on."
Jeremiah42:22 Jonta kam, annde boo…ó…óum: On maayran bee kaafahi malla weelo malla nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu haa lesdi ndi ngi…ó…óon yahgo joo…óo ton.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah43:1 Nde Yeremiya timmini yeccugo yim…ďe ummaatoore ko Jawmiraawo Allah ma…ď…ďe neli mo anndingo …ďe fuu,"
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya …ďii Hosa'ya e Yohanan …ďii Kareha e wor…ďe elew…ďe fuu mbi'i mo: ‚ÄúA …óon fewa! Jawmiraawo Allah amin nelaay ma wi'ugo min, taa min njaha Misra ngam fa…ď…ďoygo ton."
Jeremiah43:3 Ammaa Baruku …ďii Neriya ummini ma dow amin, ngam hokkugo min haa juu…óe Kaldiya'en, haa …ďe mbara min malla …ďe ndaha min haa Baabila.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah43:4 Bana non Yohanan e maw…ďe konu fuu e ummaatoore fuu …óowtanaaki Jawmiraawo umru…óo …ďe joo…óaago nder lesdi Yahuuda.
Jeremiah43:5 Yohanan e maw…ďe konu fuu koo'i luttu…ďe Yahuuda fuu, njahri …ďe haa Misra. ∆Āe koo'i yim…ďe wartu…ďe Yahuuda diga les…óe haa …ďe caŇčkitino fuu,"
Jeremiah43:6 wor…ďe, rew…ďe, …ďikkoy e …ďi…ď…ďe laamii…óo rew…ďe, koo …ďeye …ďe Nebuzaradan, hooreejo aynoo…ďe laamii…óo Baabila accino haa Gedaliya …ďii Ahikam …ďii Safan. ∆Āe koo'i boo annabi Yeremiya e Baruku …ďii Neriya."
Jeremiah43:7 ∆Āe …óowtanaaki umroore Jawmiraawo, …ďe njehi Misra, haa yotti berniwol Tahapanes."
Jeremiah43:8 Haa Tahapanes Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya, wi'i mo:"
Jeremiah43:9 ‚ÄúHoo'u kaa'e maw…óe, nastin …óe nder taŇčkol yeeso nastirde suudu Firawna haa Tahapanes. Wa…ó …óum haa gite Yahuudu'en."
Jeremiah43:10 Nden yeccu …ďe: Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Mi nelan waddugo suka am Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila, ngam mi jo'ina leeso laamu maako dow kaa'e …óe nastinmi …óo, kaŇčko o we'itan laymaaru maako haa dow maaje."
Jeremiah43:11 O waran o hippo lesdi Misra. Mo hoddirana maayugo, maayan. Mo hoddirana daheego, dahetee…óo. Mo hoddirana mbareego bee kaafahi, mbaretee…óo bee kaafahi."
Jeremiah43:12 Mi hu…ď…ďan yiite nder cuu…ói …óowantee…ďe Misra. Laamii…óo Baabila wulan …óowantee…ďe Misra malla o yahran …ďe haa Baabila. O la…ď…ďinan lesdi Misra bana gaynaako ittirta ten…ói haa limce mum. ∆Āaawo man o hoota jam.
Jeremiah43:13 O yibbinan daŇčraŇčge cenaa…óe haa Bayti-Semes nder lesdi Misra, o wulan cuu…ói …óowantee…ďe Misra.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah44:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya ngam Yahuudu'en joo…óii…ďe nder lesdi Misra fuu, haa Migdol e Tahapanes e Memfis e haa lesdi Paturus."
Jeremiah44:2 Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúOn ngi'i sarru ngu ukkumi Urusaliima e berniiji Yahuuda fuu. Haa wargo hannde …ói laati bille, walaa joo…óii…óo ton."
Jeremiah44:3 Mi wa…ói …óum ngam yim…ďe maaji kuuwi kuu…óe kallu…óe, tikkini yam. ∆Āe ngulani …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe uurle, …ďe ndewi …ďe, …ďe anndaano …ďe boo, koo kam…ďe, koo onon, koo kaakiraa…ďe mon."
Jeremiah44:4 Mi tokki nelugo suka'en am annabi'en haa ma…ď…ďe, …ďe mbi'a …ďe: Taa mba…óe nyiddu…óum …óu'um, ngam mi …óon wanya …óum!"
Jeremiah44:5 Ammaa kam…ďe …ďe nanaay, …ďe kakkilaay. ∆Āe accaay wa…óugo kallu…óum, …ďe tokki wulango …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe uurle."
Jeremiah44:6 Ngam man ndufmi tikkere am e …ďernuki am dow berniiji Yahuuda e laabi Urusaliima, …óum wuli …ói. ∆äi laati bille geewaa…óe haa wargo hannde.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah44:7 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: ‚ÄúKoni mba…óoton kallu…óum …óu'um dow ko'e mon? Kadi on ngi…ói nattingo wor…ďe e rew…ďe e …ďikkoy e musinankoy nder Yahuuda, ngam taa gooto lutta na?"
Jeremiah44:8 Koni on tikkintammi bee kuu…óe mon, bee wulango …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe boo uurle, haa …óo nder lesdi Misra ndi ngar…óon fa…ď…ďugo? On …óon mba…óa …óum ngam halkugo ko'e mon na? Haa ummaatooje duniyaaru fuu njanca, ku…óa on na?"
Jeremiah44:9 On ngejjiti zunuubaaji kaakiraa…ďe mon na, koo zunuubaaji laamii…ďe Yahuuda e …ói rew…ďe ma…ď…ďe, koo zunuubaaji mon e …ói rew…ďe mon, …óum ko wa…ói nder lesdi Yahuuda, dow laabi Urusaliima boo, on ngejjiti na?"
Jeremiah44:10 Haa wargo hannde on leestinaay ko'e mon, on kulaay yam, on tokkaaki tawreeta am e umrooje …óe umrumi on, onon e kaakiraa…ďe mon."
Jeremiah44:11 Ngam maajum min Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila, mi annini honugo e nattingo Yahuuda fuu."
Jeremiah44:12 Mi hoocan luttu…ďe Yahuuda wa…ó…ďe anniya yahugo Misra ngam fa…ď…ďoygo ton, …ďe nattintee…ďe ton …ďe fuu. Maw…ďe e lees…ďe maayran bee konu e weelo. Mi laatinan …ďe hulnii…ďe, yim…ďe ku…óan …ďe, naaliran bee in…óe ma…ď…ďe."
Jeremiah44:13 Mi hiitoto joo…óii…ďe nder Misra, bana mi hiitori Urusaliima, bee konu e weelo e nyawu kalluŇčgu ndaa…ďoowu."
Jeremiah44:14 Luttu…ďe Yahuuda war…ďe haa Misra ngam fa…ď…ďoygo ton, walaa koo gooto ma…ď…ďe luttata. Walaa koo gooto hisnata yoŇčki mum ngam o hoota haa lesdi Yahuuda ndi …ďe ngenwata joo…óaago fahin. Walaa mo hootata, sonaa da…ó…ďe se…ó…óa.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah44:15 Nden wor…ďe anndu…ďe rew…ďe muu…óum'en …óon ngulana …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe uurle e moo…ďre rew…ďe hawtu…ďe darii…ďe ton e Yahuudu'en joo…óii…ďe haa Paturus nder lesdi Misra, mbi'i Yeremiya:"
Jeremiah44:16 ‚ÄúMin nanataa ko mbi'…óa min bee innde Jawmiraawo.
Jeremiah44:17 Fakat min mba…óan ko min mbi'i fuu. Min ngulana …óowantee…óo debbo bi'etee…óo Mayramjo Asama uurle, min nga…óana mo dokke dufetee…óe bana ko min mba…ói, minin e kaakiraa…ďe amin e laamii…ďe amin e ardii…ďe amin, nder gure Yahuuda e dow laabi Urusaliima. Saa'i man min ngoodino nyaamdu fantundu, min njoo…óino jam, min ngi'aayno sarru sam."
Jeremiah44:18 Ammaa diga min acci wulango Mayramjo Asama uurle e wa…óango mo dokke dufetee…óe, min ngalaa koo …óume, yim…ďe amin maayri bee konu e weelo.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah44:19 Rew…ďe …ďesdi wi'ugo: ‚ÄúSaa'i min lii'ani Mayramjo Asama tamseeje nanndu…óe jaati maako, min ngulani mo uurle, min nga…óani mo dokke dufetee…óe, wor…ďe amin ngerdaaki ko min mba…ói na?‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah44:20 Yeremiya wi'i ummaatoore fuu, wor…ďe e rew…ďe jaabii…ďe mo bana non:"
Jeremiah44:21 ‚ÄúUurle …óe ngul…óon nder gure Yahuuda e dow laabi Urusaliima kam, onon e kaakiraa…ďe mon e laamii…ďe mon e ardii…ďe mon e yim…ďe lesdi fuu, on tammi Jawmiraawo anndaa …óum, koo o yejjiti …óum na?"
Jeremiah44:22 Jawmiraawo waawaay munyango kuu…óe mon kallu…óe nyiddu…óe. Ngam maajum lesdi mon laati winnde, ferwi, walaa mo joo…ói ton. Yim…ďe naaliran bee innde maari, bana ko laati hannde."
Jeremiah44:23 On ngulani …óowantee…ďe wo…ó…ďe uurle, on mba…ói hakke dow Jawmiraawo, on nananaay mo, on tokkaaki tawreeta maako e farillaaji maako e seedamkuuji maako. Ngam man sarru ngu'u fuu ukkani on, bana ko laati hannde.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah44:24 Nden Yeremiya wi'i ummaatoore e rew…ďe fuu: ‚ÄúNane wolde Jawmiraawo, onon Yahuudu'en won…ďe nder lesdi Misra!"
Jeremiah44:25 Ndaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i: Onon e rew…ďe mon on togi togayeeje bee kunndu…óe mon, on kebbitini …óe bee juu…óe mon. On togi wulango Mayramjo Asama uurle, on nga…óanan mo dokke dufetee…óe. Boo…ó…óum kadi, kebbine togayeeje mon! Mba…óe ko togii…óon!"
Jeremiah44:26 Ammaa nane wolde Jawmiraawo jonta, onon Yahuudu'en won…ďe haa Misra. O wi'i: Mi hunori bee innde am mawnde: Walaa Yahuuduujo meetata hunoraago bee innde am nder lesdi Misra fuu, o wi'a: Fakat bana Jawmiraawo Allah o geeto!"
Jeremiah44:27 Mi ti…ó…óinan wa…óugo on sarru, naa hayru. Onon yim…ďe Yahuuda won…ďe haa Misra, on fuu on maayran bee kaafahi e bee weelo, haa to on nattidi fuu."
Jeremiah44:28 Ammaa yim…ďe se…ó…óa caka moo…óon nda…óan kaafahi, …ďe lortoto diga Misra haa Yahuuda. Nden Yahuudu'en luttan…ďe war…ďe ngam fa…ď…ďugo haa Misra anndan wolde moy gooŇč…ói, nde am malla nde ma…ď…ďe!"
Jeremiah44:29 Min Jawmiraawo mi hokkan on alaama haa anndon no bolle sarru …óe anndinmi on ngooŇč…óirta fakat.
Jeremiah44:30 Ndaa, mi hokkan Firawna Hofra, laamii…óo Misra haa juu…óe konne'en mum yi…ó…ďe mbarugo mo, bana ndokkirmi Sedekiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda haa juŇčngo konneejo mum Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila gi…ó…óo mbarugo …óum. Non Jawmiraawo wi'i.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah45:1 Nder nduu…ďu Yooyakim …ďii Yusiya, laamii…óo Yahuuda, naya…ďu, nde Baruku …ďii Neriya winndi haa deftere ko Yeremiya anndini mo. Yeremiya wi'i mo:"
Jeremiah45:2 ‚ÄúNdaa nii Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, Allah Isra'iila wi'i ma: An Baruku,"
Jeremiah45:3 a wi'i: Bone laatani yam! Jawmiraawo …ďesdi mettam…ďeram dow naaworlaaji am. Mi somi uumugo, mi he…ďaay siwtaare.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah45:4 Jawmiraawo wi'i Yeremiya o yecca Baruku: ‚ÄúMi yibbinan ko nyi…ďmi, mi …óoofan ko njubiimi nder lesdi fuu."
Jeremiah45:5 A …óon …óa…ď…ďana hoore ma kuuje maw…óe na? Taa …óa…ď…ďu koo …óume! Ndaa, mi ukkanan yim…ďe fuu sarru. Ammaa an, mi hisnan yoŇčki ma koo toy njahata fuu. Min Jawmiraawo wi'i …óum.‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah46:1 Jawmiraawo wolwani Yeremiya ko laarani ummaatooje.
Jeremiah46:2 Ndaa ko Jawmiraawo wi'i dow Misra. O wolwi haala moo…ďre konu Firawna Neko, laamii…óo Misra. Nabukodonosor, laamii…óo Baabila jaali nde haa Karkemis baŇčnge maayo Efratis. ∆äum laati nder nduu…ďu Yooyakim …ďii Yusiya naya…ďu."
Jeremiah46:3 Maw…ďe konu Misra …óon koola: ‚ÄúKooce bawar…óe e ndarganaaje, naste ha…ďre!"
Jeremiah46:4 Mbaate kirke dow pucci mon, mba'e …ói, onon wa'oo…ďe pucci. Ndarne caffuuji, mba…óe kufneeje njamndi dow ko'e mon. Cee…ďne labbe mon, …ďorne sulkeeji mon!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah46:5 Jawmiraawo ∆īami: ‚Äú∆äume mi yi'ata? Koni …ďe …óon ndiwna, …ďe lororo …ďaawo? Honoo…ďe ma…ď…ďe njaalaama, …óon ndogga bilaa yeesitaago sam. KultoreeŇčgol …óon koo toy!"
Jeremiah46:6 Yaaw…óotoo…ďe nda…óataa, semmbi…ó…ďe kisataa! Haa woyla, haa fomoonde Efratis, …ďe …óon pergo, …ďe …óon ndo'o."
Jeremiah46:7 ∆äume …ďesdoto bana Niil, bana maayo teelanŇčgo dow pomoole mum?"
Jeremiah46:8 Misra …óon …ďesdo bana Niil, bana maayo teelanŇčgo dow pomoole mum. Misra wi'i: Mi …ďesdoto, mi suddan duniyaaru fuu, mi halkan berniiji e joo…óii…ďe ton."
Jeremiah46:9 Naste ha…ďre, onon pucci! Njaaw…óe, onon mootaaji pucci! Ngurte, onon semmbi…ó…ďe, yim…ďe Etiyopiya e Put, naŇčngoo…ďe bawar…óe, fi…óoo…ďe kuri iw…ďe Luudi!‚ÄĚ"
Jeremiah46:10 Ammaa nyalaade nde'e woni nyalaade Jawmiraawo honoo…ďe asama, …óum nyalaade waataago, nde o waatoto konne'en maako. Kaafahi nyaaman …ďe, ki haaran. Ki yaran ∆īii∆īam ma…ď…ďe haa ki safta. ∆Āe laatanto Jawmiraawo Allah honoo…ďe asama kirsetee…óum nder lesdi woyla baŇčnge maayo Efratis."
Jeremiah46:11 Onon yim…ďe Misra, njehe Gile'at, …óa…ď…ďitoye lekki. Le…ó…óe mon …óuu…ó…óe fuu nafataa, walaa ko nyawndata on."
